9:103.base_text: Take a donation from their wealths to sanctify them and purify them with, and pray for them; indeed, your prayer is (a source of) rest for them. And Allah is All-Hearing, All-Knowing.
9:103.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: خُذۡ مِنۡ أَمۡوَٰلِهِمۡ صَدَقَةٗ تُطَهِّرُهُمۡ وَتُزَكِّيهِم بِهَا وَصَلِّ عَلَيۡهِمۡۖ إِنَّ صَلَوَٰتِكَ سَكَنٞ لَّهُمۡۗ وَاَللَّهُ سَمِيعٌ عَلِيمٌ
9:103.susi_ar_text: خُذۡ مِنۡ أَمۡوَٰلِهِمۡ صَدَقَةٗ تُطَهِّرُهُمۡ وَتُزَكِّيهِم بِهَا وَصَلِّ عَلَيۡهِمۡۖ  إِنَّ صَلَوَٰتِكَ سَكَنٞ لَّهُمۡۗ وَاَللَّهُ سَمِيعٌ عَلِيمٌ

10:2.base_text: Was it a wonder to mankind that We revealed to a man from among them: “Warn mankind and give glad tidings to those who have attained faith that they are on a sound footing with their Lord”? The deniers said, “Most surely, this is an evident sorcerer.”
10:2.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: أَكَانَ لِلنّ۪اسِ عَجَبًا أَنۡ أَوۡحَيۡنَآ إِلَىٰ رَجُلٖ مِّنۡهُمۡ أَنۡ أَنذِرِ اِ۬لنَّاسَ وَبَشِّرِ اِ۬لَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓاْ أَنَّ لَهُمۡ قَدَمَ صِدۡقٍ عِندَ رَبِّهِمۡۗ قَالَ اَ۬لۡكَٰفِرُونَ إِنَّ هَٰذَا لَسِحۡرٞ مُّبِينٌ
10:2.susi_ar_text: أَكَانَ لِلنَّاسِ عَجَبًا أَنۡ  أَوۡحَيۡنَا إِلَىٰ رَجُلٖ مِّنۡهُمۡ أَنۡ أَنذِرِ اِ۬لنَّاسَ وَبَشِّرِ اِ۬لَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ  أَنَّ لَهُمۡ قَدَمَ صِدۡقٍ عِندَ رَبِّهِمۡۗ قَالَ اَ۬لۡكَٰفِرُونَ إِنَّ هَٰذَا  لَسِحۡرٞ مُّبِينٌ

10:23.base_text: But when He has saved them, there they are, committing unjustified aggression in the land. O mankind, your oppression is only against yourselves— (you only enjoy) the enjoyment of the Earlier Life, then to Us is your return and We will inform you of what you used to do.
10:23.duri_abu_amr_text: O mankind, your oppression against yourselves is (only) the enjoyment of the Earlier Life
10:23.susi_text: O mankind, your oppression against yourselves is (only) the enjoyment of the Earlier Life
10:23.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: فَلَمَّآ أَنجَىٰهُمۡ إِذَا هُمۡ يَبۡغُونَ فِي اِ۬لۡأَرۡضِ بِغَيۡرِ اِ۬لۡحَقِّۗ يَٰٓأَيُّهَا اَ۬لنَّاسُ إِنَّمَا بَغۡيُكُمۡ عَلَىٰٓ أَنفُسِكُمۖ مَّتَٰعُ اُ۬لۡحَيَوٰةِ اِ۬لدُّنۡيۭاۖ ثُمَّ إِلَيۡنَا مَرۡجِعُكُمۡ فَنُنَبِّئُكُم بِمَا كُنتُمۡ تَعۡمَلُونَ
10:23.susi_ar_text: فَلَمَّا أَنجَىٰهُمۡ إِذَا هُمۡ يَبۡغُونَ فِي اِ۬لۡأَرۡضِ بِغَيۡرِ  اِ۬لۡحَقِّۗ يَٰأَيُّهَا اَ۬لنَّاسُ إِنَّمَا بَغۡيُكُمۡ عَلَىٰ أَنفُسِكُمۖ مَّتَٰعُ اُ۬لۡحَيَوٰةِ  اِ۬لدُّنۡيۭاۖ ثُمَّ إِلَيۡنَا مَرۡجِعُكُمۡ فَنُنَبِّئُكُم بِمَا كُنتُمۡ تَعۡمَلُونَ

10:45.base_text: And on the day when He herds them, (it will be) as if they had remained for only one hour of a day, getting to know one another. Those who disbelieved the meeting with Allah have certainly lost and were not guided.
10:45.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: وَيَوۡمَ نَحۡشُرُهُمۡ كَأَن لَّمۡ يَلۡبَثُوٓاْ إِلَّا سَاعَةٗ مِّنَ اَ۬لنَّه۪ارِ يَتَعَارَفُونَ بَيۡنَهُمۡۚ قَدۡ خَسِرَ اَ۬لَّذِينَ كَذَّبُواْ بِلِقَآءِ اِ۬للَّهِ وَمَا كَانُواْ مُهۡتَدِينَ
10:45.susi_ar_text: وَيَوۡمَ نَحۡشُرُهُمۡ كَأَن لَّمۡ يَلۡبَثُواْ إِلَّا سَاعَةٗ مِّنَ اَ۬لنَّه۪ارِ  يَتَعَارَفُونَ بَيۡنَهُمۡۚ قَدۡ خَسِرَ اَ۬لَّذِينَ كَذَّبُواْ بِلِقَآءِ اِ۬للَّهِ وَمَا كَانُواْ  مُهۡتَدِينَ

10:81.base_text: So when they threw, Moses said, “What you produced is sorcery; indeed, Allah will nullify it; indeed, Allah does not set aright the work of the corrupters.
10:81.duri_abu_amr_text: So when they threw, Moses said, “What you have produced—is it sorcery? Indeed, Allah will nullify it; indeed, Allah does not set aright the work of the corrupters.
10:81.susi_text: So when they threw, Moses said, “What you have produced—is it sorcery? Indeed, Allah will nullify it; indeed, Allah does not set aright the work of the corrupters.
10:81.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: فَلَمَّآ أَلۡقَوۡاْ قَالَ مُوسۭيٰ مَا جِئۡتُم بِهِۦٓۚ ءَآلسِّحۡرُۖ إِنَّ اَ۬للَّهَ سَيُبۡطِلُهُۥٓۖ إِنَّ اَ۬للَّهَ لَا يُصۡلِحُ عَمَلَ اَ۬لۡمُفۡسِدِينَ
10:81.susi_ar_text: فَلَمَّا أَلۡقَوۡاْ قَالَ  مُوسۭيٰ مَا جِيتُم بِهِۦۚ ءَآلسِّحۡرُۖ إِنَّ اَ۬للَّهَ سَيُبۡطِلُهُۥ إِنَّ اَ۬للَّهَ لَا يُصۡلِحُ  عَمَلَ اَ۬لۡمُفۡسِدِينَ

10:88.base_text: And Moses said, “Our Lord, You have indeed given Pharaoh and his chiefs ornaments and wealth in the Earlier Life, our Lord, (which they used) to make (others) stray from Your way. Our Lord, obliterate their wealths and harden their hearts so that they do not believe until they see the painful punishment.”
10:88.duri_abu_amr_text: And Moses said, “Our Lord, You have indeed given Pharaoh and his chiefs ornaments and wealth in the Earlier Life, our Lord, (which they used) to stray from Your way. Our Lord, obliterate their wealths and harden their hearts so that they do not believe until they see the painful punishment.”
10:88.susi_text: And Moses said, “Our Lord, You have indeed given Pharaoh and his chiefs ornaments and wealth in the Earlier Life, our Lord, (which they used) to stray from Your way. Our Lord, obliterate their wealths and harden their hearts so that they do not believe until they see the painful punishment.”
10:88.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: وَقَالَ مُوسۭيٰ رَبَّنَآ إِنَّكَ ءَاتَيۡتَ فِرۡعَوۡنَ وَمَلَأَهُۥ زِينَةٗ وَأَمۡوَٰلٗا فِي اِ۬لۡحَيَوٰةِ اِ۬لدُّنۡيۭا رَبَّنَا لِيَضِلُّواْ عَن سَبِيلِكَۖ رَبَّنَا اَ۪طۡمِسۡ عَلَىٰٓ أَمۡوَٰلِهِمۡ وَاَشۡدُدۡ عَلَىٰ قُلُوبِهِمۡ فَلَا يُؤۡمِنُواْ حَتَّىٰ يَرَوُاْ اُ۬لۡعَذَابَ اَ۬لۡأَلِيمَ
10:88.susi_ar_text: وَقَالَ مُوسۭيٰ  رَبَّنَا إِنَّكَ ءَاتَيۡتَ فِرۡعَوۡنَ وَمَلَأَهُۥ زِينَةٗ وَأَمۡوَٰلٗا فِي اِ۬لۡحَيَوٰةِ  اِ۬لدُّنۡيۭا رَبَّنَا لِيَضِلُّواْ عَن سَبِيلِكَۖ رَبَّنَا اَ۪طۡمِسۡ عَلَىٰ أَمۡوَٰلِهِمۡ  وَاَشۡدُدۡ عَلَىٰ قُلُوبِهِمۡ فَلَا يُومِنُواْ حَتَّىٰ يَرَوُاْ اُ۬لۡعَذَابَ اَ۬لۡأَلِيمَ

10:103.base_text: Then We deliver Our messengers and those who have attained faith. Thus it is binding upon Us to saved the believers.
10:103.duri_abu_amr_text: Then We deliver Our messengers and those who have attained faith. Thus it is binding upon Us to deliver the believers.
10:103.susi_text: Then We deliver Our messengers and those who have attained faith. Thus it is binding upon Us to deliver the believers.
10:103.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: ثُمَّ نُنَجِّي رُسۡلَنَا وَاَلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْۚ كَذَٰلِكَ حَقًّا عَلَيۡنَا نُنَجِّ اِ۬لۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ
10:103.susi_ar_text: ثُمَّ نُنَجِّي  رُسۡلَنَا وَاَلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْۚ كَذَٰلِكَ حَقًّا عَلَيۡنَا نُنَجِّ اِ۬لۡمُومِنِينَ

11:24.base_text: The parable of the two groups is that of one who is blind and deaf, and one who is seeing and hearing. Are they equal in similitude? Will you not remind yourselves?
11:24.duri_abu_amr_text: The parable of the two groups is that of one who is blind and deaf, and one who is seeing and hearing. Are they equal in similitude? Will you not constantly remember?
11:24.susi_text: The parable of the two groups is that of one who is blind and deaf, and one who is seeing and hearing. Are they equal in similitude? Will you not constantly remember?
11:24.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: ۞ مَثَلُ اُ۬لۡفَرِيقَيۡنِ كَاَلۡأَعۡمَىٰ وَاَلۡأَصَمِّ وَاَلۡبَصِيرِ وَاَلسَّمِيعِۚ هَلۡ يَسۡتَوِيَانِ مَثَلًاۚ أَفَلَا تَذَّكَّرُونَ
11:24.susi_ar_text: ۞ مَثَلُ اُ۬لۡفَرِيقَيۡنِ كَاَلۡأَعۡمَىٰ وَاَلۡأَصَمِّ  وَاَلۡبَصِيرِ وَاَلسَّمِيعِۚ هَلۡ يَسۡتَوِيَانِ مَثَلًاۚ أَفَلَا تَذَّكَّرُونَ

11:28.base_text: He said, “O my people, have you seen? What if I rely on evident proof from my Lord, and He has given me a mercy of His own, but it was made invisible to you —can we compel you to accept it even though you dislike it?
11:28.duri_abu_amr_text: He said, “O my people, have you seen? What if I rely on evident proof from my Lord, and He has given me a mercy of His own, but it became invisible to you —can we compel you to accept it even though you dislike it?
11:28.susi_text: He said, “O my people, have you seen? What if I rely on evident proof from my Lord, and He has given me a mercy of His own, but it became invisible to you —can we compel you to accept it even though you dislike it?
11:28.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: قَالَ يَٰقَوۡمِ أَرَءَيۡتُمۡ إِن كُنتُ عَلَىٰ بَيِّنَةٖ مِّن رَّبِّي وَءَاتَىٰنِي رَحۡمَةٗ مِّنۡ عِندِهِۦ فَعَمِيَتۡ عَلَيۡكُمۡ أَنُلۡزِمُكُمُوهَا وَأَنتُمۡ لَهَا كَٰرِهُونَ
11:28.susi_ar_text: قَالَ يَٰقَوۡمِ أَرَءَيۡتُمۡ إِن كُنتُ عَلَىٰ بَيِّنَةٖ مِّن رَّبِّي وَءَاتَىٰنِي رَحۡمَةٗ مِّنۡ  عِندِهِۦ فَعَمِيَتۡ عَلَيۡكُمۡ أَنُلۡزِمُكُمُوهَا وَأَنتُمۡ لَهَا كَٰرِهُونَ

11:30.base_text: And O my people, who will support me against Allah if I expel them? Will you not remind yourselves?
11:30.duri_abu_amr_text: And O my people, who will support me against Allah if I expel them? Will you not constantly remember?
11:30.susi_text: And O my people, who will support me against Allah if I expel them? Will you not constantly remember?
11:30.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: وَيَٰقَوۡمِ مَن يَنصُرُنِي مِنَ اَ۬للَّهِ إِن طَرَدتُّهُمۡۚ أَفَلَا تَذَّكَّرُونَ
11:30.susi_ar_text: وَيَٰقَوۡم مَّن يَنصُرُنِي مِنَ اَ۬للَّهِ إِن طَرَدتُّهُمۡۚ أَفَلَا  تَذَّكَّرُونَ

11:40.base_text: Until, when Our command came and the oven overflowed, We said, “Carry in it, of each kind, a male and female coupled, and your family—except those against whom the sentence has already been passed—and those who have attained faith.” But none attained faith with him except a few.
11:40.duri_abu_amr_text: Until, when Our command came and the oven overflowed, We said, “Carry in it, of each female and male kind, one couple, and your family—except those against whom the sentence has already been passed—and those who have attained faith.” But none attained faith with him except a few.
11:40.susi_text: Until, when Our command came and the oven overflowed, We said, “Carry in it, of each female and male kind, one couple, and your family—except those against whom the sentence has already been passed—and those who have attained faith.” But none attained faith with him except a few.
11:40.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا جَآ أَمۡرُنَا وَفَارَ اَ۬لتَّنُّورُ قُلۡنَا اَ۪حۡمِلۡ فِيهَا مِن كُلِّ زَوۡجَيۡنِ اِ۪ثۡنَيۡنِ وَأَهۡلَكَ إِلَّا مَن سَبَقَ عَلَيۡهِ اِ۬لۡقَوۡلُ وَمَنۡ ءَامَنَۚ وَمَآ ءَامَنَ مَعَهُۥٓ إِلَّا قَلِيلٞ
11:40.susi_ar_text: حَتَّىٰ إِذَا جَا أَمۡرُنَا وَفَارَ اَ۬لتَّنُّورُ قُلۡنَا اَ۪حۡمِلۡ فِيهَا  مِن كُلِّ زَوۡجَيۡنِ اِ۪ثۡنَيۡنِ وَأَهۡلَكَ إِلَّا مَن سَبَقَ عَلَيۡهِ اِ۬لۡقَوۡلُ  وَمَنۡ ءَامَنَۚ وَمَا ءَامَنَ مَعَهُۥ إِلَّا قَلِيلٞ

11:41.base_text: And he said, “Embark in it. In the name of Allah shall be its sailing and its anchorage. My Lord is most surely Oft-Forgiving, Bestowing of mercy.”
11:41.duri_abu_amr_text: And he said, “Embark in it. In the name of Allah who causes it to sail and who causes it to anchor. My Lord is most surely Oft-Forgiving, Bestowing of mercy.”
11:41.susi_text: And he said, “Embark in it. In the name of Allah who causes it to sail and who causes it to anchor. My Lord is most surely Oft-Forgiving, Bestowing of mercy.”
11:41.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: وَقَالَ اَ۪رۡكَبُواْ فِيهَا بِسۡمِ اِ۬للَّهِ مُجۡر۪ىٰهَا وَمُرۡسَىٰهَآۚ إِنَّ رَبِّي لَغَفُورٞ رَّحِيمٞ
11:41.susi_ar_text: وَقَالَ اَ۪رۡكَبُواْ فِيهَا  بِسۡمِ اِ۬للَّهِ مُجۡر۪ىٰهَا وَمُرۡسَىٰهَاۚ إِنَّ رَبِّي لَغَفُورٞ رَّحِيمٞ

11:81.base_text: They said, “O Lot, we are the messengers of your Lord; they will not reach you, so take your family on a journey while yet a part of the night remains, and let none of you look back. But not your wife —she will be afflicted by that which afflicts them. Indeed, their appointed time is the morning. Is not the morning near?”
11:81.duri_abu_amr_text: They said, “O Lot, we are the messengers of your Lord; they will not reach you, so take your family on a journey while yet a part of the night remains. And let none of you look back except for your wife—she will be afflicted by that which afflicts them. Indeed, their appointed time is the morning. Is not the morning near?”
11:81.susi_text: They said, “O Lot, we are the messengers of your Lord; they will not reach you, so take your family on a journey while yet a part of the night remains. And let none of you look back except for your wife—she will be afflicted by that which afflicts them. Indeed, their appointed time is the morning. Is not the morning near?”
11:81.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: قَالُواْ يَٰلُوطُ إِنَّا رُسُلُ رَبِّكَ لَن يَصِلُوٓاْ إِلَيۡكَۖ فَأَسۡرِ بِأَهۡلِكَ بِقِطۡعٖ مِّنَ اَ۬لَّيۡلِ وَلَا يَلۡتَفِتۡ مِنكُمۡ أَحَدٌ إِلَّا اَ۪مۡرَأَتُكَۖ إِنَّهُۥ مُصِيبُهَا مَآ أَصَابَهُمۡۚ إِنَّ مَوۡعِدَهُمُ اُ۬لصُّبۡحُۚ أَلَيۡسَ اَ۬لصُّبۡحُ بِقَرِيبٖ
11:81.susi_ar_text: قَالُواْ  يَٰلُوطُ إِنَّا رُسُل رَّبِّكَ لَن يَصِلُواْ إِلَيۡكَۖ فَأَسۡرِ بِأَهۡلِكَ بِقِطۡعٖ  مِّنَ اَ۬لَّيۡلِ وَلَا يَلۡتَفِتۡ مِنكُمۡ أَحَدٌ إِلَّا اَ۪مۡرَأَتُكَۖ إِنَّهُۥ مُصِيبُهَا  مَا أَصَابَهُمۡۚ إِنَّ مَوۡعِدَهُمُ اُ۬لصُّبۡحُۚ أَلَيۡسَ اَ۬لصُّبۡحُ بِقَرِيبٖ

11:87.base_text: They said, “O Shuaib, does your prayer command you that we abandon what our fathers worship or that we should not do with our wealth whatever we will? Very truly, you are the forbearing, prudent one!”
11:87.duri_abu_amr_text: They said, “O Shuaib, do your prayers command you that we abandon what our fathers worship or that we should not do with our wealth whatever we will? Very truly, you are the forbearing, prudent one!”
11:87.susi_text: They said, “O Shuaib, do your prayers command you that we abandon what our fathers worship or that we should not do with our wealth whatever we will? Very truly, you are the forbearing, prudent one!”
11:87.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: قَالُواْ يَٰشُعَيۡبُ أَصَلَوَٰتُكَ تَأۡمُرُكَ أَن نَّتۡرُكَ مَا يَعۡبُدُ ءَابَآؤُنَآ أَوۡ أَن نَّفۡعَلَ فِيٓ أَمۡوَٰلِنَا مَا نَشَٰٓؤُاْۖ اِ۪نَّكَ لَأَنتَ اَ۬لۡحَلِيمُ اُ۬لرَّشِيدُ
11:87.susi_ar_text: قَالُواْ يَٰشُعَيۡبُ أَصَلَوَٰتُكَ تَامُرُكَ أَن نَّتۡرُكَ  مَا يَعۡبُدُ ءَابَآؤُنَا أَوۡ أَن نَّفۡعَلَ فِي أَمۡوَٰلِنَا مَا نَشَٰٓؤُاْۖ اِ۪نَّكَ  لَأَنتَ اَ۬لۡحَلِيمُ اُ۬لرَّشِيدُ

11:108.base_text: And as for the ones who have been granted happiness, they are in the Garden (of Paradise), abiding therein for as long as the heavens and the earth remain, except as your Lord has willed—an uninterrupted grant.
11:108.duri_abu_amr_text: And as for the ones who have become happy, they are in the Garden (of Paradise), abiding therein for as long as the heavens and the earth remain, except as your Lord has willed—an uninterrupted grant.
11:108.susi_text: And as for the ones who have become happy, they are in the Garden (of Paradise), abiding therein for as long as the heavens and the earth remain, except as your Lord has willed—an uninterrupted grant.
11:108.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: ۞ وَأَمَّا اَ۬لَّذِينَ سَعِدُواْ فَفِي اِ۬لۡجَنَّةِ خَٰلِدِينَ فِيهَا مَا دَامَتِ اِ۬لسَّمَٰوَٰتُ وَاَلۡأَرۡضُ إِلَّا مَا شَآءَ رَبُّكَۖ عَطَآءً غَيۡرَ مَجۡذُوذٖ
11:108.susi_ar_text: ۞ وَأَمَّا اَ۬لَّذِينَ سَعِدُواْ فَفِي اِ۬لۡجَنَّةِ خَٰلِدِينَ فِيهَا مَا دَامَتِ  اِ۬لسَّمَٰوَٰتُ وَاَلۡأَرۡضُ إِلَّا مَا شَآءَ رَبُّكَۖ عَطَآءً غَيۡرَ مَجۡذُوذٖ

11:123.base_text: And to Allah belongs the hidden realm of the heavens and the earth, and to Him every matter is returned. So worshipsg Him and place your trust in Him, for your Lord is not oblivious of what youpl do.
11:123.duri_abu_amr_text: And to Allah belongs the hidden realm of the heavens and the earth, and to Him every matter returns. So worshipsg Him and place your trust in Him, for your Lord is not oblivious of what they do.
11:123.susi_text: And to Allah belongs the hidden realm of the heavens and the earth, and to Him every matter returns. So worshipsg Him and place your trust in Him, for your Lord is not oblivious of what they do.
11:123.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: وَلِلَّهِ غَيۡبُ اُ۬لسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَاَلۡأَرۡضِ وَإِلَيۡهِ يَرۡجِعُ اُ۬لۡأَمۡرُ كُلُّهُۥ فَاَعۡبُدۡهُ وَتَوَكَّلۡ عَلَيۡهِۚ وَمَا رَبُّكَ بِغَٰفِلٍ عَمَّا يَعۡمَلُونَ
11:123.susi_ar_text: وَلِلَّهِ غَيۡبُ اُ۬لسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَاَلۡأَرۡضِ وَإِلَيۡهِ يَرۡجِعُ اُ۬لۡأَمۡرُ كُلُّهُۥ  فَاَعۡبُدۡهُ وَتَوَكَّلۡ عَلَيۡهِۚ وَمَا رَبُّكَ بِغَٰفِلٍ عَمَّا يَعۡمَلُونَ

12:12.base_text: Send him with us tomorrow, that he may eat well and play, and we are most surely his preservers.”
12:12.duri_abu_amr_text: Send him with us tomorrow, that we may eat well and play, and we are most surely his preservers.”
12:12.susi_text: Send him with us tomorrow, that we may eat well and play, and we are most surely his preservers.”
12:12.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: أَرۡسِلۡهُ مَعَنَا غَدٗا نَّرۡتَعۡ وَنَلۡعَبۡ وَإِنَّا لَهُۥ لَحَٰفِظُونَ
12:12.susi_ar_text: أَرۡسِلۡهُ مَعَنَا غَدٗا نَّرۡتَعۡ وَنَلۡعَبۡ  وَإِنَّا لَهُۥ لَحَٰفِظُونَ

12:19.base_text: And there came some travelers, so they sent their water-carrier, then he let down his bucket. He said, “What glad tidings! Here is a boy!” And they hid him as merchandise. Yet Allah is All-Knowing of what they do.
12:19.duri_abu_amr_text: And there came some travelers, so they sent their water-carrier, then he let down his bucket. He said, “What glad tidings for me! Here is a boy!” And they hid him as merchandise. Yet Allah is All-Knowing of what they do.
12:19.susi_text: And there came some travelers, so they sent their water-carrier, then he let down his bucket. He said, “What glad tidings for me! Here is a boy!” And they hid him as merchandise. Yet Allah is All-Knowing of what they do.
12:19.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: وَجَآءَت سَّيَّارَةٞ فَأَرۡسَلُواْ وَارِدَهُمۡ فَأَدۡلَىٰ دَلۡوَهُۥۖ قَالَ يَٰبُشۡرَٰيَ هَٰذَا غُلَٰمٞۚ وَأَسَرُّوهُ بِضَٰعَةٗۚ وَاَللَّهُ عَلِيمُۢ بِمَا يَعۡمَلُونَ
12:19.susi_ar_text: وَجَآءَت سَّيَّارَةٞ  فَأَرۡسَلُواْ وَارِدَهُمۡ فَأَدۡلَىٰ دَلۡوَهُۥۖ قَالَ يَٰبُشۡرَٰيَ هَٰذَا غُلَٰمٞۚ وَأَسَرُّوهُ  بِضَٰعَةٗۚ وَاَللَّهُ عَلِيمُۢ بِمَا يَعۡمَلُونَ

12:24.base_text: And surely, she advanced towards him, and he would have advanced towards her had he not seen the proof of his Lord. Thus it was, so that We would divert evil and obscenity away from him; indeed, he is one of Our sincere chosen servants.
12:24.duri_abu_amr_text: And surely, she advanced towards him, and he would have advanced towards her had he not seen the proof of his Lord. Thus it was, so that We would divert evil and obscenity away from him; indeed, he is one of Our sincere servants.
12:24.susi_text: And surely, she advanced towards him, and he would have advanced towards her had he not seen the proof of his Lord. Thus it was, so that We would divert evil and obscenity away from him; indeed, he is one of Our sincere servants.
12:24.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: وَلَقَدۡ هَمَّتۡ بِهِۦۖ وَهَمَّ بِهَا لَوۡلَآ أَن رَّء۪ا بُرۡهَٰنَ رَبِّهِۦۚ كَذَٰلِكَ لِنَصۡرِفَ عَنۡهُ اُ۬لسُّوٓءَ وَاَلۡفَحۡشَآءَۚ ا۪نَّهُۥ مِنۡ عِبَادِنَا اَ۬لۡمُخۡلِصِينَ
12:24.susi_ar_text: وَلَقَدۡ هَمَّتۡ بِهِۦۖ وَهَمَّ بِهَا  لَوۡلَا أَن رَّء۪ا بُرۡهَٰنَ رَبِّهِۦۚ كَذَٰلِكَ لِنَصۡرِفَ عَنۡهُ اُ۬لسُّوٓءَ  وَاَلۡفَحۡشَآءَۚ ا۪نَّهُۥ مِنۡ عِبَادِنَا اَ۬لۡمُخۡلِصِينَ

12:62.base_text: So he said to his young assistants, “Put their goods in their saddlebags; perhaps they will recognize them when they return to their families so that they may come back.”
12:62.duri_abu_amr_text: So he said to his few young assistants, “Put their goods in their saddlebags; perhaps they will recognize them when they return to their families so that they may come back.”
12:62.susi_text: So he said to his few young assistants, “Put their goods in their saddlebags; perhaps they will recognize them when they return to their families so that they may come back.”
12:62.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: وَقَالَ لِفِتۡيَتِهِ اِ۪جۡعَلُواْ بِضَٰعَتَهُمۡ فِي رِحَالِهِمۡ لَعَلَّهُمۡ يَعۡرِفُونَهَآ إِذَا اَ۪نقَلَبُوٓاْ إِلَىٰٓ أَهۡلِهِمۡ لَعَلَّهُمۡ يَرۡجِعُونَ
12:62.susi_ar_text: وَقَال لِّفِتۡيَتِهِ اِ۪جۡعَلُواْ بِضَٰعَتَهُمۡ فِي رِحَالِهِمۡ  لَعَلَّهُمۡ يَعۡرِفُونَهَا إِذَا اَ۪نقَلَبُواْ إِلَىٰ أَهۡلِهِمۡ لَعَلَّهُمۡ يَرۡجِعُونَ

12:76.base_text: So he began with their bags before his brother’s bag, then he extracted it from his brother’s bag. Thus We plotted for Joseph; he could not have seized his brother according to the king’s religion unless Allah wills. We elevate by degrees whomever We so will. For above everyone who has knowledge, there is One who is All-Knowing.
12:76.duri_abu_amr_text: We elevate the degrees (ranks) of whomever . . .
12:76.susi_text: We elevate the degrees (ranks) of whomever . . .
12:76.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: فَبَدَأَ بِأَوۡعِيَتِهِمۡ قَبۡلَ وِعَآءِ اَ۬خِيهِ ثُمَّ اَ۪سۡتَخۡرَجَهَا مِن وِعَآءِ اَ۬خِيهِۚ كَذَٰلِكَ كِدۡنَا لِيُوسُفَۖ مَا كَانَ لِيَأۡخُذَ أَخَاهُ فِي دِينِ اِ۬لۡمَلِكِ إِلَّآ أَن يَشَآءَ اَ۬للَّهُۚ نَرۡفَعُ دَرَجَٰتِ مَن نَّشَآءُۗ وَفَوۡقَ كُلِّ ذِي عِلۡمٍ عَلِيمٞ
12:76.susi_ar_text: فَبَدَأَ بِأَوۡعِيَتِهِمۡ قَبۡلَ وِعَآءِ اَ۬خِيهِ ثُمَّ اَ۪سۡتَخۡرَجَهَا مِن  وِعَآءِ اَ۬خِيهِۚ كَذَٰلِك كِّدۡنَا لِيُوسُفَۖ مَا كَانَ لِيَاخُذَ أَخَاهُ  فِي دِينِ اِ۬لۡمَلِكِ إِلَّا أَن يَشَآءَ اَ۬للَّهُۚ نَرۡفَعُ دَرَجَٰتِ مَن نَّشَآءُۗ  وَفَوۡقَ كُلِّ ذِي عِلۡمٍ عَلِيمٞ

12:109.base_text: And in no way did We send (any messengers) before yousg except men to whom We reveal, from among the people of the towns. Have they not journeyed through the earth and looked at what the outcome was for those before them? The Home of the Hereafter is surely better for those who have been mindful (of God). Do youpl not reason?
12:109.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: وَمَآ أَرۡسَلۡنَا مِن قَبۡلِكَ إِلَّا رِجَالٗا يُوحَىٰٓ إِلَيۡهِم مِّنۡ أَهۡلِ اِ۬لۡقُر۪يٰٓۗ أَفَلَمۡ يَسِيرُواْ فِي اِ۬لۡأَرۡضِ فَيَنظُرُواْ كَيۡفَ كَانَ عَٰقِبَةُ اُ۬لَّذِينَ مِن قَبۡلِهِمۡۗ وَلَدَارُ اُ۬لۡأٓخِرَةِ خَيۡرٞ لِّلَّذِينَ اَ۪تَّقَوۡاْۗ أَفَلَا يَعۡقِلُونَ
12:109.susi_ar_text: وَمَا أَرۡسَلۡنَا مِن  قَبۡلِكَ إِلَّا رِجَالٗا يُوحَىٰ إِلَيۡهِم مِّنۡ أَهۡلِ اِ۬لۡقُر۪يٰۗ أَفَلَمۡ يَسِيرُواْ  فِي اِ۬لۡأَرۡضِ فَيَنظُرُواْ كَيۡفَ كَانَ عَٰقِبَةُ اُ۬لَّذِينَ مِن  قَبۡلِهِمۡۗ وَلَدَارُ اُ۬لۡأٓخِرَةِ خَيۡرٞ لِّلَّذِينَ اَ۪تَّقَوۡاْۚ أَفَلَا يَعۡقِلُونَ

12:110.base_text: Until, when the messengers had completely despaired and thought that they had been lied to (by their own selves), Our support came to them. Then whomever We willed was delivered, and Our chastisement is never turned back from the criminal people.
12:110.duri_abu_amr_text: Then We save whomever We will . . .
12:110.susi_text: Then We save whomever We will . . .
12:110.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا اَ۪سۡتَيۡـَٔسَ اَ۬لرُّسُلُ وَظَنُّوٓاْ أَنَّهُمۡ قَدۡ كُذِّبُواْ جَآءَهُمۡ نَصۡرُنَا فَنُـۨجِي مَن نَّشَآءُۖ وَلَا يُرَدُّ بَأۡسُنَا عَنِ اِ۬لۡقَوۡمِ اِ۬لۡمُجۡرِمِينَ
12:110.susi_ar_text: حَتَّىٰ إِذَا اَ۪سۡتَيۡـَٔسَ اَ۬لرُّسُلُ وَظَنُّواْ أَنَّهُمۡ قَدۡ كُذِّبُواْ  جَآءَهُمۡ نَصۡرُنَا فَنُـۨجِي مَن نَّشَآءُۖ وَلَا يُرَدُّ بَاسُنَا عَنِ اِ۬لۡقَوۡمِ  اِ۬لۡمُجۡرِمِينَ

13:17.base_text: He sent down water from the sky, so valleys flowed—each according to its capacity—and the current carried swelling froth. And from what they burn in fire, seeking to make ornaments or utensils, comes a similar froth. Thus Allah exemplifies truth and falsehood: so as for the froth—it fades away, and as for what benefits mankind—it remains in the earth; thus Allah sets forth parables.
13:17.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: أَنزَلَ مِنَ اَ۬لسَّمَآءِ مَآءٗ فَسَالَتۡ أَوۡدِيَةُۢ بِقَدَرِهَا فَاَحۡتَمَلَ اَ۬لسَّيۡلُ زَبَدٗا رَّابِيٗاۖ وَمِمَّا تُوقِدُونَ عَلَيۡهِ فِي اِ۬لنّ۪ارِ اِ۪بۡتِغَآءَ حِلۡيَةٍ أَوۡ مَتَٰعٖ زَبَدٞ مِّثۡلُهُۥۚ كَذَٰلِكَ يَضۡرِبُ اُ۬للَّهُ اُ۬لۡحَقَّ وَاَلۡبَٰطِلَۚ فَأَمَّا اَ۬لزَّبَدُ فَيَذۡهَبُ جُفَآءٗۖ وَأَمَّا مَا يَنفَعُ اُ۬لنَّاسَ فَيَمۡكُثُ فِي اِ۬لۡأَرۡضِۚ كَذَٰلِكَ يَضۡرِبُ اُ۬للَّهُ اُ۬لۡأَمۡثَالَ
13:17.susi_ar_text: أَنزَلَ  مِنَ اَ۬لسَّمَآءِ مَآءٗ فَسَالَتۡ أَوۡدِيَةُۢ بِقَدَرِهَا فَاَحۡتَمَلَ اَ۬لسَّيۡلُ زَبَدٗا رَّابِيٗاۖ  وَمِمَّا تُوقِدُونَ عَلَيۡهِ فِي اِ۬لنّ۪ارِ اِ۪بۡتِغَآءَ حِلۡيَةٍ أَوۡ مَتَٰعٖ زَبَدٞ مِّثۡلُهُۥۚ  كَذَٰلِكَ يَضۡرِبُ اُ۬للَّهُ اُ۬لۡحَقَّ وَاَلۡبَٰطِلَۚ فَأَمَّا اَ۬لزَّبَدُ فَيَذۡهَبُ جُفَآءٗۖ  وَأَمَّا مَا يَنفَعُ اُ۬لنَّاسَ فَيَمۡكُثُ فِي اِ۬لۡأَرۡضِۚ كَذَٰلِكَ يَضۡرِبُ اُ۬للَّهُ  اُ۬لۡأَمۡثَال

13:33.base_text: Is the One Who is watchful over what every single self has earned…? Yet they set up associates to Allah. Say, “Namepl them! Or are you to inform Him as to what He knows not in the earth? Or is it a show of words?” Rather, the scheming of those who have denied has been adorned for them, and they were barred from the way. And whomever Allah leads astray, no guide shall there ever be for him.
13:33.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: أَفَمَنۡ هُوَ قَآئِمٌ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ نَفۡسِۢ بِمَا كَسَبَتۡۗ وَجَعَلُواْ لِلَّهِ شُرَكَآءَ قُلۡ سَمُّوهُمۡۚ أَمۡ تُنَبِّـُٔونَهُۥ بِمَا لَا يَعۡلَمُ فِي اِ۬لۡأَرۡضِ أَم بِظَٰهِرٖ مِّنَ اَ۬لۡقَوۡلِۗ بَلۡ زُيِّنَ لِلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ مَكۡرُهُمۡ وَصَدُّواْ عَنِ اِ۬لسَّبِيلِۗ وَمَن يُضۡلِلِ اِ۬للَّهُ فَمَا لَهُۥ مِنۡ هَادٖ
13:33.susi_ar_text: أَفَمَنۡ هُوَ قَآئِمٌ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ نَفۡسِۢ بِمَا كَسَبَتۡۗ وَجَعَلُواْ  لِلَّهِ شُرَكَآءَ قُلۡ سَمُّوهُمۡۚ أَمۡ تُنَبِّـُٔونَهُۥ بِمَا لَا يَعۡلَمُ فِي اِ۬لۡأَرۡضِ أَم  بِظَٰهِرٖ مِّنَ اَ۬لۡقَوۡلِۗ بَلۡ زُيِّن لِّلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ مَكۡرُهُمۡ وَصَدُّواْ عَنِ  اِ۬لسَّبِيلِۗ وَمَن يُضۡلِلِ اِ۬للَّهُ فَمَا لَهُۥ مِنۡ هَادٖ

13:42.base_text: And the ones who came before them had schemed (as well), yet to Allah belongs all scheming; He knows what every single self earns. And the deniers will know to whom belongs the Ultimate Dwelling.
13:42.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: وَقَدۡ مَكَرَ اَ۬لَّذِينَ مِن قَبۡلِهِمۡ فَلِلَّهِ اِ۬لۡمَكۡرُ جَمِيعٗاۖ يَعۡلَمُ مَا تَكۡسِبُ كُلُّ نَفۡسٖۗ وَسَيَعۡلَمُ اُ۬لۡكَٰفِرُ لِمَنۡ عُقۡبَى اَ۬لدّ۪ارِ
13:42.susi_ar_text: وَقَدۡ مَكَرَ اَ۬لَّذِينَ مِن قَبۡلِهِمۡ فَلِلَّهِ اِ۬لۡمَكۡرُ جَمِيعٗاۖ  يَعۡلَم مَّا تَكۡسِبُ كُلُّ نَفۡسٖۗ وَسَيَعۡلَمُ اُ۬لۡكَٰفِر لِّمَنۡ عُقۡبَى اَ۬لدّ۪ارِ

14:30.base_text: And they set up rivals to Allah in order to make (others) stray from His way. Say, “Enjoy yourselves, for surely your destiny is to the Fire.”
14:30.duri_abu_amr_text: And they set up rivals to Allah in order to stray from His way. Say, “Enjoy yourselves, for surely your destiny is to the Fire.”
14:30.susi_text: And they set up rivals to Allah in order to stray from His way. Say, “Enjoy yourselves, for surely your destiny is to the Fire.”
14:30.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: وَجَعَلُواْ لِلَّهِ أَندَادٗا لِّيَضِلُّواْ عَن سَبِيلِهِۦۗ قُلۡ تَمَتَّعُواْ فَإِنَّ مَصِيرَكُمۡ إِلَى اَ۬لنّ۪ارِ
14:30.susi_ar_text: وَجَعَلُواْ لِلَّهِ أَندَادٗا لِّيَضِلُّواْ عَن سَبِيلِهِۦۗ قُلۡ  تَمَتَّعُواْ فَإِنَّ مَصِيرَكُمۡ إِلَى اَ۬لنّ۪ارِ

15:8.base_text: We bestow not the angels from on high except with the truth, and in no way would they then be respited.
15:8.duri_abu_amr_text: The angels are not bestowed from on high except with the truth, and in no way would they then be respited.
15:8.susi_text: The angels are not bestowed from on high except with the truth, and in no way would they then be respited.
15:8.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: مَا تَنَزَّلُ اُ۬لۡمَلَٰٓئِكَةُ إِلَّا بِالۡحَقِّ وَمَا كَانُوٓاْ إِذٗا مُّنظَرِينَ
15:8.susi_ar_text: مَا تَنَزَّلُ اُ۬لۡمَلَٰٓئِكَةُ إِلَّا بِالۡحَقِّ وَمَا كَانُواْ  إِذٗا مُّنظَرِينَ

15:40.base_text: except for Your sincere chosen servants among them.”
15:40.duri_abu_amr_text: except for Your sincere servants among them.”
15:40.susi_text: except for Your sincere servants among them.”

16:2.base_text: He bestows the angels from on high with the Spirit by His command upon whom He wills of His servants: “Give warning that there is no god but Me, so be mindful of Me.”
16:2.duri_abu_amr_text: He sends down the angels with the Spirit by His command upon whom He wills of His servants: “Give warning that there is no god but Me, so be mindful of Me.”
16:2.susi_text: He sends down the angels with the Spirit by His command upon whom He wills of His servants: “Give warning that there is no god but Me, so be mindful of Me.”
16:2.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: يُنزِلُ اُ۬لۡمَلَٰٓئِكَةَ بِالرُّوحِ مِنۡ أَمۡرِهِۦ عَلَىٰ مَن يَشَآءُ مِنۡ عِبَادِهِۦٓ أَنۡ أَنذِرُوٓاْ أَنَّهُۥ لَآ إِلَٰهَ إِلَّآ أَنَا۠ فَاَتَّقُونِ
16:2.susi_ar_text: يُنزِلُ اُ۬لۡمَلَٰٓئِكَةَ بِالرُّوحِ مِنۡ أَمۡرِهِۦ عَلَىٰ مَن يَشَآءُ مِنۡ  عِبَادِهِۦ أَنۡ أَنذِرُواْ أَنَّهُۥ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا أَنَا۠ فَاَتَّقُونِ

16:12.base_text: And He has subjected to you the night and the day and the sun and the moon. And the stars are subjected by His command. Indeed, in that are signs for people who reason.
16:12.duri_abu_amr_text: And He has subjected to you the night and the day and the sun and the moon and the stars—(all) subjected by His command. Indeed, in that are signs for people who reason.
16:12.susi_text: And He has subjected to you the night and the day and the sun and the moon and the stars—(all) subjected by His command. Indeed, in that are signs for people who reason.
16:12.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: وَسَخَّرَ لَكُمُ اُ۬لَّيۡلَ وَاَلنَّهَارَ وَاَلشَّمۡسَ وَاَلۡقَمَرَ وَاَلنُّجُومَ مُسَخَّرَٰتِۢ بِأَمۡرِهِۦٓۗ إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَأٓيَٰتٖ لِّقَوۡمٖ يَعۡقِلُونَ
16:12.susi_ar_text: وَسَخَّر لَّكُمُ اُ۬لَّيۡلَ وَاَلنَّهَارَ وَاَلشَّمۡسَ وَاَلۡقَمَرَ  وَاَلنُّجُوم مُّسَخَّرَٰتِۢ بِأَمۡرِهِۦۚ إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَأٓيَٰتٖ لِّقَوۡمٖ  يَعۡقِلُونَ

16:17.base_text: Is One Who creates like one who does not create? Will you never remind yourselves?
16:17.duri_abu_amr_text: Is One Who creates like one who does not create? Will you not constantly remember?
16:17.susi_text: Is One Who creates like one who does not create? Will you not constantly remember?
16:17.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: أَفَمَن يَخۡلُقُ كَمَن لَّا يَخۡلُقُۗ أَفَلَا تَذَّكَّرُونَ
16:17.susi_ar_text: أَفَمَن يَخۡلُق كَّمَن لَّا يَخۡلُقُۚ أَفَلَا تَذَّكَّرُونَ

16:20.base_text: Yet those they call upon apart from Allah create nothing, while they (themselves) are created.
16:20.duri_abu_amr_text: Yet those you call upon apart from Allah create nothing, while they (themselves) are created.
16:20.susi_text: Yet those you call upon apart from Allah create nothing, while they (themselves) are created.
16:20.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: وَاَلَّذِينَ تَدۡعُونَ مِن دُونِ اِ۬للَّهِ لَا يَخۡلُقُونَ شَيۡـٔٗا وَهُمۡ يُخۡلَقُونَ
16:20.susi_ar_text: وَاَلَّذِينَ تَدۡعُونَ  مِن دُونِ اِ۬للَّهِ لَا يَخۡلُقُونَ شَيۡـٔٗا وَهُمۡ يُخۡلَقُونَ

16:37.base_text: (Even) if you are concerned about their guidance, (still) Allah surely does not guide whomever He leads astray, and they will have no helpers.
16:37.duri_abu_amr_text: (Even) if you are concerned about their guidance, (still) whomever Allah leads astray surely cannot be guided, and they will have no helpers.
16:37.susi_text: (Even) if you are concerned about their guidance, (still) whomever Allah leads astray surely cannot be guided, and they will have no helpers.
16:37.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: ۞ إِن تَحۡرِصۡ عَلَىٰ هُدَىٰهُمۡ فَإِنَّ اَ۬للَّهَ لَا يُهۡدَىٰ مَن يُضِلُّۖ وَمَا لَهُم مِّن نَّٰصِرِينَ
16:37.susi_ar_text: ۞ إِن تَحۡرِصۡ عَلَىٰ هُدَىٰهُمۡ  فَإِنَّ اَ۬للَّهَ لَا يُهۡدَىٰ مَن يُضِلُّۖ وَمَا لَهُم مِّن نَّٰصِرِينَ

16:90.base_text: Indeed, Allah commands to justice and excelling in doing good and bringing (charity) to the relative, and He forbids obscenity and what is deplorable and oppression. He admonishes you, that you may remind yourselves.
16:90.duri_abu_amr_text: Indeed, Allah commands to justice and excelling in doing good and bringing (charity) to the relative, and He forbids obscenity and what is deplorable and oppression. He admonishes you, that you may constantly remember.
16:90.susi_text: Indeed, Allah commands to justice and excelling in doing good and bringing (charity) to the relative, and He forbids obscenity and what is deplorable and oppression. He admonishes you, that you may constantly remember.
16:90.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: ۞ إِنَّ اَ۬للَّهَ يَأۡمُرُ بِالۡعَدۡلِ وَاَلۡإِحۡسَٰنِ وَإِيتَآيِٕ ذِي اِ۬لۡقُرۡبۭيٰ وَيَنۡهَىٰ عَنِ اِ۬لۡفَحۡشَآءِ وَاَلۡمُنكَرِ وَاَلۡبَغۡيِۚ يَعِظُكُمۡ لَعَلَّكُمۡ تَذَّكَّرُونَ
16:90.susi_ar_text: ۞ إِنَّ اَ۬للَّهَ  يَامُرُ بِالۡعَدۡلِ وَاَلۡإِحۡسَٰنِ وَإِيتَآيِٕ ذِي اِ۬لۡقُرۡبۭيٰ وَيَنۡهَىٰ عَنِ  اِ۬لۡفَحۡشَآءِ وَاَلۡمُنكَرِ وَاَلۡبَغۡيۚ يَّعِظُكُمۡ لَعَلَّكُمۡ تَذَّكَّرُونَ

16:96.base_text: What you have runs out, but what is with Allah remains. And We will most surely repay those who were patient their reward in accordance with the best of what they used to do.
16:96.duri_abu_amr_text: What you have runs out, but what is with Allah remains. And He will most surely repay those who were patient their reward in accordance with the best of what they used to do.
16:96.susi_text: What you have runs out, but what is with Allah remains. And He will most surely repay those who were patient their reward in accordance with the best of what they used to do.
16:96.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: مَا عِندَكُمۡ يَنفَدُۖ وَمَا عِندَ اَ۬للَّهِ بَاقٖۗ وَلَيَجۡزِيَنَّ اَ۬لَّذِينَ صَبَرُوٓاْ أَجۡرَهُم بِأَحۡسَنِ مَا كَانُواْ يَعۡمَلُونَ
16:96.susi_ar_text: مَا عِندَكُمۡ  يَنفَدُ وَمَا عِندَ اَ۬للَّهِ بَاقٖۗ وَلَيَجۡزِيَنَّ اَ۬لَّذِينَ صَبَرُواْ أَجۡرَهُم  بِأَحۡسَنِ مَا كَانُواْ يَعۡمَلُونَ

16:101.base_text: Yet whenever We substitute a sign in place of another sign—and Allah knows better what He bestows from on high —they say, “Indeed, you are nothing but a fabricator.” Rather, most of them do not know.
16:101.duri_abu_amr_text: Yet whenever We substitute a sign in place of another sign—and Allah knows better what He sends down —they say, “Indeed, you are nothing but a fabricator.” Rather, most of them do not know.
16:101.susi_text: Yet whenever We substitute a sign in place of another sign—and Allah knows better what He sends down —they say, “Indeed, you are nothing but a fabricator.” Rather, most of them do not know.
16:101.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: ۞ وَإِذَا بَدَّلۡنَآ ءَايَةٗ مَّكَانَ ءَايَةٖ وَاَللَّهُ أَعۡلَمُ بِمَا يُنزِلُ قَالُوٓاْ إِنَّمَآ أَنتَ مُفۡتَرِۢۚ بَلۡ أَكۡثَرُهُمۡ لَا يَعۡلَمُونَ
16:101.susi_ar_text: ۞ وَإِذَا بَدَّلۡنَا ءَايَةٗ مَّكَانَ ءَايَةٖ  وَاَللَّهُ أَعۡلَم بِمَا يُنزِلُ قَالُواْ إِنَّمَا أَنتَ مُفۡتَرِۢۚ بَلۡ أَكۡثَرُهُمۡ  لَا يَعۡلَمُونَ

17:2.base_text: And We brought Moses the Scripture and made it guidance for the Children of Israel: “Take none for trustee other than Me,”
17:2.duri_abu_amr_text: And We brought Moses the Scripture and made it guidance for the Children of Israel, that they may take none for trustee other than Me,
17:2.susi_text: And We brought Moses the Scripture and made it guidance for the Children of Israel, that they may take none for trustee other than Me,
17:2.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: وَءَاتَيۡنَا مُوسَى اَ۬لۡكِتَٰبَ وَجَعَلۡنَٰهُ هُدٗى لِّبَنِيٓ إِسۡرَٰٓءِيلَ أَلَّا يَتَّخِذُواْ مِن دُونِي وَكِيلٗا
17:2.susi_ar_text: وَءَاتَيۡنَا مُوسَى اَ۬لۡكِتَٰبَ وَجَعَلۡنَٰه  هُّدٗى لِّبَنِي إِسۡرَٰٓءِيلَ أَلَّا يَتَّخِذُواْ مِن دُونِي وَكِيلٗا

17:38.base_text: All of that— its evil has always been disliked by your Lord.
17:38.duri_abu_amr_text: All of that has always been an evil deed before yoursg Lord (and) disliked.
17:38.susi_text: All of that has always been an evil deed before yoursg Lord (and) disliked.
17:38.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: كُلُّ ذَٰلِكَ كَانَ سَيِّئَةً عِندَ رَبِّكَ مَكۡرُوهٗا
17:38.susi_ar_text: كُلُّ ذَٰلِك كَّانَ سَيِّئَةً عِندَ رَبِّكَ مَكۡرُوهٗا

17:42.base_text: Say, “If there were other gods with Him as they say, they would have sought a way to the Possessor of the Throne.”
17:42.duri_abu_amr_text: Say, “If there were other gods with Him as youpl say, they would have sought a way to the Possessor of the Throne.”
17:42.susi_text: Say, “If there were other gods with Him as youpl say, they would have sought a way to the Possessor of the Throne.”
17:42.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: قُل لَّوۡ كَانَ مَعَهُۥٓ ءَالِهَةٞ كَمَا تَقُولُونَ إِذٗا لَّاَبۡتَغَوۡاْ إِلَىٰ ذِي اِ۬لۡعَرۡشِ سَبِيلٗا
17:42.susi_ar_text: قُل لَّوۡ كَانَ مَعَهُۥ ءَالِهَةٞ كَمَا تَقُولُونَ إِذٗا لَّاَبۡتَغَوۡاْ إِلَىٰ ذِي اِ۬لۡعَرۡش سَّبِيلٗا

17:68.base_text: Are you confident that He will not cause a side of the shore to collapse beneath you
17:68.duri_abu_amr_text: Are you confident that We will not cause a side of the shore to collapse beneath you
17:68.susi_text: Are you confident that We will not cause a side of the shore to collapse beneath you
17:68.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: أَفَأَمِنتُمۡ أَن نَّخۡسِفَ بِكُمۡ جَانِبَ اَ۬لۡبَرِّ أَوۡ نُرۡسِلَ عَلَيۡكُمۡ حَاصِبٗا ثُمَّ لَا تَجِدُواْ لَكُمۡ وَكِيلًا
17:68.susi_ar_text: أَفَأَمِنتُمۡ  أَن نَّخۡسِفَ بِكُمۡ جَانِبَ اَ۬لۡبَرِّ أَوۡ نُرۡسِلَ عَلَيۡكُمۡ حَاصِبٗا ثُمَّ  لَا تَجِدُواْ لَكُمۡ وَكِيلًا

17:69.base_text: that He will not return you to it once again and unleash
17:69.duri_abu_amr_text: that We will not return you to it once again and unleash
17:69.susi_text: that We will not return you to it once again and unleash
17:69.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: أَمۡ أَمِنتُمۡ أَن نُّعِيدَكُمۡ فِيهِ تَارَةً أُخۡر۪يٰ فَنُرۡسِلَ عَلَيۡكُمۡ قَاصِفٗا مِّنَ اَ۬لرِّيحِ فَنُغۡرِقَكُم بِمَا كَفَرۡتُمۡ ثُمَّ لَا تَجِدُواْ لَكُمۡ عَلَيۡنَا بِهِۦ تَبِيعٗا
17:69.susi_ar_text: أَمۡ أَمِنتُمۡ أَن نُّعِيدَكُمۡ فِيهِ تَارَةً  أُخۡر۪يٰ فَنُرۡسِلَ عَلَيۡكُمۡ قَاصِفٗا مِّنَ اَ۬لرِّيحِ فَنُغۡرِقكُّم بِمَا كَفَرۡتُمۡ  ثُمَّ لَا تَجِدُواْ لَكُمۡ عَلَيۡنَا بِهِۦ تَبِيعٗا

17:82.base_text: And We bestow from on high of the Recital
17:82.duri_abu_amr_text: And We send down of the Recital
17:82.susi_text: And We send down of the Recital
17:82.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: وَنُنزِلُ مِنَ اَ۬لۡقُرۡءَانِ مَا هُوَ شِفَآءٞ وَرَحۡمَةٞ لِّلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ وَلَا يَزِيدُ اُ۬لظَّٰلِمِينَ إِلَّا خَسَارٗا
17:82.susi_ar_text: وَنُنزِلُ مِنَ اَ۬لۡقُرۡءَانِ مَا هُوَ  شِفَآءٞ وَرَحۡمَةٞ لِّلۡمُومِنِينَ وَلَا يَزِيدُ اُ۬لظَّٰلِمِينَ إِلَّا خَسَارٗا

17:93.base_text: until you bestow upon us from on high a scripture
17:93.duri_abu_amr_text: until you send down upon us a scripture
17:93.susi_text: until you send down upon us a scripture
17:93.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: أَوۡ يَكُونَ لَكَ بَيۡتٞ مِّن زُخۡرُفٍ أَوۡ تَرۡقَىٰ فِي اِ۬لسَّمَآءِ وَلَن نُّؤۡمِنَ لِرُقِيِّكَ حَتَّىٰ تُنزِلَ عَلَيۡنَا كِتَٰبٗا نَّقۡرَؤُهُۥۗ قُلۡ سُبۡحَانَ رَبِّي هَلۡ كُنتُ إِلَّا بَشَرٗا رَّسُولٗا
17:93.susi_ar_text: أَوۡ يَكُونَ لَكَ بَيۡتٞ مِّن زُخۡرُفٍ أَوۡ تَرۡقَىٰ فِي اِ۬لسَّمَآءِ  وَلَن نُّومِن لِّرُقِيِّكَ حَتَّىٰ تُنزِلَ عَلَيۡنَا كِتَٰبٗا نَّقۡرَؤُهُۥۗ قُلۡ  سُبۡحَانَ رَبِّي هَلۡ كُنتُ إِلَّا بَشَرٗا رَّسُولٗا

18:47.base_text: And on the day when We set the mountains in motion
18:47.duri_abu_amr_text: And on the day when the mountains are set in motion
18:47.susi_text: And on the day when the mountains are set in motion
18:47.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: وَيَوۡمَ تُسَيَّرُ اُ۬لۡجِبَالُ وَتَرَى اَ۬لۡأَرۡضَ بَارِزَةٗ وَحَشَرۡنَٰهُمۡ فَلَمۡ نُغَادِرۡ مِنۡهُمۡ أَحَدٗا
18:47.susi_ar_text: وَيَوۡمَ تُسَيَّرُ اُ۬لۡجِبَالُ وَتَر۪ي  اَ۬لۡأَرۡضَ بَارِزَةٗ وَحَشَرۡنَٰهُمۡ فَلَمۡ نُغَادِرۡ مِنۡهُمۡ أَحَدٗا

18:55.base_text: or to have the punishment come upon them in many types
18:55.duri_abu_amr_text: or to have the punishment come upon them face to face
18:55.susi_text: or to have the punishment come upon them face to face
18:55.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: وَمَا مَنَعَ اَ۬لنَّاسَ أَن يُؤۡمِنُوٓاْ إِذ جَّآءَهُمُ اُ۬لۡهُدَىٰ وَيَسۡتَغۡفِرُواْ رَبَّهُمۡ إِلَّآ أَن تَأۡتِيَهُمۡ سُنَّةُ اُ۬لۡأَوَّلِينَ أَوۡ يَأۡتِيَهُمُ اُ۬لۡعَذَابُ قِبَلٗا
18:55.susi_ar_text: وَمَا مَنَعَ اَ۬لنَّاسَ أَن يُومِنُواْ  إِذ جَّآءَهُمُ اُ۬لۡهُدَىٰ وَيَسۡتَغۡفِرُواْ رَبَّهُمۡ إِلَّا أَن تَاتِيَهُمۡ سُنَّةُ  اُ۬لۡأَوَّلِينَ أَوۡ يَاتِيَهُمُ اُ۬لۡعَذَابُ قِبَلٗا

18:59.base_text: and We set an appointment for their moment of annihilation
18:59.duri_abu_amr_text: and We set an appointment for their annihilation
18:59.susi_text: and We set an appointment for their annihilation
18:59.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: وَتِلۡكَ اَ۬لۡقُر۪يٰٓ أَهۡلَكۡنَٰهُمۡ لَمَّا ظَلَمُواْ وَجَعَلۡنَا لِمُهۡلَكِهِم مَّوۡعِدٗا
18:59.susi_ar_text: وَتِلۡكَ اَ۬لۡقُر۪يٰ أَهۡلَكۡنَٰهُمۡ لَمَّا ظَلَمُواْ وَجَعَلۡنَا  لِمُهۡلَكِهِم مَّوۡعِدٗا

18:74.base_text: He said, “Did you kill a sinless self which killed no one? Most surely, you have done something dreadful.”
18:74.duri_abu_amr_text: Did you kill an inherently sinless self . . .
18:74.susi_text: Did you kill an inherently sinless self . . .
18:74.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: فَاَنطَلَقَا حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا لَقِيَا غُلَٰمٗا فَقَتَلَهُۥ قَالَ أَقَتَلۡتَ نَفۡسٗا زَٰكِيَةَۢ بِغَيۡرِ نَفۡسٖ لَّقَد جِّئۡتَ شَيۡـٔٗا نُّكۡرٗا
18:74.susi_ar_text: فَاَنطَلَقَا حَتَّىٰ إِذَا لَقِيَا غُلَٰمٗا فَقَتَلَهُۥ  قَالَ أَقَتَلۡتَ نَفۡسٗا زَٰكِيَةَۢ بِغَيۡرِ نَفۡسٖ لَّقَد جِّيتَ شَيۡـٔٗا نُّكۡرٗا

18:77.base_text: He said, “If you wanted, you could have charged a reward for it.”
18:77.duri_abu_amr_text: He said, ‘If you had wanted, you could have taken a reward for it.’
18:77.susi_text: He said, ‘If you had wanted, you could have taken a reward for it.’
18:77.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: فَاَنطَلَقَا حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَآ أَتَيَآ أَهۡلَ قَرۡيَةٍ اِ۪سۡتَطۡعَمَآ أَهۡلَهَا فَأَبَوۡاْ أَن يُضَيِّفُوهُمَا فَوَجَدَا فِيهَا جِدَارٗا يُرِيدُ أَن يَنقَضَّ فَأَقَامَهُۥۖ قَالَ لَوۡ شِئۡتَ لَتَخِذتَّ عَلَيۡهِ أَجۡرٗا
18:77.susi_ar_text: فَاَنطَلَقَا حَتَّىٰ إِذَا أَتَيَا أَهۡلَ قَرۡيَةٍ اِ۪سۡتَطۡعَمَا أَهۡلَهَا فَأَبَوۡاْ  أَن يُضَيِّفُوهُمَا فَوَجَدَا فِيهَا جِدَارٗا يُرِيدُ أَن يَنقَضَّ فَأَقَامَهُۥۖ  قَال لَّوۡ شِيتَ لَتَخِذتَّ عَلَيۡهِ أَجۡرٗا

18:88.base_text: But as for the one who has attained faith and has acted righteously, then for him is the excellent (reward) as repayment, and we will speak to him with ease regarding our command.
18:88.duri_abu_amr_text: . . . then for him is the repayment for the excellent (deed), and we will . . .
18:88.susi_text: . . . then for him is the repayment for the excellent (deed), and we will . . .
18:88.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: ۞ وَأَمَّا مَنۡ ءَامَنَ وَعَمِلَ صَٰلِحٗا فَلَهُۥ جَزَآءُ اُ۬لۡحُسۡنۭيٰۖ وَسَنَقُولُ لَهُۥ مِنۡ أَمۡرِنَا يُسۡرٗا
18:88.susi_ar_text: ۞ وَأَمَّا مَنۡ ءَامَنَ وَعَمِلَ صَٰلِحٗا فَلَهُۥ جَزَآءُ  اُ۬لۡحُسۡنۭيٰۖ وَسَنَقُول لَّهُۥ مِنۡ أَمۡرِنَا يُسۡرٗا

18:98.base_text: He said, “This is a mercy from my Lord; but when the promise of my Lord comes true, He will turn it into a flat surface.

19:19.base_text: He said, “I am only a messenger of your Lord to grant you a pure boy.”
19:19.duri_abu_amr_text: . . . of your Lord so that He may grant you . . .
19:19.susi_text: . . . of your Lord so that He may grant you . . .
19:19.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: قَالَ إِنَّمَآ أَنَا۠ رَسُولُ رَبِّكِ لِاَ۬هَبَ لَكِ غُلَٰمٗا زَكِيّٗا
19:19.susi_ar_text: قَالَ إِنَّمَا أَنَا۠ رَسُول  رَّبِّكِ لِاَ۬هَبَ لَكِ غُلَٰمٗا زَكِيّٗا

19:24.base_text: So he called her from beneath her:
19:24.duri_abu_amr_text: So the one beneath her called her:
19:24.susi_text: So the one beneath her called her:
19:24.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: فَنَادَىٰهَا مَن تَحۡتَهَآ أَلَّا تَحۡزَنِي قَد جَّعَلَ رَبُّكِ تَحۡتَكِ سَرِيّٗا
19:24.susi_ar_text: فَنَادَىٰهَا مَن تَحۡتَهَا أَلَّا تَحۡزَنِي قَد جَّعَل رَّبُّكِ تَحۡتَكِ سَرِيّٗا

19:34.base_text: That is Jesus, son of Mary—the word of truth about which they are skeptical.
19:34.duri_abu_amr_text: . . . son of Mary; (that is) the word of truth . . .
19:34.susi_text: . . . son of Mary; (that is) the word of truth . . .
19:34.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: ذَٰلِكَ عِيسَى اَ۪بۡنُ مَرۡيَمَۖ قَوۡلُ اُ۬لۡحَقِّ اِ۬لَّذِي فِيهِ يَمۡتَرُونَ
19:34.susi_ar_text: ذَٰلِكَ عِيسَى اَ۪بۡنُ مَرۡيَمَۖ قَوۡلُ اُ۬لۡحَقِّ  اِ۬لَّذِي فِيهِ يَمۡتَرُونَ

19:51.base_text: And mention in the Scripture Moses. He was indeed a sincere, chosen one, and he was a messenger (and) a prophet.
19:51.duri_abu_amr_text: He was indeed sincere, and he was a messenger . . .
19:51.susi_text: He was indeed sincere, and he was a messenger . . .
19:51.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: وَاَذۡكُرۡ فِي اِ۬لۡكِتَٰبِ مُوسۭيٰٓۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ مُخۡلِصٗا وَكَانَ رَسُولٗا نَّبِيّٗا
19:51.susi_ar_text: وَاَذۡكُرۡ فِي اِ۬لۡكِتَٰبِ مُوسۭيٰۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ مُخۡلِصٗا وَكَانَ رَسُولٗا نَّبِيّٗا

19:60.base_text: except for whoever repented and believed and acted righteously, for those shall enter the Garden and shall not be dealt with unjustly in any way—
19:60.duri_abu_amr_text: . . . shall be entered into the Garden . . .
19:60.susi_text: . . . shall be entered into the Garden . . .
19:60.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: إِلَّا مَن تَابَ وَءَامَنَ وَعَمِلَ صَٰلِحٗا فَأُوْلَٰٓئِكَ يُدۡخَلُونَ اَ۬لۡجَنَّةَ وَلَا يُظۡلَمُونَ شَيۡـٔٗا
19:60.susi_ar_text: إِلَّا مَن تَابَ وَءَامَنَ وَعَمِلَ صَٰلِحٗا فَأُوْلَٰٓئِكَ يُدۡخَلُونَ اَ۬لۡجَنَّةَ  وَلَا يُظۡلَمُونَ شَيۡـٔٗا

20:53.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: اَ۬لَّذِي جَعَلَ لَكُمُ اُ۬لۡأَرۡضَ مِهَٰدٗا وَسَلَكَ لَكُمۡ فِيهَا سُبُلٗا وَأَنزَلَ مِنَ اَ۬لسَّمَآءِ مَآءٗ فَأَخۡرَجۡنَا بِهِۦٓ أَزۡوَٰجٗا مِّن نَّبَاتٖ شَتّۭيٰ
20:53.susi_ar_text: اَ۬لَّذِي  جَعَل لَّكُمُ اُ۬لۡأَرۡضَ مِهَٰدٗا وَسَلَكَ لَكُمۡ فِيهَا سُبُلٗا وَأَنزَلَ مِنَ  اَ۬لسَّمَآءِ مَآءٗ فَأَخۡرَجۡنَا بِهِۦ أَزۡوَٰجٗا مِّن نَّبَاتٖ شَتّۭيٰ

20:63.base_text: They said, “These two are nothing but sorcerers
20:63.duri_abu_amr_text: They said, ‘Most surely, these two are sorcerers…’
20:63.susi_text: They said, ‘Most surely, these two are sorcerers…’
20:63.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: قَالُوٓاْ إِنَّ هَٰذَۦۡنِ لَسَٰحِرَٰنِ يُرِيدَانِ أَن يُخۡرِجَاكُم مِّنۡ أَرۡضِكُم بِسِحۡرِهِمَا وَيَذۡهَبَا بِطَرِيقَتِكُمُ اُ۬لۡمُثۡلۭيٰ
20:63.susi_ar_text: قَالُواْ إِنَّ هَٰذَۦۡنِ لَسَٰحِرَٰنِ يُرِيدَانِ أَن يُخۡرِجَاكُم  مِّنۡ أَرۡضِكُم بِسِحۡرِهِمَا وَيَذۡهَبَا بِطَرِيقَتِكُمُ اُ۬لۡمُثۡلۭيٰ

20:64.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: فَاَجۡمَعُواْ كَيۡدَكُمۡ ثُمَّ اَ۪ئۡتُواْ صَفّٗاۚ وَقَدۡ أَفۡلَحَ اَ۬لۡيَوۡمَ مَنِ اِ۪سۡتَعۡلۭيٰ
20:64.susi_ar_text: فَاَجۡمَعُواْ كَيۡدَكُمۡ ثُمَّ اَ۪يتُواْ صَفّٗاۚ وَقَدۡ أَفۡلَحَ اَ۬لۡيَوۡم مَّنِ اِ۪سۡتَعۡلۭيٰ

20:80.base_text: and have made an appointment with you by the right
20:80.duri_abu_amr_text: and have promised you by the right
20:80.susi_text: and have promised you by the right
20:80.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: يَٰبَنِيٓ إِسۡرَٰٓءِيلَ قَدۡ أَنجَيۡنَٰكُم مِّنۡ عَدُوِّكُمۡ وَوَعَدۡنَٰكُمۡ جَانِبَ اَ۬لطُّورِ اِ۬لۡأَيۡمَنَ وَنَزَّلۡنَا عَلَيۡكُمُ اُ۬لۡمَنَّ وَاَلسَّلۡوۭيٰ
20:80.susi_ar_text: يَٰبَنِي إِسۡرَٰٓءِيلَ قَدۡ أَنجَيۡنَٰكُم مِّنۡ عَدُوِّكُمۡ وَوَعَدۡنَٰكُمۡ  جَانِبَ اَ۬لطُّورِ اِ۬لۡأَيۡمَنَ وَنَزَّلۡنَا عَلَيۡكُمُ اُ۬لۡمَنَّ وَاَلسَّلۡوۭيٰ

20:87.base_text: but we were made to carry burdens
20:87.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: قَالُواْ مَآ أَخۡلَفۡنَا مَوۡعِدَكَ بِمِلۡكِنَا وَلَٰكِنَّا حَمَلۡنَآ أَوۡزَارٗا مِّن زِينَةِ اِ۬لۡقَوۡمِ فَقَذَفۡنَٰهَا فَكَذَٰلِكَ أَلۡقَى اَ۬لسَّامِرِيُّ
20:87.susi_ar_text: قَالُواْ مَا أَخۡلَفۡنَا مَوۡعِدَكَ بِمِلۡكِنَا وَلَٰكِنَّا حَمَلۡنَا  أَوۡزَارٗا مِّن زِينَةِ اِ۬لۡقَوۡمِ فَقَذَفۡنَٰهَا فَكَذَٰلِكَ أَلۡقَى اَ۬لسَّامِرِيُّ

20:97.base_text: that you will not be allowed to break.
20:97.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: ۞ قَالَ فَاَذۡهَب فَّإِنَّ لَكَ فِي اِ۬لۡحَيَوٰةِ أَن تَقُولَ لَا مِسَاسَۖ وَإِنَّ لَكَ مَوۡعِدٗا لَّن تُخۡلِفَهُۥۖ وَاَنظُرۡ إِلَىٰٓ إِلَٰهِكَ اَ۬لَّذِي ظَلۡتَ عَلَيۡهِ عَاكِفٗاۖ لَّنُحَرِّقَنَّهُۥ ثُمَّ لَنَنسِفَنَّهُۥ فِي اِ۬لۡيَمِّ نَسۡفًا
20:97.susi_ar_text: ۞ قَالَ  فَاَذۡهَب فَّإِنَّ لَكَ فِي اِ۬لۡحَيَوٰةِ أَن تَقُول لَّا مِسَاسَۖ وَإِنَّ لَكَ  مَوۡعِدٗا لَّن تُخۡلِفَهُۥۖ وَاَنظُرۡ إِلَىٰ إِلَٰهِكَ اَ۬لَّذِي ظَلۡتَ عَلَيۡهِ  عَاكِفٗاۖ لَّنُحَرِّقَنَّهُۥ ثُمَّ لَنَنسِفَنَّهُۥ فِي اِ۬لۡيَمِّ نَسۡفًا

20:102.base_text: the day when the Trumpet is blown!
20:102.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: يَوۡمَ نَنفُخُ فِي اِ۬لصُّورِۚ وَنَحۡشُرُ اُ۬لۡمُجۡرِمِينَ يَوۡمَئِذٖ زُرۡقٗا
20:102.susi_ar_text: يَوۡمَ نَنفُخُ  فِي اِ۬لصُّورِۚ وَنَحۡشُرُ اُ۬لۡمُجۡرِمِينَ يَوۡمَئِذٖ زُرۡقٗا

21:4.base_text: He said, “My Lord knows what is said
21:4.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: قُل رَّبِّي يَعۡلَمُ اُ۬لۡقَوۡلَ فِي اِ۬لسَّمَآءِ وَاَلۡأَرۡضِۖ وَهۡوَ اَ۬لسَّمِيعُ اُ۬لۡعَلِيمُ
21:4.susi_ar_text: قُل رَّبِّي يَعۡلَمُ اُ۬لۡقَوۡلَ فِي اِ۬لسَّمَآءِ وَاَلۡأَرۡضِۖ  وَهۡوَ اَ۬لسَّمِيعُ اُ۬لۡعَلِيمُ

21:7.base_text: men to whom We reveal, so ask
21:7.duri_abu_amr_text: to whom it is revealed, so ask
21:7.susi_text: to whom it is revealed, so ask
21:7.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: وَمَآ أَرۡسَلۡنَا قَبۡلَكَ إِلَّا رِجَالٗا يُوحَىٰٓ إِلَيۡهِمۡۖ فَسۡـَٔلُوٓاْ أَهۡلَ اَ۬لذِّكۡرِ إِن كُنتُمۡ لَا تَعۡلَمُونَ
21:7.susi_ar_text: وَمَا أَرۡسَلۡنَا قَبۡلَكَ إِلَّا رِجَالٗا يُوحَىٰ إِلَيۡهِمۡۖ فَسۡـَٔلُواْ أَهۡلَ  اَ۬لذِّكۡرِ إِن كُنتُمۡ لَا تَعۡلَمُونَ

21:25.base_text: but We reveal to him that:
21:25.duri_abu_amr_text: but it is revealed to him
21:25.susi_text: but it is revealed to him
21:25.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: وَمَآ أَرۡسَلۡنَا مِن قَبۡلِكَ مِن رَّسُولٍ إِلَّا يُوحَىٰٓ إِلَيۡهِ أَنَّهُۥ لَآ إِلَٰهَ إِلَّآ أَنَا۠ فَاَعۡبُدُونِ
21:25.susi_ar_text: وَمَا أَرۡسَلۡنَا مِن قَبۡلِكَ مِن رَّسُولٍ إِلَّا يُوحَىٰ إِلَيۡهِ أَنَّهُۥ لَا إِلَٰهَ  إِلَّا أَنَا۠ فَاَعۡبُدُونِ

21:80.base_text: so that they may secured you
21:80.duri_abu_amr_text: so that He may secure you
21:80.susi_text: so that He may secure you
21:80.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: وَعَلَّمۡنَٰهُ صَنۡعَةَ لَبُوسٖ لَّكُمۡ لِيُحۡصِنَكُم مِّنۢ بَأۡسِكُمۡۖ فَهَلۡ أَنتُمۡ شَٰكِرُونَ
21:80.susi_ar_text: وَعَلَّمۡنَٰهُ صَنۡعَةَ لَبُوسٖ لَّكُمۡ لِيُحۡصِنَكُم مِّنۢ بَاسِكُمۡۖ  فَهَلۡ أَنتُمۡ شَٰكِرُونَ

21:104.base_text: On the day when We fold the heaven as the scribe rolls up scriptures. Just as We began the first creation, We restore it—a promise from Us. We will indeed act.
21:104.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: يَوۡمَ نَطۡوِي اِ۬لسَّمَآءَ كَطَيِّ اِ۬لسِّجِلِّ لِلۡكِتَٰبِۚ كَمَا بَدَأۡنَآ أَوَّلَ خَلۡقٖ نُّعِيدُهُۥۚ وَعۡدًا عَلَيۡنَآۚ إِنَّا كُنَّا فَٰعِلِينَ
21:104.susi_ar_text: يَوۡمَ نَطۡوِي اِ۬لسَّمَآءَ كَطَيِّ اِ۬لسِّجِلِّ لِلۡكِتَٰبِۚ كَمَا  بَدَانَا أَوَّلَ خَلۡقٖ نُّعِيدُهُۥۚ وَعۡدًا عَلَيۡنَاۚ إِنَّا كُنَّا  فَٰعِلِينَ

21:112.base_text: He said, “My Lord, judge with justice.” “For our Lord is the All-Merciful, Whose help is sought against what you allege.”
21:112.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: قُل رَّبِّ اِ۟حۡكُم بِالۡحَقِّۗ وَرَبُّنَا اَ۬لرَّحۡمَٰنُ اُ۬لۡمُسۡتَعَانُ عَلَىٰ مَا تَصِفُونَ
21:112.susi_ar_text: قُل رَّبِّ اِ۟حۡكُم  بِالۡحَقِّۗ وَرَبُّنَا اَ۬لرَّحۡمَٰنُ اُ۬لۡمُسۡتَعَانُ عَلَىٰ مَا تَصِفُونَ

22:9.base_text: turning aside in contempt, to make (others) stray from the way of Allah; for him in the Earlier (Life) is disgrace, and on the Day of Resurrection We make him taste the punishment of burning:
22:9.duri_abu_amr_text: . . . to stray from the way of Allah . . .
22:9.susi_text: . . . to stray from the way of Allah . . .
22:9.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: ثَانِيَ عِطۡفِهِۦ لِيَضِلَّ عَن سَبِيلِ اِ۬للَّهِۖ لَهُۥ فِي اِ۬لدُّنۡيۭا خِزۡيٞۖ وَنُذِيقُهُۥ يَوۡمَ اَ۬لۡقِيَٰمَةِ عَذَابَ اَ۬لۡحَرِيقِ
22:9.susi_ar_text: ثَانِيَ عِطۡفِهِۦ لِيَضِلَّ عَن سَبِيلِ اِ۬للَّهِۖ لَهُۥ فِي  اِ۬لدُّنۡيۭا خِزۡيٞۖ وَنُذِيقُهُۥ يَوۡمَ اَ۬لۡقِيَٰمَةِ عَذَابَ اَ۬لۡحَرِيقِ

22:23.base_text: Indeed, Allah enters those who have attained faith and have done righteous deeds into Gardens beneath which rivers flow, wherein they are decorated with bracelets of gold and (with) pearls, and their garments therein are of silk.
22:23.duri_abu_amr_text: . . . with bracelets of gold and (of) pearls . . .
22:23.susi_text: . . . with bracelets of gold and (of) pearls . . .
22:23.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: إِنَّ اَ۬للَّهَ يُدۡخِلُ اُ۬لَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَعَمِلُواْ اُ۬لصَّٰلِحَٰتِ جَنَّٰتٖ تَجۡرِي مِن تَحۡتِهَا اَ۬لۡأَنۡهَٰرُ يُحَلَّوۡنَ فِيهَا مِنۡ أَسَاوِرَ مِن ذَهَبٖ وَلُؤۡلُوٕٖاْۖ وَلِبَاسُهُمۡ فِيهَا حَرِيرٞ
22:23.susi_ar_text: إِنَّ اَ۬للَّهَ يُدۡخِلُ اُ۬لَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَعَمِلُواْ اُ۬لصَّٰلِحَٰت  جَّنَّٰتٖ تَجۡرِي مِن تَحۡتِهَا اَ۬لۡأَنۡهَٰرُ يُحَلَّوۡنَ فِيهَا مِنۡ  أَسَاوِرَ مِن ذَهَبٖ وَلُولُوٕٖاْۖ وَلِبَاسُهُمۡ فِيهَا حَرِيرٞ

22:25.base_text: Indeed, those who have denied and bar (others) from the way of Allah and from the Inviolable Mosque, which We have designated for all mankind equally, (including) the one who consecrates himself therein and the visitor. And whoever wants any blasphemy unjustly therein—We will make him taste of a painful punishment.
22:25.duri_abu_amr_text: . . . which We have designated for all mankind, equally for the one who consecrates himself therein and the visitor.
22:25.susi_text: . . . which We have designated for all mankind, equally for the one who consecrates himself therein and the visitor.
22:25.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: إِنَّ اَ۬لَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ وَيَصُدُّونَ عَن سَبِيلِ اِ۬للَّهِ وَاَلۡمَسۡجِدِ اِ۬لۡحَرَامِ اِ۬لَّذِي جَعَلۡنَٰهُ لِلنّ۪اسِ سَوَآءٌ اِ۬لۡعَٰكِفُ فِيهِ وَاَلۡبَادِۦۚ وَمَن يُرِدۡ فِيهِ بِإِلۡحَادِۢ بِظُلۡمٖ نُّذِقۡهُ مِنۡ عَذَابٍ أَلِيمٖ
22:25.susi_ar_text: إِنَّ اَ۬لَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ وَيَصُدُّونَ عَن سَبِيلِ اِ۬للَّهِ وَاَلۡمَسۡجِدِ  اِ۬لۡحَرَامِ اِ۬لَّذِي جَعَلۡنَٰهُ لِلنَّاس سَّوَآءٌ اِ۬لۡعَٰكِف فِّيهِ وَاَلۡبَادِۦۚ  وَمَن يُرِدۡ فِيهِ بِإِلۡحَادِۢ بِظُلۡمٖ نُّذِقۡهُ مِنۡ عَذَابٍ أَلِيمٖ

22:38.base_text: Indeed, Allah defends those who have attained faith. Indeed, Allah does not love every treacherous staunch denier.
22:38.duri_abu_amr_text: Indeed, Allah repels (harm) from those who . . .
22:38.susi_text: Indeed, Allah repels (harm) from those who . . .
22:38.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: ۞ إِنَّ اَ۬للَّهَ يَدۡفَعُ عَنِ اِ۬لَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓاْۗ إِنَّ اَ۬للَّهَ لَا يُحِبُّ كُلَّ خَوَّانٖ كَفُورٍ
22:38.susi_ar_text: ۞ إِنَّ اَ۬للَّهَ يَدۡفَع  عَّنِ اِ۬لَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْۗ إِنَّ اَ۬للَّهَ لَا يُحِبُّ كُلَّ خَوَّانٖ كَفُورٍ

22:39.base_text: Permission has been granted to those who are combated, because they have been dealt with unjustly—and most surely Allah is Able to give them support:
22:39.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: أُذِنَ لِلَّذِينَ يُقَٰتِلُونَ بِأَنَّهُمۡ ظُلِمُواْۚ وَإِنَّ اَ۬للَّهَ عَلَىٰ نَصۡرِهِمۡ لَقَدِيرٌ
22:39.susi_ar_text: أُذِن لِّلَّذِينَ يُقَٰتِلُونَ بِأَنَّهُمۡ ظُلِمُواْۚ وَإِنَّ اَ۬للَّهَ عَلَىٰ نَصۡرِهِمۡ  لَقَدِيرٌ

22:45.base_text: So how many a town have We annihilated while it was unjust, so that it lies devastated upon its trellises, with an abandoned well and a lofty mansion?
22:45.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: فَكَأَيِّن مِّن قَرۡيَةٍ أَهۡلَكۡتُهَا وَهۡيَ ظَالِمَةٞ فَهۡيَ خَاوِيَةٌ عَلَىٰ عُرُوشِهَا وَبِئۡرٖ مُّعَطَّلَةٖ وَقَصۡرٖ مَّشِيدٍ
22:45.susi_ar_text: فَكَأَيِّن مِّن قَرۡيَةٍ  أَهۡلَكۡتُهَا وَهۡيَ ظَالِمَةٞ فَهۡيَ خَاوِيَةٌ عَلَىٰ عُرُوشِهَا وَبِيرٖ  مُّعَطَّلَةٖ وَقَصۡرٖ مَّشِيدٍ

22:51.base_text: But those who strove against Our signs attempting to challenge (the believers) —those are the fellows of purgatory.
22:51.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: وَاَلَّذِينَ سَعَوۡاْ فِيٓ ءَايَٰتِنَا مُعَجِّزِينَ أُوْلَٰٓئِكَ أَصۡحَٰبُ اُ۬لۡجَحِيمِ
22:51.susi_ar_text: وَاَلَّذِينَ سَعَوۡاْ فِي ءَايَٰتِنَا مُعَجِّزِينَ أُوْلَٰٓئِكَ أَصۡحَٰبُ  اُ۬لۡجَحِيمِ

22:71.base_text: Yet they worship, apart from Allah, things for which He sent down no authority and what they have no knowledge of. And for the unjust there is no supporter.
22:71.duri_abu_amr_text: . . . things for which He bestowed no authority from on high . . .
22:71.susi_text: . . . things for which He bestowed no authority from on high . . .
22:71.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: ۞ وَيَعۡبُدُونَ مِن دُونِ اِ۬للَّهِ مَا لَمۡ يُنزِلۡ بِهِۦ سُلۡطَٰنٗا وَمَا لَيۡسَ لَهُم بِهِۦ عِلۡمٞۗ وَمَا لِلظَّٰلِمِينَ مِن نَّصِيرٖ
22:71.susi_ar_text: ۞ وَيَعۡبُدُونَ  مِن دُونِ اِ۬للَّهِ مَا لَمۡ يُنزِلۡ بِهِۦ سُلۡطَٰنٗا وَمَا لَيۡسَ لَهُم بِهِۦ  عِلۡمٞۗ وَمَا لِلظَّٰلِمِينَ مِن نَّصِيرٖ

23:27.base_text: So We revealed to him: “Build the ship under Our eyes and according to Our revelation. And when Our command comes and the oven overflows, carry in it of each kind, a (male and female) couple, and your family except those of them against whom the word has already been pronounced. And do not speak to me concerning those who have done injustice; they will surely be drowned.”
23:27.duri_abu_amr_text: ‘…of each (male and female) kind, one couple…’
23:27.susi_text: ‘…of each (male and female) kind, one couple…’
23:27.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: فَأَوۡحَيۡنَآ إِلَيۡهِ أَنِ اِ۪صۡنَعِ اِ۬لۡفُلۡكَ بِأَعۡيُنِنَا وَوَحۡيِنَا فَإِذَا جَآ أَمۡرُنَا وَفَارَ اَ۬لتَّنُّورُ فَاَسۡلُكۡ فِيهَا مِن كُلِّ زَوۡجَيۡنِ اِ۪ثۡنَيۡنِ وَأَهۡلَكَ إِلَّا مَن سَبَقَ عَلَيۡهِ اِ۬لۡقَوۡلُ مِنۡهُمۡۖ وَلَا تُخَٰطِبۡنِي فِي اِ۬لَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوٓاْۖ إِنَّهُم مُّغۡرَقُونَ
23:27.susi_ar_text: فَأَوۡحَيۡنَا إِلَيۡهِ أَنِ اِ۪صۡنَعِ  اِ۬لۡفُلۡكَ بِأَعۡيُنِنَا وَوَحۡيِنَا فَإِذَا جَا أَمۡرُنَا وَفَارَ اَ۬لتَّنُّورُ فَاَسۡلُكۡ  فِيهَا مِن كُلِّ زَوۡجَيۡنِ اِ۪ثۡنَيۡنِ وَأَهۡلَكَ إِلَّا مَن سَبَقَ عَلَيۡهِ  اِ۬لۡقَوۡلُ مِنۡهُمۡۖ وَلَا تُخَٰطِبۡنِي فِي اِ۬لَّذِينَ ظَلَمُواْ إِنَّهُم مُّغۡرَقُونَ

23:51-52.base_text: “O messengers, eat of the good foods and do righteousness; indeed, I am All-Knowing of what you do. For indeed, this community of yours is one community and I am your Lord, so be mindful of Me.”
23:51-52.duri_abu_amr_text: “O messengers, eat of the good foods and do righteousness; indeed, I am All-Knowing of what you do. And (know) that this community of yours is one community and I am your Lord, so be mindful of Me.”
23:51-52.susi_text: “O messengers, eat of the good foods and do righteousness; indeed, I am All-Knowing of what you do. And (know) that this community of yours is one community and I am your Lord, so be mindful of Me.”

23:85.base_text: They will say, “To Allah.” Say, “Will you never remember?”
23:85.duri_abu_amr_text: They will say, “To Allah.” Say, ‘Will you not constantly remember?’
23:85.susi_text: They will say, “To Allah.” Say, ‘Will you not constantly remember?’

23:87.base_text: They will say, “To Allah.” Say, “Will you never be mindful (of God)?”
23:87.duri_abu_amr_text: They will say, ‘Allah.’ Say, “Will you never be mindful (of God)?”
23:87.susi_text: They will say, ‘Allah.’ Say, “Will you never be mindful (of God)?”

23:89.base_text: They will say, “To Allah.” Say, “Then are you bewitched?”
23:89.duri_abu_amr_text: They will say, ‘Allah.’ Say, “Then are you bewitched?”
23:89.susi_text: They will say, ‘Allah.’ Say, “Then are you bewitched?”

24:1.base_text: A surah that We have sent down and ordained and sent down in it evident signs, that you may remind yourselves.
24:1.duri_abu_amr_text: A surah that We have sent down and did ordain and sent down in it evident signs, that you may constantly remember.
24:1.susi_text: A surah that We have sent down and did ordain and sent down in it evident signs, that you may constantly remember.
24:1.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: سُورَةٌ أَنزَلۡنَٰهَا وَفَرَّضۡنَٰهَا وَأَنزَلۡنَا فِيهَآ ءَايَٰتِۢ بَيِّنَٰتٖ لَّعَلَّكُمۡ تَذَّكَّرُونَ
24:1.susi_ar_text: سُورَةٌ أَنزَلۡنَٰهَا وَفَرَّضۡنَٰهَا وَأَنزَلۡنَا فِيهَا ءَايَٰتِۢ بَيِّنَٰتٖ لَّعَلَّكُمۡ تَذَّكَّرُونَ

24:6.base_text: And those who accuse their own spouses but have no witnesses except themselves, then let the testimony of one of them be four oaths by Allah that he is surely of the truthful.
24:6.duri_abu_amr_text: And those who accuse their own spouses but have no witnesses except themselves, then the testimony of one of them (is binding)—four oaths by Allah that he is surely of the truthful.
24:6.susi_text: And those who accuse their own spouses but have no witnesses except themselves, then the testimony of one of them (is binding)—four oaths by Allah that he is surely of the truthful.
24:6.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: وَاَلَّذِينَ يَرۡمُونَ أَزۡوَٰجَهُمۡ وَلَمۡ يَكُن لَّهُمۡ شُهَدَآءُ اِ۪لَّآ أَنفُسُهُمۡ فَشَهَٰدَةُ أَحَدِهِمۡ أَرۡبَعَ شَهَٰدَٰتِۢ بِاللَّهِ إِنَّهُۥ لَمِنَ اَ۬لصَّٰدِقِينَ
24:6.susi_ar_text: وَاَلَّذِينَ  يَرۡمُونَ أَزۡوَٰجَهُمۡ وَلَمۡ يَكُن لَّهُمۡ شُهَدَآءُ اِ۪لَّا أَنفُسُهُمۡ فَشَهَٰدَةُ أَحَدِهِمۡ أَرۡبَعَ  شَهَٰدَٰتِۢ بِاللَّهِ إِنَّهُۥ لَمِنَ اَ۬لصَّٰدِقِينَ

24:9.base_text: while the fifth is: may Allah’s wrath indeed be upon her if he is of the truthful.
24:9.duri_abu_amr_text: And the fifth is: may Allah’s wrath indeed be upon her if he is of the truthful.
24:9.susi_text: And the fifth is: may Allah’s wrath indeed be upon her if he is of the truthful.
24:9.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: وَاَلۡخَٰمِسَةُ أَنَّ غَضَبَ اَ۬للَّهِ عَلَيۡهَآ إِن كَانَ مِنَ اَ۬لصَّٰدِقِينَ
24:9.susi_ar_text: وَاَلۡخَٰمِسَةُ أَنَّ غَضَبَ اَ۬للَّهِ عَلَيۡهَا إِن كَانَ مِنَ  اَ۬لصَّٰدِقِينَ

24:34.base_text: And We have most surely sent down to you clarifying signs and a parable from those who passed on before you, and an admonition for the ones who were mindful (of God).
24:34.duri_abu_amr_text: And We have most surely sent down to you clarified signs and a parable from those who passed on before you, and an admonition for the ones who were mindful (of God).
24:34.susi_text: And We have most surely sent down to you clarified signs and a parable from those who passed on before you, and an admonition for the ones who were mindful (of God).
24:34.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: وَلَقَدۡ أَنزَلۡنَآ إِلَيۡكُمۡ ءَايَٰتٖ مُّبَيَّنَٰتٖ وَمَثَلٗا مِّنَ اَ۬لَّذِينَ خَلَوۡاْ مِن قَبۡلِكُمۡ وَمَوۡعِظَةٗ لِّلۡمُتَّقِينَ
24:34.susi_ar_text: وَلَقَدۡ أَنزَلۡنَا إِلَيۡكُمۡ ءَايَٰتٖ مُّبَيَّنَٰتٖ وَمَثَلٗا مِّنَ اَ۬لَّذِينَ خَلَوۡاْ  مِن قَبۡلِكُمۡ وَمَوۡعِظَةٗ لِّلۡمُتَّقِينَ

24:43.base_text: Have you not seen how Allah propels clouds, then brings them together, then piles them up in heaps so you see rainfall coming out of its midst? And He sends down from the sky—from mountains in it—some hail, striking with it whomever He wills and diverting it from whomever He wills? The flash of its lightening almost does away with the sight(s).
24:43.duri_abu_amr_text: Have you not seen how Allah propels clouds, then brings them together, then piles them up in heaps so you see rainfall coming out of its midst? And He bestows from on high, from the sky—from mountains in it—some hail, striking with it whomever He wills and diverting it from whomever He wills? The flash of its lightening almost does away with the sight(s).
24:43.susi_text: Have you not seen how Allah propels clouds, then brings them together, then piles them up in heaps so you see rainfall coming out of its midst? And He bestows from on high, from the sky—from mountains in it—some hail, striking with it whomever He wills and diverting it from whomever He wills? The flash of its lightening almost does away with the sight(s).
24:43.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: ۞ أَلَمۡ تَرَ أَنَّ اَ۬للَّهَ يُزۡجِي سَحَابٗا ثُمَّ يُؤَلِّفُ بَيۡنَهُۥ ثُمَّ يَجۡعَلُهُۥ رُكَامٗا فَتَرَى اَ۬لۡوَدۡقَ يَخۡرُجُ مِنۡ خِلَٰلِهِۦ وَيُنزِلُ مِنَ اَ۬لسَّمَآءِ مِن جِبَالٖ فِيهَا مِنۢ بَرَدٖ فَيُصِيبُ بِهِۦ مَن يَشَآءُ وَيَصۡرِفُهُۥ عَن مَّن يَشَآءُۖ يَكَادُ سَنَا بَرۡقِهِۦ يَذۡهَبُ بِالۡأَبۡصٰ۪رِۚ  يُقَلِّبُ اُ۬للَّهُ اُ۬لَّيۡلَ وَاَلنَّهَارَۚ إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَعِبۡرَةٗ لِّأُوْلِي اِ۬لۡأَبۡصٰ۪رِ
24:43.susi_ar_text: ۞ أَلَمۡ تَرَ أَنَّ اَ۬للَّهَ يُزۡجِي  سَحَابٗا ثُمَّ يُؤَلِّفُ بَيۡنَهُۥ ثُمَّ يَجۡعَلُهُۥ رُكَامٗا فَتَر۪ي اَ۬لۡوَدۡقَ يَخۡرُجُ مِنۡ  خِلَٰلِهِۦ وَيُنزِلُ مِنَ اَ۬لسَّمَآءِ مِن جِبَالٖ فِيهَا مِنۢ بَرَدٖ فَيُصِيب بِّهِۦ مَن يَشَآءُ  وَيَصۡرِفُهُۥ عَن مَّن يَشَآءُۖ يَكَاد سَّنَا بَرۡقِهِۦ يَذۡهَب بِّالۡأَبۡصٰ۪رِۚ   يُقَلِّبُ اُ۬للَّهُ اُ۬لَّيۡلَ وَاَلنَّهَارَۚ إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَعِبۡرَةٗ لِّأُوْلِي اِ۬لۡأَبۡصٰ۪رِ

24:46.base_text: Most surely, We have sent down clarifying signs, and Allah guides whomever He wills to a straight path.
24:46.duri_abu_amr_text: Most surely, We have sent down clarified signs, and Allah guides whomever He wills to a straight path.
24:46.susi_text: Most surely, We have sent down clarified signs, and Allah guides whomever He wills to a straight path.
24:46.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: لَّقَدۡ أَنزَلۡنَآ ءَايَٰتٖ مُّبَيَّنَٰتٖۚ وَاَللَّهُ يَهۡدِي مَن يَشَآءُ اِ۪لَىٰ صِرَٰطٖ مُّسۡتَقِيمٖ
24:46.susi_ar_text: لَّقَدۡ أَنزَلۡنَا ءَايَٰتٖ مُّبَيَّنَٰتٖۚ  وَاَللَّهُ يَهۡدِي مَن يَشَآءُ اِ۪لَىٰ صِرَٰطٖ مُّسۡتَقِيمٖ

24:58.base_text: O you who have attained faith, let those whom you rightfully possess and those of you who have not reached puberty seek your permission (before entering) on three occasions: before the dawn prayer and at noon when you lay aside your clothes and after the evening prayer—three occasions of privacy for you. At other times, neither you nor they commit sin by intermingling with one another; Allah thus clarifies the signs for you. For Allah is All-Knowing, All-Wise.
24:58.duri_abu_amr_text: O you who have attained faith, let those whom you rightfully possess and those of you who have not reached puberty seek your permission (before entering). Three occasions: before the dawn prayer and at noon when you lay aside your clothes and after the evening prayer—three occasions of privacy for you. At other times, neither you nor they commit sin by intermingling with one another; Allah thus clarifies the signs for you. For Allah is All-Knowing, All-Wise.
24:58.susi_text: O you who have attained faith, let those whom you rightfully possess and those of you who have not reached puberty seek your permission (before entering). Three occasions: before the dawn prayer and at noon when you lay aside your clothes and after the evening prayer—three occasions of privacy for you. At other times, neither you nor they commit sin by intermingling with one another; Allah thus clarifies the signs for you. For Allah is All-Knowing, All-Wise.

25:17.base_text: And on the day when He herds them and what they worship apart from Allah, then He says, “Was it you pl who misguided these servants of Mine, or was it they who strayed from the way?”
25:17.duri_abu_amr_text: And on the day when We herd them and what they worship apart from Allah, then He says, “Was it you pl who misguided these servants of Mine, or was it they who strayed from the way?”
25:17.susi_text: And on the day when We herd them and what they worship apart from Allah, then He says, “Was it you pl who misguided these servants of Mine, or was it they who strayed from the way?”
25:17.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: وَيَوۡمَ نَحۡشُرُهُمۡ وَمَا يَعۡبُدُونَ مِن دُونِ اِ۬للَّهِ فَيَقُولُ ءَٰا۬نتُمۡ أَضۡلَلۡتُمۡ عِبَادِي هَٰٓؤُلَآءِ اَ۬مۡ هُمۡ ضَلُّواْ اُ۬لسَّبِيلَ
25:17.susi_ar_text: وَيَوۡمَ نَحۡشُرُهُمۡ وَمَا  يَعۡبُدُونَ مِن دُونِ اِ۬للَّهِ فَيَقُولُ ءَٰا۬نتُمۡ أَضۡلَلۡتُمۡ عِبَادِي  هَٰؤُلَآءِ اَ۬مۡ هُمۡ ضَلُّواْ اُ۬لسَّبِيلَ

25:19.base_text: Thus they have certainly disbelieved youpl regarding what you say, so you can neither avoid (punishment) nor get any support. And whoever of you commits injustice, We will make him taste a supreme punishment.
25:19.duri_abu_amr_text: Thus they have certainly disbelieved youpl regarding what you say, so they can neither avoid (punishment) nor get any support. And whoever of you commits injustice, We will make him taste a supreme punishment.
25:19.susi_text: Thus they have certainly disbelieved youpl regarding what you say, so they can neither avoid (punishment) nor get any support. And whoever of you commits injustice, We will make him taste a supreme punishment.
25:19.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: فَقَدۡ كَذَّبُوكُم بِمَا تَقُولُونَ فَمَا يَسۡتَطِيعُونَ صَرۡفٗا وَلَا نَصۡرٗاۚ وَمَن يَظۡلِم مِّنكُمۡ نُذِقۡهُ عَذَابٗا كَبِيرٗا
25:19.susi_ar_text: فَقَدۡ كَذَّبُوكُم بِمَا تَقُولُونَ فَمَا يَسۡتَطِيعُونَ صَرۡفٗا  وَلَا نَصۡرٗاۚ وَمَن يَظۡلِم مِّنكُمۡ نُذِقۡهُ عَذَابٗا كَبِيرٗا

25:48.base_text: And it is He Who sent the winds as heralds of glad tidings ahead of His mercy. And We sent down from the sky pure water
25:48.duri_abu_amr_text: And it is He Who sent the winds as a revival ahead of His mercy. And We sent down from the sky pure water
25:48.susi_text: And it is He Who sent the winds as a revival ahead of His mercy. And We sent down from the sky pure water
25:48.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: وَهۡوَ اَ۬لَّذِيٓ أَرۡسَلَ اَ۬لرِّيَٰحَ نُشُرَۢا بَيۡنَ يَدَيۡ رَحۡمَتِهِۦۚ وَأَنزَلۡنَا مِنَ اَ۬لسَّمَآءِ مَآءٗ طَهُورٗا
25:48.susi_ar_text: وَهۡوَ  اَ۬لَّذِي أَرۡسَلَ اَ۬لرِّيَٰحَ نُشُرَۢا بَيۡنَ يَدَيۡ رَحۡمَتِهِۦۚ وَأَنزَلۡنَا مِنَ  اَ۬لسَّمَآءِ مَآءٗ طَهُورٗا

25:74.base_text: And they are those who say, “Our Lord, grant us in our spouses and our offspring(s) a comfort to the eyes, and make us a good example of the ones who were mindful (of God).”
25:74.duri_abu_amr_text: And they are those who say, “Our Lord, grant us in our spouses and our offspring a comfort to the eyes, and make us a good example of the ones who were mindful (of God).”
25:74.susi_text: And they are those who say, “Our Lord, grant us in our spouses and our offspring a comfort to the eyes, and make us a good example of the ones who were mindful (of God).”
25:74.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: وَاَلَّذِينَ يَقُولُونَ رَبَّنَا هَبۡ لَنَا مِنۡ أَزۡوَٰجِنَا وَذُرِّيَّتِنَا قُرَّةَ أَعۡيُنٖ وَاَجۡعَلۡنَا لِلۡمُتَّقِينَ إِمَامًا
25:74.susi_ar_text: وَاَلَّذِينَ يَقُولُونَ رَبَّنَا هَبۡ لَنَا  مِنۡ أَزۡوَٰجِنَا وَذُرِّيَّتِنَا قُرَّةَ أَعۡيُنٖ وَاَجۡعَلۡنَا لِلۡمُتَّقِينَ  إِمَامًا

26:4.base_text: If We will, We can bestow upon them a sign from heaven, at which their necks would stay bent in humility.
26:4.duri_abu_amr_text: If We will, We can send down upon them a sign from heaven, at which their necks would stay bent in humility.
26:4.susi_text: If We will, We can send down upon them a sign from heaven, at which their necks would stay bent in humility.
26:4.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: إِن نَّشَأۡ نُنزِلۡ عَلَيۡهِم مِّنَ اَ۬لسَّمَآءِ اَ۬يَةٗ فَظَلَّتۡ أَعۡنَٰقُهُمۡ لَهَا خَٰضِعِينَ
26:4.susi_ar_text: إِن نَّشَأۡ نُنزِلۡ عَلَيۡهِم مِّنَ اَ۬لسَّمَآءِ اَ۬يَةٗ فَظَلَّتۡ  أَعۡنَٰقُهُمۡ لَهَا خَٰضِعِينَ

26:56.duri_abu_amr_text: But indeed, we are constantly cautious.
26:56.susi_text: But indeed, we are constantly cautious.

26:137.base_text: This is nothing but the character of the ancients,
26:137.duri_abu_amr_text: This is nothing but the creation of the ancients,
26:137.susi_text: This is nothing but the creation of the ancients,

26:149.base_text: And you carve houses in the mountains, with skill?
26:149.duri_abu_amr_text: And you carve houses in the mountains, with great skill?
26:149.susi_text: And you carve houses in the mountains, with great skill?

26:187.base_text: So make pieces from heaven fall on us, if you are of the truthful.
26:187.duri_abu_amr_text: So make fragments from heaven fall on us, if you are of the truthful.
26:187.susi_text: So make fragments from heaven fall on us, if you are of the truthful.
26:187.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: فَأَسۡقِطۡ عَلَيۡنَا كِسۡفٗا مِّنَ اَ۬لسَّمَآ إِن كُنتَ مِنَ اَ۬لصَّٰدِقِينَ
26:187.susi_ar_text: فَأَسۡقِطۡ عَلَيۡنَا كِسۡفٗا مِّنَ اَ۬لسَّمَا إِن كُنتَ  مِنَ اَ۬لصَّٰدِقِينَ

27:7.base_text: I will bring you some news from it, or bring you a firebrand, a borrowed flame, that you may warm yourselves.
27:7.duri_abu_amr_text: I will bring you some news from it, or bring you a firebrand of a borrowed flame, that you may warm yourselves.
27:7.susi_text: I will bring you some news from it, or bring you a firebrand of a borrowed flame, that you may warm yourselves.
27:7.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: إِذۡ قَالَ مُوسۭيٰ لِأَهۡلِهِۦٓ إِنِّيَ ءَانَسۡتُ نَارٗا سَـَٔاتِيكُم مِّنۡهَا بِخَبَرٍ أَوۡ ءَاتِيكُم بِشِهَابِ قَبَسٖ لَّعَلَّكُمۡ تَصۡطَلُونَ
27:7.susi_ar_text: إِذۡ قَالَ  مُوسۭيٰ لِأَهۡلِهِۦ إِنِّيَ ءَانَسۡتُ نَارٗا سَـَٔاتِيكُم مِّنۡهَا بِخَبَرٍ أَوۡ ءَاتِيكُم بِشِهَابِ قَبَسٖ  لَّعَلَّكُمۡ تَصۡطَلُونَ

27:25.base_text: that they do not prostrate themselves to Allah, Who brings out what is hidden in the heavens and the earth, and knows whatever you hide and whatever you make public.
27:25.duri_abu_amr_text: that they do not prostrate themselves to Allah, Who brings out what is hidden in the heavens and the earth, and knows whatever they hide and whatever they make public.
27:25.susi_text: that they do not prostrate themselves to Allah, Who brings out what is hidden in the heavens and the earth, and knows whatever they hide and whatever they make public.
27:25.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: أَلَّاۤ يَسۡجُدُواْۤ لِلَّهِ اِ۬لَّذِي يُخۡرِجُ اُ۬لۡخَبۡءَ فِي اِ۬لسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَاَلۡأَرۡضِ وَيَعۡلَمُ مَا يُخۡفُونَ وَمَا يُعۡلِنُونَ
27:25.susi_ar_text: أَلَّاۤ يَسۡجُدُواْۤ لِلَّهِ اِ۬لَّذِي يُخۡرِجُ اُ۬لۡخَبۡءَ فِي  اِ۬لسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَاَلۡأَرۡضِ وَيَعۡلَم مَّا يُخۡفُونَ وَمَا يُعۡلِنُونَ

27:51.base_text: So look at how the outcome of their scheming was that We did destroy them and their people, all of them.
27:51.duri_abu_amr_text: So look at how the outcome of their scheming was: We did destroy them and their people, all of them.
27:51.susi_text: So look at how the outcome of their scheming was: We did destroy them and their people, all of them.
27:51.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: فَاَنظُرۡ كَيۡفَ كَانَ عَٰقِبَةُ مَكۡرِهِمۡۚ إِنَّا دَمَّرۡنَٰهُمۡ وَقَوۡمَهُمۡ أَجۡمَعِينَ
27:51.susi_ar_text: فَاَنظُرۡ  كَيۡفَ كَانَ عَٰقِبَةُ مَكۡرِهِمۡۚ إِنَّا دَمَّرۡنَٰهُمۡ وَقَوۡمَهُمۡ  أَجۡمَعِينَ

27:62.base_text: Or who (else then) is the one who responds to someone in need when he calls upon Him and relieves evil and makes you successors on earth? Is there any other god with Allah? Little do you remind yourselves.
27:62.duri_abu_amr_text: Or who (else then) is the one who responds to someone in need when he calls upon Him and relieves evil and makes you successors on earth? Is there any other god with Allah? Little do they constantly remember.
27:62.susi_text: Or who (else then) is the one who responds to someone in need when he calls upon Him and relieves evil and makes you successors on earth? Is there any other god with Allah? Little do they constantly remember.
27:62.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: أَمَّن يُجِيبُ اُ۬لۡمُضۡطَرَّ إِذَا دَعَاهُ وَيَكۡشِفُ اُ۬لسُّوٓءَ وَيَجۡعَلُكُمۡ خُلَفَآءَ اَ۬لۡأَرۡضِۗ أَٰ۟لَٰهٞ مَّعَ اَ۬للَّهِۚ قَلِيلٗا مَّا يَذَّكَّرُونَ
27:62.susi_ar_text: أَمَّن يُجِيبُ اُ۬لۡمُضۡطَرَّ إِذَا  دَعَاهُ وَيَكۡشِفُ اُ۬لسُّوٓءَ وَيَجۡعَلُكُمۡ خُلَفَآءَ اَ۬لۡأَرۡضِۗ  أَٰ۟لَٰهٞ مَّعَ اَ۬للَّهِۚ قَلِيلٗا مَّا يَذَّكَّرُونَ

27:63.base_text: Or who (else then) is the one who guides you through the darkness(es) of the land and the sea, and who sends the winds as heralds of glad tidings before His mercy? Is there any other god with Allah? Most High is Allah above what they associate.
27:63.duri_abu_amr_text: Or who (else then) is the one who guides you through the darkness(es) of the land and the sea, and who sends the winds as revivers ahead of His mercy? Is there any other god with Allah? Most High is Allah above what they associate.
27:63.susi_text: Or who (else then) is the one who guides you through the darkness(es) of the land and the sea, and who sends the winds as revivers ahead of His mercy? Is there any other god with Allah? Most High is Allah above what they associate.
27:63.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: أَمَّن يَهۡدِيكُمۡ فِي ظُلُمَٰتِ اِ۬لۡبَرِّ وَاَلۡبَحۡرِ وَمَن يُرۡسِلُ اُ۬لرِّيَٰحَ نُشُرَۢا بَيۡنَ يَدَيۡ رَحۡمَتِهِۦٓۗ أَٰ۟لَٰهٞ مَّعَ اَ۬للَّهِۚ تَعَٰلَى اَ۬للَّهُ عَمَّا يُشۡرِكُونَ
27:63.susi_ar_text: أَمَّن يَهۡدِيكُمۡ فِي  ظُلُمَٰتِ اِ۬لۡبَرِّ وَاَلۡبَحۡرِ وَمَن يُرۡسِلُ اُ۬لرِّيَٰحَ نُشُرَۢا بَيۡنَ يَدَيۡ  رَحۡمَتِهِۦۗ أَٰ۟لَٰهٞ مَّعَ اَ۬للَّهِۚ تَعَٰلَى اَ۬للَّهُ عَمَّا يُشۡرِكُونَ

27:66.base_text: rather, their knowledge has been reached in the Hereafter; rather, they are in doubt about it; rather, they are completely blind to it.
27:66.duri_abu_amr_text: rather, their knowledge has been grasped in the Hereafter; rather, they are in doubt about it; rather, they are completely blind to it.
27:66.susi_text: rather, their knowledge has been grasped in the Hereafter; rather, they are in doubt about it; rather, they are completely blind to it.
27:66.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: بَلۡ أَدۡرَكَ عِلۡمُهُمۡ فِي اِ۬لۡأٓخِرَةِۚ بَلۡ هُمۡ فِي شَكّٖ مِّنۡهَاۖ بَلۡ هُم مِّنۡهَا عَمُونَ
27:66.susi_ar_text: بَلۡ أَدۡرَكَ عِلۡمُهُمۡ فِي اِ۬لۡأٓخِرَةِۚ بَلۡ هُمۡ فِي  شَكّٖ مِّنۡهَاۖ بَلۡ هُم مِّنۡهَا عَمُونَ

27:82.base_text: And when the decree is fulfilled against them, We will bring out for them—from the earth—a treading creature that will tell them that mankind used to have no certitude in Our signs.
27:82.duri_abu_amr_text: And when the decree is fulfilled against them, We will bring out for them—from the earth—a treading creature that will speak to them. Indeed, mankind used to have no certitude in Our signs.
27:82.susi_text: And when the decree is fulfilled against them, We will bring out for them—from the earth—a treading creature that will speak to them. Indeed, mankind used to have no certitude in Our signs.
27:82.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: ۞ وَإِذَا وَقَعَ اَ۬لۡقَوۡلُ عَلَيۡهِمۡ أَخۡرَجۡنَا لَهُمۡ دَآبَّةٗ مِّنَ اَ۬لۡأَرۡضِ تُكَلِّمُهُمۡۚ إِنَّ اَ۬لنَّاسَ كَانُواْ بِـَٔايَٰتِنَا لَا يُوقِنُونَ
27:82.susi_ar_text: ۞ وَإِذَا وَقَعَ  اَ۬لۡقَوۡلُ عَلَيۡهِمۡ أَخۡرَجۡنَا لَهُمۡ دَآبَّةٗ مِّنَ اَ۬لۡأَرۡضِ تُكَلِّمُهُمۡۚ إِنَّ  اَ۬لنَّاسَ كَانُواْ بِـَٔايَٰتِنَا لَا يُوقِنُونَ

27:88.base_text: And you see the mountains, thinking them fixed, yet they pass as the passing of the clouds—the making of Allah Who has perfected everything; He is indeed All-Aware of what you do.
27:88.duri_abu_amr_text: And you see the mountains, thinking them fixed, yet they pass as the passing of the clouds—the making of Allah Who has perfected everything; He is indeed All-Aware of what they do.
27:88.susi_text: And you see the mountains, thinking them fixed, yet they pass as the passing of the clouds—the making of Allah Who has perfected everything; He is indeed All-Aware of what they do.
27:88.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: وَتَرَى اَ۬لۡجِبَالَ تَحۡسِبُهَا جَامِدَةٗ وَهۡيَ تَمُرُّ مَرَّ اَ۬لسَّحَابِۚ صُنۡعَ اَ۬للَّهِ اِ۬لَّذِيٓ أَتۡقَنَ كُلَّ شَيۡءٍۚ إِنَّهُۥ خَبِيرُۢ بِمَا يَفۡعَلُونَ
27:88.susi_ar_text: وَتَر۪ي اَ۬لۡجِبَالَ تَحۡسِبُهَا جَامِدَةٗ وَهۡيَ تَمُرُّ مَرَّ اَ۬لسَّحَابِۚ  صُنۡعَ اَ۬للَّهِ اِ۬لَّذِي أَتۡقَنَ كُلَّ شَيۡءٍۚ إِنَّهُۥ خَبِيرُۢ بِمَا يَفۡعَلُونَ

27:89.base_text: Whoever comes with a good deed—for him is one better than it and they are safe from horror on that day,
27:89.duri_abu_amr_text: Whoever comes with a good deed—for him is one better than it and they are safe from the horror of that day,
27:89.susi_text: Whoever comes with a good deed—for him is one better than it and they are safe from the horror of that day,
27:89.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: مَن جَآءَ بِالۡحَسَنَةِ فَلَهُۥ خَيۡرٞ مِّنۡهَا وَهُم مِّن فَزَعِ يَوۡمِئِذٍ ءَامِنُونَ
27:89.susi_ar_text: مَن جَآءَ بِالۡحَسَنَةِ فَلَهُۥ خَيۡرٞ مِّنۡهَا وَهُم مِّن فَزَعِ يَوۡمِئِذٍ ءَامِنُونَ

27:93.base_text: And say, “Praise be to Allah; He will show you His signs and you will recognize them. For in no way is your Lord oblivious of what you do.”
27:93.duri_abu_amr_text: And say, “Praise be to Allah; He will show you His signs and you will recognize them. For in no way is your Lord oblivious of what they do.”
27:93.susi_text: And say, “Praise be to Allah; He will show you His signs and you will recognize them. For in no way is your Lord oblivious of what they do.”
27:93.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: وَقُلِ اِ۬لۡحَمۡدُ لِلَّهِ سَيُرِيكُمۡ ءَايَٰتِهِۦ فَتَعۡرِفُونَهَاۚ وَمَا رَبُّكَ بِغَٰفِلٍ عَمَّا يَعۡمَلُونَ
27:93.susi_ar_text: وَقُلِ اِ۬لۡحَمۡدُ لِلَّهِ  سَيُرِيكُمۡ ءَايَٰتِهِۦ فَتَعۡرِفُونَهَاۚ وَمَا رَبُّكَ بِغَٰفِلٍ عَمَّا يَعۡمَلُونَ

28:48.base_text: But when the truth came to them from Our Providence, they said, “If only he was given the like of what was given to Moses.” Did they not deny what was given to Moses in the past? They said, “Two works of sorcery, backing one another.” And they said, “We deny both.”
28:48.duri_abu_amr_text: But when the truth came to them from Our Providence, they said, “If only he was given the like of what was given to Moses.” Did they not deny what was given to Moses in the past? They said, “Two sorcerers, backing one another.” And they said, “We deny both.”
28:48.susi_text: But when the truth came to them from Our Providence, they said, “If only he was given the like of what was given to Moses.” Did they not deny what was given to Moses in the past? They said, “Two sorcerers, backing one another.” And they said, “We deny both.”
28:48.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: فَلَمَّا جَآءَهُمُ اُ۬لۡحَقُّ مِنۡ عِندِنَا قَالُواْ لَوۡلَآ أُوتِيَ مِثۡلَ مَآ أُوتِيَ مُوسۭيٰٓۚ أَوَلَمۡ يَكۡفُرُواْ بِمَآ أُوتِيَ مُوسۭيٰ مِن قَبۡلُۖ قَالُواْ سَٰحِرَانِ تَظَٰهَرَا وَقَالُوٓاْ إِنَّا بِكُلّٖ كَٰفِرُونَ
28:48.susi_ar_text: فَلَمَّا جَآءَهُمُ اُ۬لۡحَقُّ مِنۡ عِندِنَا قَالُواْ  لَوۡلَا أُوتِيَ مِثۡلَ مَا أُوتِيَ مُوسۭيٰۚ أَوَ لَمۡ يَكۡفُرُواْ بِمَا أُوتِيَ  مُوسۭيٰ مِن قَبۡلُۖ قَالُواْ سَٰحِرَانِ تَظَٰهَرَا وَقَالُواْ إِنَّا بِكُلّٖ كَٰفِرُونَ

28:60.base_text: And whatever youpl have been brought is (merely) the enjoyment of the Earlier Life and its adornment, but what is with Allah is better and longer lasting. Do you not reason?
28:60.duri_abu_amr_text: And whatever youpl have been brought is (merely) the enjoyment of the Earlier Life and its adornment, but what is with Allah is better and longer lasting. Do they not reason?
28:60.susi_text: And whatever youpl have been brought is (merely) the enjoyment of the Earlier Life and its adornment, but what is with Allah is better and longer lasting. Do they not reason?
28:60.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: وَمَآ أُوتِيتُم مِّن شَيۡءٖ فَمَتَٰعُ اُ۬لۡحَيَوٰةِ اِ۬لدُّنۡيۭا وَزِينَتُهَاۚ وَمَا عِندَ اَ۬للَّهِ خَيۡرٞ وَأَبۡقَىٰٓۚ أَفَلَا يَعۡقِلُونَ
28:60.susi_ar_text: وَمَا أُوتِيتُم مِّن شَيۡءٖ فَمَتَٰعُ اُ۬لۡحَيَوٰةِ اِ۬لدُّنۡيۭا وَزِينَتُهَاۚ وَمَا عِندَ  اَ۬للَّهِ خَيۡرٞ وَأَبۡقَىٰۚ أَفَلَا يَعۡقِلُونَ
