28:82.base_text: And by morning the ones who only yesterday had wished they were in his position were saying, “Indeed, it is Allah who extends His provision for whomever He wills of His servants, and He restrains (it). Had Allah not been gracious to us, He would have caused it to swallow us. No wonder the deniers never succeed.”
28:82.duri_abu_amr_text: And by morning the ones who only yesterday had wished they were in his position were saying, “Indeed, it is Allah who extends His provision for whomever He wills of His servants, and He restrains (it). Had Allah not been gracious to us, we would have been swallowed. No wonder the deniers never succeed.”
28:82.susi_text: And by morning the ones who only yesterday had wished they were in his position were saying, “Indeed, it is Allah who extends His provision for whomever He wills of His servants, and He restrains (it). Had Allah not been gracious to us, we would have been swallowed. No wonder the deniers never succeed.”
28:82.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: وَأَصۡبَحَ اَ۬لَّذِينَ تَمَنَّوۡاْ مَكَانَهُۥ بِالۡأَمۡسِ يَقُولُونَ وَيۡكَأَنَّ اَ۬للَّهَ يَبۡسُطُ اُ۬لرِّزۡقَ لِمَن يَشَآءُ مِنۡ عِبَادِهِۦ وَيَقۡدِرُۖ لَوۡلَآ أَن مَّنَّ اَ۬للَّهُ عَلَيۡنَا لَخُسِفَ بِنَاۖ وَيۡكَأَنَّهُۥ لَا يُفۡلِحُ اُ۬لۡكَٰفِرُونَ
28:82.susi_ar_text: وَأَصۡبَحَ اَ۬لَّذِينَ تَمَنَّوۡاْ  مَكَانَهُۥ بِالۡأَمۡسِ يَقُولُونَ وَيۡكَأَنَّ اَ۬للَّهَ يَبۡسُطُ اُ۬لرِّزۡقَ لِمَن  يَشَآءُ مِنۡ عِبَادِهِۦ وَيَقۡدِرۖ لَّوۡلَا أَن مَّنَّ اَ۬للَّهُ عَلَيۡنَا لَخُسِفَ بِنَاۖ  وَيۡكَأَنَّهُۥ لَا يُفۡلِحُ اُ۬لۡكَٰفِرُونَ

29:28.base_text: And Lot—recall when he said to his people, “Indeed, you do approach a obscenity such as nobody in all communities has ever committed before you.
29:28.duri_abu_amr_text: And Lot—recall when he said to his people, “Can it be that you do approach obscenity such as nobody in all realms has ever committed before you?”
29:28.susi_text: And Lot—recall when he said to his people, “Can it be that you do approach obscenity such as nobody in all realms has ever committed before you?”
29:28.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: وَلُوطًا إِذۡ قَالَ لِقَوۡمِهِۦٓ أَٰ۟نَّكُمۡ لَتَأۡتُونَ اَ۬لۡفَٰحِشَةَ مَا سَبَقَكُم بِهَا مِنۡ أَحَدٖ مِّنَ اَ۬لۡعَٰلَمِينَ
29:28.susi_ar_text: وَلُوطًا إِذۡ قَال لِّقَوۡمِهِۦ  أَٰ۟نَّكُمۡ لَتَاتُونَ اَ۬لۡفَٰحِشَةَ مَا سَبَقكُّم بِهَا مِنۡ أَحَدٖ  مِّنَ اَ۬لۡعَٰلَمِينَ

29:55.base_text: On the day when the punishment envelops them from above them and from beneath their feet, and He says, “Taste what you used to do!”
29:55.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: يَوۡمَ يَغۡشَىٰهُمُ اُ۬لۡعَذَابُ مِن فَوۡقِهِمۡ وَمِن تَحۡتِ أَرۡجُلِهِمۡ وَنَقُولُ ذُوقُواْ مَا كُنتُمۡ تَعۡمَلُونَ
29:55.susi_ar_text: يَوۡمَ يَغۡشَىٰهُمُ اُ۬لۡعَذَابُ  مِن فَوۡقِهِمۡ وَمِن تَحۡتِ أَرۡجُلِهِمۡ وَنَقُولُ ذُوقُواْ مَا كُنتُمۡ تَعۡمَلُونَ

30:11.base_text: Allah originates creation and then restores it, then to Him youpl are returned.
30:11.duri_abu_amr_text: then to Him they are returned.
30:11.susi_text: then to Him they are returned.
30:11.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: اَ۬للَّهُ يَبۡدَؤُاْ اُ۬لۡخَلۡقَ ثُمَّ يُعِيدُهُۥ ثُمَّ إِلَيۡهِ يُرۡجَعُونَ
30:11.susi_ar_text: اَ۬للَّهُ يَبۡدَؤُاْ اُ۬لۡخَلۡقَ ثُمَّ يُعِيدُهُۥ ثُمَّ إِلَيۡهِ يُرۡجَعُونَ

30:22.base_text: And of His signs is the creation of the heavens and the earth, and the diversity of your pl tongues and colors; indeed, in that are signs for those who know.
30:22.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: وَمِنۡ ءَايَٰتِهِۦ خَلۡقُ اُ۬لسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَاَلۡأَرۡضِ وَاَخۡتِلَٰفُ أَلۡسِنَتِكُمۡ وَأَلۡوَٰنِكُمۡۚ إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَأٓيَٰتٖ لِّلۡعَٰلَمِينَ
30:22.susi_ar_text: وَمِنۡ ءَايَٰتِهِۦ  خَلۡقُ اُ۬لسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَاَلۡأَرۡضِ وَاَخۡتِلَٰفُ أَلۡسِنَتِكُمۡ وَأَلۡوَٰنِكُمۡۚ  إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَأٓيَٰتٖ لِّلۡعَٰلَمِينَ

30:24.base_text: And of His signs is that He shows youpl lightning, causing fear and ardent hope. And He bestows water from the sky, and with it He revives the earth after its death; indeed, in that are signs for people who reason.
30:24.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: وَمِنۡ ءَايَٰتِهِۦ يُرِيكُمُ اُ۬لۡبَرۡقَ خَوۡفٗا وَطَمَعٗا وَيُنزِلُ مِنَ اَ۬لسَّمَآءِ مَآءٗ فَيُحۡيِۦ بِهِ اِ۬لۡأَرۡضَ بَعۡدَ مَوۡتِهَآۚ إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَأٓيَٰتٖ لِّقَوۡمٖ يَعۡقِلُونَ
30:24.susi_ar_text: وَمِنۡ ءَايَٰتِهِۦ يُرِيكُمُ اُ۬لۡبَرۡقَ  خَوۡفٗا وَطَمَعٗا وَيُنزِلُ مِنَ اَ۬لسَّمَآءِ مَآءٗ فَيُحۡيِۦ بِهِ اِ۬لۡأَرۡضَ  بَعۡدَ مَوۡتِهَاۚ إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَأٓيَٰتٖ لِّقَوۡمٖ يَعۡقِلُونَ

30:49.base_text: although before it was bestowed upon them from on high they were indeed in despair.
30:49.duri_abu_amr_text: before it was sent down upon them they were
30:49.susi_text: before it was sent down upon them they were
30:49.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: وَإِن كَانُواْ مِن قَبۡلِ أَن يُنزَلَ عَلَيۡهِم مِّن قَبۡلِهِۦ لَمُبۡلِسِينَ
30:49.susi_ar_text: وَإِن كَانُواْ مِن قَبۡلِ أَن يُنزَلَ عَلَيۡهِم مِّن قَبۡلِهِۦ لَمُبۡلِسِينَ

30:50.base_text: So look sg at the effects of Allah’s mercy—how He revives the earth after its death; indeed, He is the Reviver of the dead, and He is All-Powerful over everything.
30:50.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: فَاَنظُرۡ إِلَىٰٓ أَثَرِ رَحۡمَتِ اِ۬للَّهِ كَيۡفَ يُحۡيِ اِ۬لۡأَرۡضَ بَعۡدَ مَوۡتِهَآۚ إِنَّ ذَٰلِكَ لَمُحۡيِ اِ۬لۡمَوۡتۭيٰۖ وَهۡوَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيۡءٖ قَدِيرٞ
30:50.susi_ar_text: فَاَنظُرۡ إِلَىٰ أَثَر رَّحۡمَتِ اِ۬للَّهِ كَيۡفَ يُحۡيِ اِ۬لۡأَرۡضَ بَعۡدَ مَوۡتِهَاۚ  إِنَّ ذَٰلِكَ لَمُحۡيِ اِ۬لۡمَوۡتۭيٰۖ وَهۡوَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيۡءٖ قَدِيرٞ

31:6.base_text: And among mankind is one who trades in distracting tales to make (people) stray from the way of Allah without knowledge, and to take it for a mockery; for those is a demeaning punishment.
31:6.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: وَمِنَ اَ۬لنّ۪اسِ مَن يَشۡتَرِي لَهۡوَ اَ۬لۡحَدِيثِ لِيَضِلَّ عَن سَبِيلِ اِ۬للَّهِ بِغَيۡرِ عِلۡمٖ وَيَتَّخِذُهَا هُزُؤًاۚ أُوْلَٰٓئِكَ لَهُمۡ عَذَابٞ مُّهِينٞ
31:6.susi_ar_text: وَمِنَ اَ۬لنَّاسِ مَن يَشۡتَرِي لَهۡوَ اَ۬لۡحَدِيثِ  لِيَضِلَّ عَن سَبِيلِ اِ۬للَّهِ بِغَيۡرِ عِلۡمٖ وَيَتَّخِذُهَا هُزُؤًاۚ أُوْلَٰٓئِكَ لَهُمۡ  عَذَابٞ مُّهِينٞ

31:20.base_text: Have youpl not seen that Allah has subjected to you whatever is in the heavens and whatever is in the earth and showered you with His blessings, both manifest and hidden? Yet among mankind is one who argues about Allah without any knowledge nor any guidance nor any illuminating Scripture.
31:20.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: أَلَمۡ تَرَوۡاْ أَنَّ اَ۬للَّهَ سَخَّرَ لَكُم مَّا فِي اِ۬لسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَمَا فِي اِ۬لۡأَرۡضِ وَأَسۡبَغَ عَلَيۡكُمۡ نِعَمَهُۥ ظَٰهِرَةٗ وَبَاطِنَةٗۗ وَمِنَ اَ۬لنّ۪اسِ مَن يُجَٰدِلُ فِي اِ۬للَّهِ بِغَيۡرِ عِلۡمٖ وَلَا هُدٗى وَلَا كِتَٰبٖ مُّنِيرٖ
31:20.susi_ar_text: أَلَمۡ تَرَوۡاْ أَنَّ اَ۬للَّهَ سَخَّر لَّكُم مَّا فِي اِ۬لسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَمَا فِي اِ۬لۡأَرۡضِ وَأَسۡبَغَ  عَلَيۡكُمۡ نِعَمَهُۥ ظَٰهِرَةٗ وَبَاطِنَةٗۗ وَمِنَ اَ۬لنَّاسِ مَن يُجَٰدِلُ فِي اِ۬للَّهِ  بِغَيۡرِ عِلۡمٖ وَلَا هُدٗى وَلَا كِتَٰبٖ مُّنِيرٖ

31:27.base_text: And were all the trees on earth pens, with the sea replenished by seven seas following it, never would the Words of Allah run out. Indeed, Allah is Almighty, All-Wise.
31:27.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: وَلَوۡ أَنَّمَا فِي اِ۬لۡأَرۡضِ مِن شَجَرَةٍ أَقۡلَٰمٞ وَاَلۡبَحۡرَ يَمُدُّهُۥ مِنۢ بَعۡدِهِۦ سَبۡعَةُ أَبۡحُرٖ مَّا نَفِدَتۡ كَلِمَٰتُ اُ۬للَّهِۗ إِنَّ اَ۬للَّهَ عَزِيزٌ حَكِيمٞ
31:27.susi_ar_text: وَلَوۡ أَنَّمَا فِي اِ۬لۡأَرۡضِ  مِن شَجَرَةٍ أَقۡلَٰمٞ وَاَلۡبَحۡرَ يَمُدُّهُۥ مِنۢ بَعۡدِهِۦ سَبۡعَةُ أَبۡحُرٖ  مَّا نَفِدَتۡ كَلِمَٰتُ اُ۬للَّهِۚ إِنَّ اَ۬للَّهَ عَزِيزٌ حَكِيمٞ

31:34.base_text: Indeed, with Allah rests the knowledge of the Hour. And He bestows the rain from on high and He knows what the wombs contain. But in no way does any soul know what it will earn tomorrow, and in no way does any soul know in what land it will die; indeed, Allah is All-Knowing, All-Aware.
31:34.duri_abu_amr_text: and He sends down the rain and He knows
31:34.susi_text: and He sends down the rain and He knows
31:34.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: إِنَّ اَ۬للَّهَ عِندَهُۥ عِلۡمُ اُ۬لسَّاعَةِ وَيُنزِلُ اُ۬لۡغَيۡثَ وَيَعۡلَمُ مَا فِي اِ۬لۡأَرۡحَامِۖ وَمَا تَدۡرِي نَفۡسٞ مَّاذَا تَكۡسِبُ غَدٗاۖ وَمَا تَدۡرِي نَفۡسُۢ بِأَيِّ أَرۡضٖ تَمُوتُۚ إِنَّ اَ۬للَّهَ عَلِيمٌ خَبِيرُۢ
31:34.susi_ar_text: إِنَّ اَ۬للَّهَ عِندَهُۥ عِلۡمُ اُ۬لسَّاعَةِ وَيُنزِلُ اُ۬لۡغَيۡثَ  وَيَعۡلَم مَّا فِي اِ۬لۡأَرۡحَامِۖ وَمَا تَدۡرِي نَفۡسٞ مَّاذَا تَكۡسِبُ غَدٗاۖ  وَمَا تَدۡرِي نَفۡسُۢ بِأَيِّ أَرۡضٖ تَمُوتُۚ إِنَّ اَ۬للَّهَ عَلِيمٌ خَبِيرُۢ

32:7.base_text: created, and He originated the creation of man from clay,
32:7.duri_abu_amr_text: . . . Who has made everything excellent regarding its composition, and He . . .
32:7.susi_text: . . . Who has made everything excellent regarding its composition, and He . . .
32:7.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: اُ۬لَّذِيٓ أَحۡسَنَ كُلَّ شَيۡءٍ خَلۡقَهُۥۖ وَبَدَأَ خَلۡقَ اَ۬لۡإِنسَٰنِ مِن طِينٖ
32:7.susi_ar_text: اُ۬لَّذِي أَحۡسَنَ كُلَّ شَيۡءٍ خَلۡقَهُۥۖ وَبَدَأَ خَلۡقَ اَ۬لۡإِنسَٰنِ  مِن طِينٖ

33:2.base_text: And follow what is revealed to you from your Lord; indeed, Allah has always been All-Aware of what you do.
33:2.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: وَاَتَّبِعۡ مَا يُوحَىٰٓ إِلَيۡكَ مِن رَّبِّكَۚ إِنَّ اَ۬للَّهَ كَانَ بِمَا يَعۡمَلُونَ خَبِيرٗا
33:2.susi_ar_text: وَاَتَّبِعۡ مَا يُوحَىٰ إِلَيۡكَ مِن رَّبِّكَۚ  إِنَّ اَ۬للَّهَ كَانَ بِمَا يَعۡمَلُونَ خَبِيرٗا

33:9.base_text: O you who have attained faith, remember Allah’s blessings upon you when troops advanced towards you, and We sent against them a wind and troops that you did not see. And Allah has always been All-Seeing of what you do.
33:9.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: ۞ يَٰٓأَيُّهَا اَ۬لَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ اُ۟ذۡكُرُواْ نِعۡمَةَ اَ۬للَّهِ عَلَيۡكُمۡ إِذ جَّآءَتۡكُمۡ جُنُودٞ فَأَرۡسَلۡنَا عَلَيۡهِمۡ رِيحٗا وَجُنُودٗا لَّمۡ تَرَوۡهَاۚ وَكَانَ اَ۬للَّهُ بِمَا يَعۡمَلُونَ بَصِيرًا
33:9.susi_ar_text: ۞ يَٰأَيُّهَا اَ۬لَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ اُ۟ذۡكُرُواْ نِعۡمَةَ اَ۬للَّهِ عَلَيۡكُمۡ إِذ جَّآءَتۡكُمۡ  جُنُودٞ فَأَرۡسَلۡنَا عَلَيۡهِمۡ رِيحٗا وَجُنُودٗا لَّمۡ تَرَوۡهَاۚ وَكَانَ اَ۬للَّهُ  بِمَا يَعۡمَلُونَ بَصِيرًا

33:13.base_text: Recall, too, when a faction of them said, “O people of Yathrib, there is no staying for you here, so retreat.”
33:13.duri_abu_amr_text: . . . there is no standing-place for you here . . .
33:13.susi_text: . . . there is no standing-place for you here . . .
33:13.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: وَإِذۡ قَالَت طَّآئِفَةٞ مِّنۡهُمۡ يَٰٓأَهۡلَ يَثۡرِبَ لَا مَقَامَ لَكُمۡ فَاَرۡجِعُواْۚ وَيَسۡتَـٔۡذِنُ فَرِيقٞ مِّنۡهُمُ اُ۬لنَّبِيَّ يَقُولُونَ إِنَّ بُيُوتَنَا عَوۡرَةٞ وَمَا هِيَ بِعَوۡرَةٍۖ إِن يُرِيدُونَ إِلَّا فِرَارٗا
33:13.susi_ar_text: وَإِذۡ قَالَت طَّآئِفَةٞ  مِّنۡهُمۡ يَٰأَهۡلَ يَثۡرِبَ لَا مَقَامَ لَكُمۡ فَاَرۡجِعُواْۚ وَيَسۡتَٰذِنُ فَرِيقٞ  مِّنۡهُمُ اُ۬لنَّبِيَّ يَقُولُونَ إِنَّ بُيُوتَنَا عَوۡرَةٞ وَمَا هِيَ بِعَوۡرَةٍۖ إِن يُرِيدُونَ  إِلَّا فِرَارٗا

33:33.base_text: And settle in your houses and do not display yourselves as in the former days of pagan ignorance,
33:33.duri_abu_amr_text: And settle, revered, in your houses . . .
33:33.susi_text: And settle, revered, in your houses . . .
33:33.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: وَقِرۡنَ فِي بُيُوتِكُنَّ وَلَا تَبَرَّجۡنَ تَبَرُّجَ اَ۬لۡجَٰهِلِيَّةِ اِ۬لۡأُولۭيٰۖ وَأَقِمۡنَ اَ۬لصَّلَوٰةَ وَءَاتِينَ اَ۬لزَّكَوٰةَ وَأَطِعۡنَ اَ۬للَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُۥٓۚ إِنَّمَا يُرِيدُ اُ۬للَّهُ لِيُذۡهِبَ عَنكُمُ اُ۬لرِّجۡسَ أَهۡلَ اَ۬لۡبَيۡتِ وَيُطَهِّرَكُمۡ تَطۡهِيرٗا
33:33.susi_ar_text: وَقِرۡنَ  فِي بُيُوتِكُنَّ وَلَا تَبَرَّجۡنَ تَبَرُّجَ اَ۬لۡجَٰهِلِيَّةِ اِ۬لۡأُولۭيٰۖ وَأَقِمۡنَ  اَ۬لصَّلَوٰةَ وَءَاتِينَ اَ۬لزَّكَوٰةَ وَأَطِعۡنَ اَ۬للَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُۥۚ إِنَّمَا  يُرِيدُ اُ۬للَّهُ لِيُذۡهِبَ عَنكُمُ اُ۬لرِّجۡسَ أَهۡلَ اَ۬لۡبَيۡتِ وَيُطَهِّرَكُمۡ  تَطۡهِيرٗا

33:68.base_text: Our Lord, give them double the punishment and curse them with a supreme curse.”
33:68.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: رَبَّنَآ ءَاتِهِمۡ ضِعۡفَيۡنِ مِنَ اَ۬لۡعَذَابِ وَاَلۡعَنۡهُمۡ لَعۡنٗا كَثِيرٗا
33:68.susi_ar_text: رَبَّنَا ءَاتِهِمۡ ضِعۡفَيۡنِ مِنَ اَ۬لۡعَذَابِ  وَاَلۡعَنۡهُمۡ لَعۡنٗا كَثِيرٗا

34:5.base_text: Those who strove against Our signs, attempting to challenge (God) — those ones, for them is a painful punishment of torment.
34:5.duri_abu_amr_text: . . . for them is a punishment of painful torment.
34:5.susi_text: . . . for them is a punishment of painful torment.
34:5.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: وَاَلَّذِينَ سَعَوۡ فِيٓ ءَايَٰتِنَا مُعَجِّزِينَ أُوْلَٰٓئِكَ لَهُمۡ عَذَابٞ مِّن رِّجۡزٍ أَلِيمٖ
34:5.susi_ar_text: وَاَلَّذِينَ سَعَوۡ فِي ءَايَٰتِنَا مُعَجِّزِينَ أُوْلَٰٓئِكَ  لَهُمۡ عَذَابٞ مِّن رِّجۡزٍ أَلِيمٖ

34:9.base_text: If We will, We can make the earth cave in beneath them, or let fall down on them pieces from the sky; indeed, in that is a sign for every penitent servant.
34:9.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: أَفَلَمۡ يَرَوۡاْ إِلَىٰ مَا بَيۡنَ أَيۡدِيهِمۡ وَمَا خَلۡفَهُم مِّنَ اَ۬لسَّمَآءِ وَاَلۡأَرۡضِۚ إِن نَّشَأۡ نَخۡسِفۡ بِهِمِ اِ۬لۡأَرۡضَ أَوۡ نُسۡقِطۡ عَلَيۡهِمۡ كِسۡفٗا مِّنَ اَ۬لسَّمَآۚ إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَأٓيَةٗ لِّكُلِّ عَبۡدٖ مُّنِيبٖ
34:9.susi_ar_text: أَفَلَمۡ يَرَوۡاْ إِلَىٰ مَا بَيۡنَ أَيۡدِيهِمۡ  وَمَا خَلۡفَهُم مِّنَ اَ۬لسَّمَآءِ وَاَلۡأَرۡضِۚ إِن نَّشَأۡ نَخۡسِفۡ بِهِمِ اِ۬لۡأَرۡضَ  أَوۡ نُسۡقِطۡ عَلَيۡهِمۡ كِسۡفٗا مِّنَ اَ۬لسَّمَاۚ إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَأٓيَةٗ  لِّكُلِّ عَبۡدٖ مُّنِيبٖ

34:15.base_text: Surely, there used to be a sign for (the people of) Sheba in their residence: two gardens, on the right and on the left. “Eat pl of your Lord’s provision and give thanks to Him.” A good land and an Oft-Forgiving Lord.
34:15.duri_abu_amr_text: Surely, there used to be a sign for (the people of) Sheba in their residences: two gardens, on the right and on the left. “Eat pl of your Lord’s provision and give thanks to Him.” A good land and an Oft-Forgiving Lord.
34:15.susi_text: Surely, there used to be a sign for (the people of) Sheba in their residences: two gardens, on the right and on the left. “Eat pl of your Lord’s provision and give thanks to Him.” A good land and an Oft-Forgiving Lord.
34:15.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: ۞ لَقَدۡ كَانَ لِسَبَأَ فِي مَسَٰكِنِهِمۡ ءَايَةٞۖ جَنَّتَانِ عَن يَمِينٖ وَشِمَالٖۖ كُلُواْ مِن رِّزۡقِ رَبِّكُمۡ وَاَشۡكُرُواْ لَهُۥۚ بَلۡدَةٞ طَيِّبَةٞ وَرَبٌّ غَفُورٞ
34:15.susi_ar_text: ۞ لَقَدۡ كَانَ لِسَبَأَ فِي مَسَٰكِنِهِمۡ ءَايَةٞۖ جَنَّتَانِ عَن يَمِينٖ وَشِمَالٖۖ  كُلُواْ مِن رِّزۡقِ رَبِّكُمۡ وَاَشۡكُرُواْ لَهُۥۚ بَلۡدَةٞ طَيِّبَةٞ وَرَبٌّ غَفُورٞ

34:17.base_text: Thus We repaid them on account of how they denied, and do We (thus) repay anyone except the staunch denier?
34:17.duri_abu_amr_text: Thus We repaid them on account of how they denied, and who is (thus) repaid except the staunch denier?
34:17.susi_text: Thus We repaid them on account of how they denied, and who is (thus) repaid except the staunch denier?
34:17.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: ذَٰلِكَ جَزَيۡنَٰهُم بِمَا كَفَرُواْۖ وَهَلۡ يُجَٰزَىٰٓ إِلَّا اَ۬لۡكَفُورُ
34:17.susi_ar_text: ذَٰلِكَ جَزَيۡنَٰهُم بِمَا كَفَرُواْۖ وَهَلۡ يُجَٰزَىٰ إِلَّا اَ۬لۡكَفُورُ

34:20.base_text: And surely, Iblis confirmed his assumption about them. So they followed him, except for a group of believers.
34:20.duri_abu_amr_text: And surely, Iblis's assumption about them was confirmed. So they followed him, except for a group of believers.
34:20.susi_text: And surely, Iblis's assumption about them was confirmed. So they followed him, except for a group of believers.
34:20.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: وَلَقَد صَّدَقَ عَلَيۡهِمۡ إِبۡلِيسُ ظَنَّهُۥ فَاَتَّبَعُوهُ إِلَّا فَرِيقٗا مِّنَ اَ۬لۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ
34:20.susi_ar_text: وَلَقَد صَّدَقَ عَلَيۡهِمۡ إِبۡلِيسُ ظَنَّهُۥ فَاَتَّبَعُوهُ إِلَّا  فَرِيقٗا مِّنَ اَ۬لۡمُومِنِينَ

34:23.base_text: And intercession cannot be of benefit before Him, except for one to whom He has given permission. Until, when fear has been dispelled from their hearts, they say, “What did your pl Lord say?” They say, “The truth; and He is the All-High, the Supreme.”
34:23.duri_abu_amr_text: And intercession cannot be of benefit before Him, except for one who has been given permission. Until, when fear has been dispelled from their hearts, they say, “What did your pl Lord say?” They say, “The truth; and He is the All-High, the Supreme.”
34:23.susi_text: And intercession cannot be of benefit before Him, except for one who has been given permission. Until, when fear has been dispelled from their hearts, they say, “What did your pl Lord say?” They say, “The truth; and He is the All-High, the Supreme.”
34:23.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: وَلَا تَنفَعُ اُ۬لشَّفَٰعَةُ عِندَهُۥٓ إِلَّا لِمَنۡ أُذِنَ لَهُۥۚ حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا فُزِّعَ عَن قُلُوبِهِمۡ قَالُواْ مَاذَا قَالَ رَبُّكُمۡۖ قَالُواْ اُ۬لۡحَقَّۖ وَهۡوَ اَ۬لۡعَلِيُّ اُ۬لۡكَبِيرُ
34:23.susi_ar_text: وَلَا تَنفَعُ اُ۬لشَّفَٰعَةُ عِندَهُۥ إِلَّا لِمَنۡ أُذِن لَّهُۥۚ حَتَّىٰ إِذَا فُزِّع عَّن  قُلُوبِهِمۡ قَالُواْ مَاذَا قَال رَّبُّكُمۡۖ قَالُواْ اُ۬لۡحَقَّۖ وَهۡوَ اَ۬لۡعَلِيُّ اُ۬لۡكَبِيرُ

34:38.base_text: But those who strove against Our signs attempting to challenge (God) —those are arraigned in the punishment.
34:38.duri_abu_amr_text: But those who strove against Our signs attempting to thwart (God) —those are arraigned in the punishment.
34:38.susi_text: But those who strove against Our signs attempting to thwart (God) —those are arraigned in the punishment.
34:38.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: وَاَلَّذِينَ يَسۡعَوۡنَ فِيٓ ءَايَٰتِنَا مُعَجِّزِينَ أُوْلَٰٓئِكَ فِي اِ۬لۡعَذَابِ مُحۡضَرُونَ
34:38.susi_ar_text: وَاَلَّذِينَ  يَسۡعَوۡنَ فِي ءَايَٰتِنَا مُعَجِّزِينَ أُوْلَٰٓئِكَ فِي اِ۬لۡعَذَابِ مُحۡضَرُونَ

34:40.base_text: And on the day when He herds them all together, then says to the angels, “Is it you that these used to worship?”
34:40.duri_abu_amr_text: And on the day when We herd them all together, then says to the angels, “Is it you that these used to worship?”
34:40.susi_text: And on the day when We herd them all together, then says to the angels, “Is it you that these used to worship?”
34:40.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: وَيَوۡمَ نَحۡشُرُهُمۡ جَمِيعٗا ثُمَّ نَقُولُ لِلۡمَلَٰٓئِكَةِ أَهَٰٓؤُلَآ إِيَّاكُمۡ كَانُواْ يَعۡبُدُونَ
34:40.susi_ar_text: وَيَوۡمَ نَحۡشُرُهُمۡ جَمِيعٗا ثُمَّ نَقُول لِّلۡمَلَٰٓئِكَةِ أَهَٰؤُلَا إِيَّاكُمۡ كَانُواْ  يَعۡبُدُونَ

35:33.base_text: Gardens of Eden which they enter; they are adorned therein with gold bracelets and pearls, and their garments therein are of silk.
35:33.duri_abu_amr_text: Gardens of Eden into which they are entered; they are adorned therein with bracelets of gold and (of) pearls, and their garments therein are of silk.
35:33.susi_text: Gardens of Eden into which they are entered; they are adorned therein with bracelets of gold and (of) pearls, and their garments therein are of silk.
35:33.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: جَنَّٰتُ عَدۡنٖ يُدۡخَلُونَهَا يُحَلَّوۡنَ فِيهَا مِنۡ أَسَاوِرَ مِن ذَهَبٖ وَلُؤۡلُوٕٖاْۖ وَلِبَاسُهُمۡ فِيهَا حَرِيرٞ
35:33.susi_ar_text: جَنَّٰتُ عَدۡنٖ يُدۡخَلُونَهَا يُحَلَّوۡنَ  فِيهَا مِنۡ أَسَاوِرَ مِن ذَهَبٖ وَلُولُوٕٖاْۖ وَلِبَاسُهُمۡ فِيهَا حَرِيرٞ

35:36.base_text: And those who have denied—for them is the fire of Hell wherein they are never finished off and thus die, nor is its punishment lightened for them. Thus We repay every staunch denier.
35:36.duri_abu_amr_text: And those who have denied—for them is the fire of Hell wherein they are never finished off and thus die, nor is its punishment lightened for them. Thus every staunch denier is repaid.
35:36.susi_text: And those who have denied—for them is the fire of Hell wherein they are never finished off and thus die, nor is its punishment lightened for them. Thus every staunch denier is repaid.
35:36.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: وَاَلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ لَهُمۡ نَارُ جَهَنَّمَ لَا يُقۡضَىٰ عَلَيۡهِمۡ فَيَمُوتُواْ وَلَا يُخَفَّفُ عَنۡهُم مِّنۡ عَذَابِهَاۚ كَذَٰلِكَ يُجۡزَىٰ كُلُّ كَفُورٖ
35:36.susi_ar_text: وَاَلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ لَهُمۡ  نَارُ جَهَنَّمَ لَا يُقۡضَىٰ عَلَيۡهِمۡ فَيَمُوتُواْ وَلَا يُخَفَّفُ عَنۡهُم مِّنۡ  عَذَابِهَاۚ كَذَٰلِكَ يُجۡزَىٰ كُلُّ كَفُورٖ

36:5.base_text: (God bestowed it as) a bestowal from on high by the Almighty, the Bestower of mercy,
36:5.duri_abu_amr_text: (It is) a bestowal from on high by the Almighty, the Bestower of mercy,
36:5.susi_text: (It is) a bestowal from on high by the Almighty, the Bestower of mercy,

36:32.base_text: And none of them but will be arraigned before Us, all together.
36:32.duri_abu_amr_text: And all of them, all together, will be arraigned before Us.
36:32.susi_text: And all of them, all together, will be arraigned before Us.
36:32.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: وَإِن كُلّٞ لَّمَا جَمِيعٞ لَّدَيۡنَا مُحۡضَرُونَ
36:32.susi_ar_text: وَإِن كُلّٞ لَّمَا جَمِيعٞ لَّدَيۡنَا مُحۡضَرُونَ

36:39.base_text: And We have determined the moon in phases until it returned like an old palm-branch.
36:39.duri_abu_amr_text: And the moon: We have determined it in phases until it returned like an old palm-branch.
36:39.susi_text: And the moon: We have determined it in phases until it returned like an old palm-branch.
36:39.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: وَاَلۡقَمَرُ قَدَّرۡنَٰهُ مَنَازِلَ حَتَّىٰ عَادَ كَاَلۡعُرۡجُونِ اِ۬لۡقَدِيمِ
36:39.susi_ar_text: وَاَلۡقَمَرُ قَدَّرۡنَٰهُ مَنَازِلَ حَتَّىٰ  عَادَ كَاَلۡعُرۡجُونِ اِ۬لۡقَدِيمِ

37:6.base_text: Indeed, We have adorned the lowest heaven with an adornment, the planets,
37:6.duri_abu_amr_text: Indeed, We have adorned the lower heaven with the adornment of planets,
37:6.susi_text: Indeed, We have adorned the lower heaven with the adornment of planets,

37:6.susi_ar_text: إِنَّا زَيَّنَّا  اَ۬لسَّمَآءَ اَ۬لدُّنۡيۭا بِزِينَةِ اِ۬لۡكَوَاكِبِ

37:8.base_text: They cannot eavesdrop on the Higher Assembly, for they get bombarded from every side—
37:8.duri_abu_amr_text: They cannot hear the Higher Assembly, for they get bombarded from every side—
37:8.susi_text: They cannot hear the Higher Assembly, for they get bombarded from every side—
37:8.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: لَّا يَسۡمَعُونَ إِلَى اَ۬لۡمَلَإِ اِ۬لۡأَعۡلَىٰ وَيُقۡذَفُونَ مِن كُلِّ جَانِبٖ
37:8.susi_ar_text: لَّا يَسۡمَعُونَ إِلَى اَ۬لۡمَلَإِ اِ۬لۡأَعۡلَىٰ وَيُقۡذَفُونَ مِن كُلِّ جَانِبٖ

38:59.susi_text: And other (torments) similar to it, of diverse kinds.

38:59.susi_ar_text: هَٰذَا فَوۡجٞ  مُّقۡتَحِمٞ مَّعَكُمۡ لَا مَرۡحَبَۢا بِهِمۡۚ إِنَّهُمۡ صَالُواْ اُ۬لنّ۪ارِ

38:63.base_text: And they said, “What is it with us that we do not see men whom we used to count among the villains?
38:63.duri_abu_amr_text: And they said, “What is it with us that we do not see men whom we used to count among the villains—
38:63.susi_text: And they said, “What is it with us that we do not see men whom we used to count among the villains—
38:63.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: اِ۪تَّخَذۡنَٰهُمۡ سِخۡرِيًّاۖ أَمۡ زَاغَتۡ عَنۡهُمُ اُ۬لۡأَبۡصَٰرُ
38:63.susi_ar_text: اِ۪تَّخَذۡنَٰهُمۡ  سِخۡرِيًّا أَمۡ زَاغَتۡ عَنۡهُمُ اُ۬لۡأَبۡصَٰرُ

38:64.base_text: Did we take them with mockery, or have our sight(s) swerved from them?
38:64.duri_abu_amr_text: whom we took with mockery, or have our sight(s) swerved from them?
38:64.susi_text: whom we took with mockery, or have our sight(s) swerved from them?

38:84.base_text: except for your sincere chosen servants among them.”
38:84.duri_abu_amr_text: except for your sincere servants among them.”
38:84.susi_text: except for your sincere servants among them.”

38:85.base_text: He said, “So the truth is—and only the truth I say—
38:85.duri_abu_amr_text: He said, “So (by) the truth—and only the truth I say—
38:85.susi_text: He said, “So (by) the truth—and only the truth I say—
38:85.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: ۞ قَالَ فَاَلۡحَقَّ وَاَلۡحَقَّ أَقُولُ لَأَمۡلَأَنَّ جَهَنَّمَ مِنكَ وَمِمَّن تَبِعَكَ مِنۡهُمۡ أَجۡمَعِينَ
38:85.susi_ar_text: ۞ قَالَ فَاَلۡحَقَّ وَاَلۡحَقَّ أَقُول لَّأَمۡلَأَنَّ جَهَنَّم مِّنكَ وَمِمَّن تَبِعَكَ مِنۡهُمۡ  أَجۡمَعِينَ

39:8.base_text: And when some harm touches man, he calls upon his Lord, in penitence to Him. But then, when He confers on him a blessing of His, he forgets what he was previously calling upon for, and he sets up rivals to Allah in order to make (people) stray from His way. Say, “Enjoy yoursg denial for a little while; you are one of the fellows of the Fire.”
39:8.duri_abu_amr_text: And when some harm touches man, he calls upon his Lord, in penitence to Him. But then, when He confers on him a blessing of His, he forgets what he was previously calling upon for, and he sets up rivals to Allah in order to stray from His way. Say, “Enjoy yoursg denial for a little while; you are one of the fellows of the Fire.”
39:8.susi_text: And when some harm touches man, he calls upon his Lord, in penitence to Him. But then, when He confers on him a blessing of His, he forgets what he was previously calling upon for, and he sets up rivals to Allah in order to stray from His way. Say, “Enjoy yoursg denial for a little while; you are one of the fellows of the Fire.”
39:8.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: ۞ وَإِذَا مَسَّ اَ۬لۡإِنسَٰنَ ضُرّٞ دَعَا رَبَّهُۥ مُنِيبًا إِلَيۡهِ ثُمَّ إِذَا خَوَّلَهُۥ نِعۡمَةٗ مِّنۡهُ نَسِيَ مَا كَانَ يَدۡعُوٓاْ إِلَيۡهِ مِن قَبۡلُ وَجَعَلَ لِلَّهِ أَندَادٗا لِّيَضِلَّ عَن سَبِيلِهِۦۚ قُلۡ تَمَتَّعۡ بِكُفۡرِكَ قَلِيلًا إِنَّكَ مِنۡ أَصۡحَٰبِ اِ۬لنّ۪ارِ
39:8.susi_ar_text: ۞ وَإِذَا مَسَّ اَ۬لۡإِنسَٰنَ ضُرّٞ دَعَا رَبَّهُۥ مُنِيبًا إِلَيۡهِ ثُمَّ إِذَا خَوَّلَهُۥ نِعۡمَةٗ  مِّنۡهُ نَسِيَ مَا كَانَ يَدۡعُواْ إِلَيۡهِ مِن قَبۡلُ وَجَعَل لِّلَّهِ أَندَادٗا لِّيَضِلَّ  عَن سَبِيلِهِۦۚ قُلۡ تَمَتَّعۡ بِكُفۡرِك قَّلِيلًا إِنَّكَ مِنۡ أَصۡحَٰبِ اِ۬لنّ۪ارِ

39:71.base_text: And those who denied were driven to Hell in throngs, until, when they had reached it, its gates were opened and its keepers said to them, “Did not messengers from among you come to you, reading to you the signs of your Lord and warning you of the meeting of this day of yours?” They said, “Yes, indeed!” But the word of punishment proved true against the deniers.
39:71.duri_abu_amr_text: And those who denied were driven to Hell in throngs, until, when they had reached it, its gates were opened wide and its keepers said to them, “Did not messengers from among you come to you, reading to you the signs of your Lord and warning you of the meeting of this day of yours?” They said, “Yes, indeed!” But the word of punishment proved true against the deniers.
39:71.susi_text: And those who denied were driven to Hell in throngs, until, when they had reached it, its gates were opened wide and its keepers said to them, “Did not messengers from among you come to you, reading to you the signs of your Lord and warning you of the meeting of this day of yours?” They said, “Yes, indeed!” But the word of punishment proved true against the deniers.
39:71.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: وَسِيقَ اَ۬لَّذِينَ كَفَرُوٓاْ إِلَىٰ جَهَنَّمَ زُمَرًاۖ حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا جَآءُوهَا فُتِّحَتۡ أَبۡوَٰبُهَا وَقَالَ لَهُمۡ خَزَنَتُهَآ أَلَمۡ يَأۡتِكُمۡ رُسُلٞ مِّنكُمۡ يَتۡلُونَ عَلَيۡكُمۡ ءَايَٰتِ رَبِّكُمۡ وَيُنذِرُونَكُمۡ لِقَآءَ يَوۡمِكُمۡ هَٰذَاۚ قَالُواْ بَلَىٰ وَلَٰكِنۡ حَقَّتۡ كَلِمَةُ اُ۬لۡعَذَابِ عَلَى اَ۬لۡكٰ۪فِرِينَ
39:71.susi_ar_text: وَسِيقَ اَ۬لَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ إِلَىٰ جَهَنَّمَ زُمَرًاۖ حَتَّىٰ إِذَا جَآءُوهَا  فُتِّحَتۡ أَبۡوَٰبُهَا وَقَال لَّهُمۡ خَزَنَتُهَا أَلَمۡ يَاتِكُمۡ رُسُلٞ مِّنكُمۡ  يَتۡلُونَ عَلَيۡكُمۡ ءَايَٰتِ رَبِّكُمۡ وَيُنذِرُونَكُمۡ لِقَآءَ يَوۡمِكُمۡ  هَٰذَاۚ قَالُواْ بَلَىٰ وَلَٰكِنۡ حَقَّتۡ كَلِمَةُ اُ۬لۡعَذَابِ عَلَى اَ۬لۡكٰ۪فِرِينَ

39:73.base_text: And those who were mindful of their Lord were driven to the Garden (of Paradise) in throngs, until, when they had reached it and its gates were opened and its keepers said to them, “Peace be upon you, you have been good, so enter it, to abide.”
39:73.duri_abu_amr_text: And those who were mindful of their Lord were driven to the Garden (of Paradise) in throngs, until, when they had reached it and its gates were opened wide and its keepers said to them, “Peace be upon you, you have been good, so enter it, to abide.”
39:73.susi_text: And those who were mindful of their Lord were driven to the Garden (of Paradise) in throngs, until, when they had reached it and its gates were opened wide and its keepers said to them, “Peace be upon you, you have been good, so enter it, to abide.”
39:73.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: وَسِيقَ اَ۬لَّذِينَ اَ۪تَّقَوۡاْ رَبَّهُمۡ إِلَى اَ۬لۡجَنَّةِ زُمَرًاۖ حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا جَآءُوهَا وَفُتِّحَتۡ أَبۡوَٰبُهَا وَقَالَ لَهُمۡ خَزَنَتُهَا سَلَٰمٌ عَلَيۡكُمۡ طِبۡتُمۡ فَاَدۡخُلُوهَا خَٰلِدِينَ
39:73.susi_ar_text: وَسِيقَ اَ۬لَّذِينَ اَ۪تَّقَوۡاْ رَبَّهُمۡ إِلَى اَ۬لۡجَنَّة  زُّمَرًاۖ حَتَّىٰ إِذَا جَآءُوهَا وَفُتِّحَتۡ أَبۡوَٰبُهَا وَقَال لَّهُمۡ خَزَنَتُهَا  سَلَٰمٌ عَلَيۡكُمۡ طِبۡتُمۡ فَاَدۡخُلُوهَا خَٰلِدِينَ

40:13.base_text: It is He who shows youpl His signs and bestows—from on high—provision from heaven for you. But none reminds himself except whoever is penitent.
40:13.duri_abu_amr_text: It is He who shows youpl His signs and sends down provision from heaven for you. But none reminds himself except whoever is penitent.
40:13.susi_text: It is He who shows youpl His signs and sends down provision from heaven for you. But none reminds himself except whoever is penitent.
40:13.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: هُوَ اَ۬لَّذِي يُرِيكُمۡ ءَايَٰتِهِۦ وَيُنزِلُ لَكُم مِّنَ اَ۬لسَّمَآءِ رِزۡقٗاۚ وَمَا يَتَذَكَّرُ إِلَّا مَن يُنِيبُ
40:13.susi_ar_text: هُوَ اَ۬لَّذِي يُرِيكُمۡ ءَايَٰتِهِۦ وَيُنزِل لَّكُم مِّنَ  اَ۬لسَّمَآءِ رِزۡقٗاۚ وَمَا يَتَذَكَّرُ إِلَّا مَن يُنِيبُ

40:35.base_text: Those who argue against Allah’s signs without any manifestation having come to them—this is most loathsome to Allah and to those who have attained faith; thus Allah seals the heart of every arrogant compeller.
40:35.duri_abu_amr_text: . . . thus Allah seals every arrogant compelling heart.
40:35.susi_text: . . . thus Allah seals every arrogant compelling heart.
40:35.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: اِ۬لَّذِينَ يُجَٰدِلُونَ فِيٓ ءَايَٰتِ اِ۬للَّهِ بِغَيۡرِ سُلۡطَٰنٍ أَتَىٰهُمۡۖ كَبُرَ مَقۡتًا عِندَ اَ۬للَّهِ وَعِندَ اَ۬لَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْۚ كَذَٰلِكَ يَطۡبَعُ اُ۬للَّهُ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ قَلۡبٖ مُّتَكَبِّرٖ جَبّ۪ارٖ
40:35.susi_ar_text: اِ۬لَّذِينَ يُجَٰدِلُونَ فِي ءَايَٰتِ اِ۬للَّهِ بِغَيۡرِ سُلۡطَٰنٍ  أَتَىٰهُمۡۖ كَبُرَ مَقۡتًا عِندَ اَ۬للَّهِ وَعِندَ اَ۬لَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْۚ كَذَٰلِكَ  يَطۡبَعُ اُ۬للَّهُ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ قَلۡبٖ مُّتَكَبِّرٖ جَبّ۪ارٖ

40:37.base_text: the means of the heavens, so that I may view the God of Moses, though I surely think he is a liar.” And thus Pharaoh’s evil deeds were adorned for him and he was barred from the way, for Pharaoh’s plotting is in nothing but ruin.
40:37.duri_abu_amr_text: . . . and he barred (others) from the way . . .
40:37.susi_text: . . . and he barred (others) from the way . . .
40:37.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: أَسۡبَٰبَ اَ۬لسَّمَٰوَٰتِ فَأَطَّلِعُ إِلَىٰٓ إِلَٰهِ مُوسۭيٰ وَإِنِّي لَأَظُنُّهُۥ كَٰذِبٗاۚ وَكَذَٰلِكَ زُيِّنَ لِفِرۡعَوۡنَ سُوٓءُ عَمَلِهِۦ وَصَدَّ عَنِ اِ۬لسَّبِيلِۚ وَمَا كَيۡدُ فِرۡعَوۡنَ إِلَّا فِي تَبَابٖ
40:37.susi_ar_text: أَسۡبَٰبَ  اَ۬لسَّمَٰوَٰتِ فَأَطَّلِعُ إِلَىٰ إِلَٰهِ مُوسۭيٰ وَإِنِّي لَأَظُنُّهُۥ كَٰذِبٗاۚ  وَكَذَٰلِكَ زُيِّن لِّفِرۡعَوۡنَ سُوٓءُ عَمَلِهِۦ وَصَدَّ عَنِ اِ۬لسَّبِيلِۚ  وَمَا كَيۡدُ فِرۡعَوۡنَ إِلَّا فِي تَبَابٖ

40:40.base_text: Whoever has committed an evil deed will not be repaid except with its like, but whoever has acted righteously, whether male or female, while a believer—then those shall enter the Garden (of Paradise) where they shall be provided for without measure.
40:40.duri_abu_amr_text: . . . then those shall be entered into the Garden . . .
40:40.susi_text: . . . then those shall be entered into the Garden . . .
40:40.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: مَنۡ عَمِلَ سَيِّئَةٗ فَلَا يُجۡزَىٰٓ إِلَّا مِثۡلَهَاۖ وَمَنۡ عَمِلَ صَٰلِحٗا مِّن ذَكَرٍ أَوۡ أُنثۭيٰ وَهۡوَ مُؤۡمِنٞ فَأُوْلَٰٓئِكَ يُدۡخَلُونَ اَ۬لۡجَنَّةَ يُرۡزَقُونَ فِيهَا بِغَيۡرِ حِسَابٖ
40:40.susi_ar_text: مَنۡ عَمِلَ سَيِّئَةٗ فَلَا يُجۡزَىٰ إِلَّا مِثۡلَهَاۖ  وَمَنۡ عَمِلَ صَٰلِحٗا مِّن ذَكَرٍ أَوۡ أُنثۭيٰ وَهۡوَ مُومِنٞ فَأُوْلَٰٓئِكَ  يُدۡخَلُونَ اَ۬لۡجَنَّةَ يُرۡزَقُونَ فِيهَا بِغَيۡرِ حِسَابٖ

40:46.base_text: the Fire—they are exposed to it in the early morning and at nightfall, and on the day the Hour takes place (it is said): “Enter pl Pharaoh’s folk into the most intense punishment.”
40:46.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: اِ۬لنَّارُ يُعۡرَضُونَ عَلَيۡهَا غُدُوّٗا وَعَشِيّٗاۖ وَيَوۡمَ تَقُومُ اُ۬لسَّاعَةُ اُ۟دۡخُلُوٓاْ ءَالَ فِرۡعَوۡنَ أَشَدَّ اَ۬لۡعَذَابِ
40:46.susi_ar_text: اِ۬لنَّارُ يُعۡرَضُونَ  عَلَيۡهَا غُدُوّٗا وَعَشِيّٗاۚ وَيَوۡمَ تَقُومُ اُ۬لسَّاعَةُ اُ۟دۡخُلُواْ ءَالَ  فِرۡعَوۡنَ أَشَدَّ اَ۬لۡعَذَابِ

40:58.base_text: And in no way are the blind and the seeing equal, nor are those who have attained faith and have done righteous deeds (equal) to the evildoer. How little you remind yourselves!
40:58.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: وَمَا يَسۡتَوِي اِ۬لۡأَعۡمَىٰ وَاَلۡبَصِيرُ وَاَلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَعَمِلُواْ اُ۬لصَّٰلِحَٰتِ وَلَا اَ۬لۡمُسِيٓءُۚ قَلِيلٗا مَّا يَتَذَكَّرُونَ
40:58.susi_ar_text: وَمَا يَسۡتَوِي اِ۬لۡأَعۡمَىٰ وَاَلۡبَصِيرُ وَاَلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَعَمِلُواْ  اُ۬لصَّٰلِحَٰتِ وَلَا اَ۬لۡمُسِيٓءُۚ قَلِيلٗا مَّا يَتَذَكَّرُونَ

41:47.base_text: To Him is referred (all) knowledge of the Hour. And no products come out of their sheaths nor does any female carry or deliver but with His knowledge. And on the day when He calls out to them, “Where are My associates?” They said, “We declare to You, none of us is a witness.”
41:47.duri_abu_amr_text: And no product comes out of its sheaths nor does anyfemale conceive or deliver but with His knowledge.
41:47.susi_text: And no product comes out of its sheaths nor does anyfemale conceive or deliver but with His knowledge.
41:47.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: ۞ إِلَيۡهِ يُرَدُّ عِلۡمُ اُ۬لسَّاعَةِۚ وَمَا تَخۡرُجُ مِن ثَمَرَتٖ مِّنۡ أَكۡمَامِهَا وَمَا تَحۡمِلُ مِنۡ أُنثۭيٰ وَلَا تَضَعُ إِلَّا بِعِلۡمِهِۦۚ وَيَوۡمَ يُنَادِيهِمۡ أَيۡنَ شُرَكَآءِي قَالُوٓاْ ءَاذَنَّٰكَ مَا مِنَّا مِن شَهِيدٖ
41:47.susi_ar_text: ۞ إِلَيۡهِ يُرَدُّ عِلۡمُ اُ۬لسَّاعَةِۚ وَمَا تَخۡرُجُ مِن ثَمَرَتٖ مِّنۡ أَكۡمَامِهَا  وَمَا تَحۡمِلُ مِنۡ أُنثۭيٰ وَلَا تَضَعُ إِلَّا بِعِلۡمِهِۦۚ وَيَوۡمَ يُنَادِيهِمۡ أَيۡنَ  شُرَكَآءِي قَالُواْ ءَاذَنَّٰكَ مَا مِنَّا مِن شَهِيدٖ

42:5.base_text: The heavens almost splinter from above them, while the angels exalt their Lord with praise and ask forgiveness for those on earth. Undoubtedly, Allah is indeed the Oft-Forgiving, the Bestower of mercy.
42:5.duri_abu_amr_text: The heavens almost split apart from above them . . .
42:5.susi_text: The heavens almost split apart from above them . . .
42:5.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: ۞ تَكَادُ اُ۬لسَّمَٰوَٰتُ يَنفَطِرۡنَ مِن فَوۡقِهِنَّۚ وَاَلۡمَلَٰٓئِكَةُ يُسَبِّحُونَ بِحَمۡدِ رَبِّهِمۡ وَيَسۡتَغۡفِرُونَ لِمَن فِي اِ۬لۡأَرۡضِۗ أَلَآ إِنَّ اَ۬للَّهَ هُوَ اَ۬لۡغَفُورُ اُ۬لرَّحِيمُ
42:5.susi_ar_text: ۞ تَكَادُ اُ۬لسَّمَٰوَٰتُ يَنفَطِرۡنَ مِن فَوۡقِهِنَّۚ  وَاَلۡمَلَٰٓئِكَةُ يُسَبِّحُونَ بِحَمۡدِ رَبِّهِمۡ وَيَسۡتَغۡفِرُونَ لِمَن فِي  اِ۬لۡأَرۡضِۗ أَلَا إِنَّ اَ۬للَّه هُّوَ اَ۬لۡغَفُورُ اُ۬لرَّحِيمُ

42:25.base_text: And it is He who accepts the repentance of His servants, and pardons evil deeds, and knows what youpl dob;
42:25.duri_abu_amr_text: And it is He who accepts the repentance of His servants, and pardons evil deeds, and knows what they do;
42:25.susi_text: And it is He who accepts the repentance of His servants, and pardons evil deeds, and knows what they do;
42:25.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: وَهۡوَ اَ۬لَّذِي يَقۡبَلُ اُ۬لتَّوۡبَةَ عَنۡ عِبَادِهِۦ وَيَعۡفُواْ عَنِ اِ۬لسَّيِّـَٔاتِ وَيَعۡلَمُ مَا يَفۡعَلُونَ
42:25.susi_ar_text: وَهۡوَ اَ۬لَّذِي يَقۡبَلُ اُ۬لتَّوۡبَةَ عَنۡ عِبَادِهِۦ وَيَعۡفُواْ عَنِ اِ۬لسَّيِّـَٔاتِ  وَيَعۡلَم مَّا يَفۡعَلُونَ

42:27.base_text: And if Allah were to extend provision for His servants, they would oppress (others) on earth. Rather, He bestowsa from on high in precise measure whatever He wills; indeed, regarding His servants, He is All-Aware, All-Seeing.
42:27.duri_abu_amr_text: And if Allah were to extend provision for His servants, they would oppress (others) on earth, but He sends down in precise measure whatever He wills; indeed, regarding His servants, He is All-Aware, All-Seeing.
42:27.susi_text: And if Allah were to extend provision for His servants, they would oppress (others) on earth, but He sends down in precise measure whatever He wills; indeed, regarding His servants, He is All-Aware, All-Seeing.
42:27.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: وَلَوۡ بَسَطَ اَ۬للَّهُ اُ۬لرِّزۡقَ لِعِبَادِهِۦ لَبَغَوۡاْ فِي اِ۬لۡأَرۡضِ وَلَٰكِن يُنزِلُ بِقَدَرٖ مَّا يَشَآءُۚ اِ۪نَّهُۥ بِعِبَادِهِۦ خَبِيرُۢ بَصِيرٞ
42:27.susi_ar_text: وَلَوۡ بَسَطَ اَ۬للَّهُ اُ۬لرِّزۡقَ لِعِبَادِهِۦ لَبَغَوۡاْ فِي اِ۬لۡأَرۡضِ  وَلَٰكِن يُنزِلُ بِقَدَرٖ مَّا يَشَآءُۚ اِ۪نَّهُۥ بِعِبَادِهِۦ خَبِيرُۢ بَصِيرٞ

42:28.base_text: And it is He who bestowsb rain from on high, after they have despaired, and unfolds His mercy, and it is He Who is the Ultimate Guardian, the Praiseworthy.
42:28.duri_abu_amr_text: And it is He who sends down rain after they have despaired, and unfolds His mercy, and it is He Who is the Ultimate Guardian, the Praiseworthy.
42:28.susi_text: And it is He who sends down rain after they have despaired, and unfolds His mercy, and it is He Who is the Ultimate Guardian, the Praiseworthy.
42:28.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: وَهۡوَ اَ۬لَّذِي يُنزِلُ اُ۬لۡغَيۡثَ مِنۢ بَعۡدِ مَا قَنَطُواْ وَيَنشُرُ رَحۡمَتَهُۥۚ وَهۡوَ اَ۬لۡوَلِيُّ اُ۬لۡحَمِيدُ
42:28.susi_ar_text: وَهۡوَ اَ۬لَّذِي  يُنزِلُ اُ۬لۡغَيۡثَ مِنۢ بَعۡدِ مَا قَنَطُواْ وَيَنشُر رَّحۡمَتَهُۥۚ وَهۡوَ اَ۬لۡوَلِيُّ اُ۬لۡحَمِيدُ

43:10.base_text: He Who made the earth a cradlec for youpl and traced in it ways for you, that you may be guided.
43:10.duri_abu_amr_text: He Who made the earth a resting place for youpl and traced in it ways for you, that you may be guided.
43:10.susi_text: He Who made the earth a resting place for youpl and traced in it ways for you, that you may be guided.
43:10.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: اُ۬لَّذِي جَعَلَ لَكُمُ اُ۬لۡأَرۡضَ مِهَٰدٗا وَجَعَلَ لَكُمۡ فِيهَا سُبُلٗا لَّعَلَّكُمۡ تَهۡتَدُونَ
43:10.susi_ar_text: اُ۬لَّذِي جَعَل لَّكُمُ اُ۬لۡأَرۡضَ  مِهَٰدٗا وَجَعَل لَّكُمۡ فِيهَا سُبُلٗا لَّعَلَّكُمۡ تَهۡتَدُونَ

43:18.base_text: (thinking) “What! Someone brought up f amid adornments and, in conflict, cannot be evident?”
43:18.duri_abu_amr_text: (thinking) “What! Someone growing up amid adornments and, in conflict, cannot be evident?”
43:18.susi_text: (thinking) “What! Someone growing up amid adornments and, in conflict, cannot be evident?”
43:18.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: أَوَمَن يَنشَؤُاْ فِي اِ۬لۡحِلۡيَةِ وَهۡوَ فِي اِ۬لۡخِصَامِ غَيۡرُ مُبِينٖ
43:18.susi_ar_text: أَوَ مَن يَنشَؤُاْ فِي  اِ۬لۡحِلۡيَةِ وَهۡوَ فِي اِ۬لۡخِصَامِ غَيۡرُ مُبِينٖ

43:24.base_text: He would sayc, “Even if Id have come to youpl with better guidance than what you found your forefathers following?” They would say, “Indeed, we deny what youpl are sent with.”
43:24.duri_abu_amr_text: Saysg, “Even if I have come to youpl with better guidance than what you found your forefathers following?” They would say, “Indeed, we deny what youpl are sent with.”
43:24.susi_text: Saysg, “Even if I have come to youpl with better guidance than what you found your forefathers following?” They would say, “Indeed, we deny what youpl are sent with.”
43:24.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: ۞ قُلۡ أَوَلَوۡ جِئۡتُكُم بِأَهۡدَىٰ مِمَّا وَجَدتُّمۡ عَلَيۡهِ ءَابَآءَكُمۡۖ قَالُوٓاْ إِنَّا بِمَآ أُرۡسِلۡتُم بِهِۦ كَٰفِرُونَ
43:24.susi_ar_text: ۞ قُلۡ أَوَلَوۡ جِيتُكُم بِأَهۡدَىٰ مِمَّا وَجَدتُّمۡ عَلَيۡهِ ءَابَآءَكُمۡۖ قَالُواْ  إِنَّا بِمَا أُرۡسِلۡتُم بِهِۦ كَٰفِرُونَ

43:33.base_text: Were it not that humanity would become a single (ungodly) community, We would have provided those who deny the All-Merciful with roofsg of silver to their houses, and stairways (of silver) by which they ascend,
43:33.duri_abu_amr_text: Were it not that humanity would become a single (ungodly) community, We would have provided those who deny the All-Merciful with a roof of silver to their houses, and stairways (of silver) by which they ascend,
43:33.susi_text: Were it not that humanity would become a single (ungodly) community, We would have provided those who deny the All-Merciful with a roof of silver to their houses, and stairways (of silver) by which they ascend,
43:33.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: وَلَوۡلَآ أَن يَكُونَ اَ۬لنَّاسُ أُمَّةٗ وَٰحِدَةٗ لَّجَعَلۡنَا لِمَن يَكۡفُرُ بِالرَّحۡمَٰنِ لِبُيُوتِهِمۡ سَقۡفٗا مِّن فِضَّةٖ وَمَعَارِجَ عَلَيۡهَا يَظۡهَرُونَ
43:33.susi_ar_text: وَلَوۡلَا  أَن يَكُونَ اَ۬لنَّاسُ أُمَّةٗ وَٰحِدَةٗ لَّجَعَلۡنَا لِمَن يَكۡفُرُ بِالرَّحۡمَٰنِ  لِبُيُوتِهِمۡ سَقۡفٗا مِّن فِضَّةٖ وَمَعَارِجَ عَلَيۡهَا يَظۡهَرُونَ

43:35.base_text: and (golden) decorations. Yet all that is nothingh but the enjoyment of the Earlier Life, whereas the Hereafter with yoursg Lord is for the ones who are mindful (of God).
43:35.duri_abu_amr_text: and (golden) decorations. Indeed all that is merely the enjoyment of the Earlier Life, whereas the Hereafter with yoursg Lord is for the ones who are mindful (of God).
43:35.susi_text: and (golden) decorations. Indeed all that is merely the enjoyment of the Earlier Life, whereas the Hereafter with yoursg Lord is for the ones who are mindful (of God).
43:35.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: وَزُخۡرُفٗاۚ وَإِن كُلُّ ذَٰلِكَ لَمَا مَتَٰعُ اُ۬لۡحَيَوٰةِ اِ۬لدُّنۡيۭاۚ وَاَلۡأٓخِرَةُ عِندَ رَبِّكَ لِلۡمُتَّقِينَ
43:35.susi_ar_text: وَزُخۡرُفٗاۚ وَإِن  كُلُّ ذَٰلِكَ لَمَا مَتَٰعُ اُ۬لۡحَيَوٰةِ اِ۬لدُّنۡيۭاۚ وَاَلۡأٓخِرَةُ عِندَ رَبِّكَ  لِلۡمُتَّقِينَ

43:71.base_text: They are served around with trays of gold and cups, and therein is whatever is desirede by the selves and delights the eyes, and therein youpl abide.
43:71.duri_abu_amr_text: They are served around with trays of gold and cups, and therein is whatever the selves desire and delights the eyes, and therein youpl abide.
43:71.susi_text: They are served around with trays of gold and cups, and therein is whatever the selves desire and delights the eyes, and therein youpl abide.
43:71.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: يُطَافُ عَلَيۡهِم بِصِحَافٖ مِّن ذَهَبٖ وَأَكۡوَابٖۖ وَفِيهَا مَا تَشۡتَهِي اِ۬لۡأَنفُسُ وَتَلَذُّ اُ۬لۡأَعۡيُنُۖ وَأَنتُمۡ فِيهَا خَٰلِدُونَ
43:71.susi_ar_text: يُطَافُ عَلَيۡهِم بِصِحَافٖ مِّن ذَهَبٖ وَأَكۡوَابٖۖ  وَفِيهَا مَا تَشۡتَهِي اِ۬لۡأَنفُسُ وَتَلَذُّ اُ۬لۡأَعۡيُنُۖ وَأَنتُمۡ فِيهَا  خَٰلِدُونَ

44:7.base_text: (from the) Lordg of the heavens and the earth and what is between them, if youpl (can ever) believe with certitude.
44:7.duri_abu_amr_text: (He is the) Lord of the heavens and the earth and what is between them, if youpl (can ever) believe with certitude.
44:7.susi_text: (He is the) Lord of the heavens and the earth and what is between them, if youpl (can ever) believe with certitude.
44:7.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: رَبُّ اُ۬لسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَاَلۡأَرۡضِ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَآۖ إِن كُنتُم مُّوقِنِينَ
44:7.susi_ar_text: رَبُّ اُ۬لسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَاَلۡأَرۡضِ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَاۖ  إِن كُنتُم مُّوقِنِينَ

44:43-45.base_text: Indeed, the Tree of Zaqqumb 44 is the food of the sinful one, 45 like molten brass boilingc in the bellies
44:43-45.duri_abu_amr_text: Indeed, the tree of Zaqqum is the food of the sinful one— 45 like molten brass—boiling in the bellies
44:43-45.susi_text: Indeed, the tree of Zaqqum is the food of the sinful one— 45 like molten brass—boiling in the bellies

45:11.base_text: This is guidance, but those who have denied their Lord’s signs—for them is a painful punishment of torment.
45:11.duri_abu_amr_text: This is guidance, but those who have denied their Lord’s signs—for them is a punishment of a painful torment.
45:11.susi_text: This is guidance, but those who have denied their Lord’s signs—for them is a punishment of a painful torment.
45:11.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: هَٰذَا هُدٗىۖ وَاَلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ بِـَٔايَٰتِ رَبِّهِمۡ لَهُمۡ عَذَابٞ مِّن رِّجۡزٍ أَلِيمٍ
45:11.susi_ar_text: هَٰذَا هُدٗىۖ وَاَلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ بِـَٔايَٰتِ رَبِّهِمۡ لَهُمۡ عَذَابٞ مِّن  رِّجۡزٍ أَلِيمٍ

45:21.base_text: Or do those who have perpetrated evil deeds assume that We will make them as equal to those who have attained faith and have done righteous deeds, whether in their life or their death? Miserable is their judgment!
45:21.duri_abu_amr_text: Or do those who have perpetrated evil deeds assume that We will make them as those who have attained faith and have done righteous deeds? Equal is their life or their death; miserable is their judgment!
45:21.susi_text: Or do those who have perpetrated evil deeds assume that We will make them as those who have attained faith and have done righteous deeds? Equal is their life or their death; miserable is their judgment!
45:21.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: أَمۡ حَسِبَ اَ۬لَّذِينَ اَ۪جۡتَرَحُواْ اُ۬لسَّيِّـَٔاتِ أَن نَّجۡعَلَهُمۡ كَاَلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَعَمِلُواْ اُ۬لصَّٰلِحَٰتِ سَوَآءٞ مَّحۡيَاهُمۡ وَمَمَاتُهُمۡۚ سَآءَ مَا يَحۡكُمُونَ
45:21.susi_ar_text: أَمۡ حَسِبَ اَ۬لَّذِينَ اَ۪جۡتَرَحُواْ اُ۬لسَّيِّـَٔاتِ أَن نَّجۡعَلَهُمۡ كَاَلَّذِينَ  ءَامَنُواْ وَعَمِلُواْ اُ۬لصَّٰلِحَٰت سَّوَآءٞ مَّحۡيَاهُمۡ وَمَمَاتُهُمۡۚ سَآءَ  مَا يَحۡكُمُونَ

45:24.base_text: Have yousg seen the one who has taken his own whim as his god, and Allah has misguided him despite his knowledge, and has sealed his hearing and his heart, and has placed a veil over his sight? Who will guide him after Allah? Will you not remind yourselves?
45:24.duri_abu_amr_text: Have yousg seen the one who has taken his own whim as his god, and Allah has misguided him despite his knowledge, and has sealed his hearing and his heart, and has placed a veil over his sight? Who will guide him after Allah? Will you not constantly remind yourselves?
45:24.susi_text: Have yousg seen the one who has taken his own whim as his god, and Allah has misguided him despite his knowledge, and has sealed his hearing and his heart, and has placed a veil over his sight? Who will guide him after Allah? Will you not constantly remind yourselves?
45:24.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: وَقَالُواْ مَا هِيَ إِلَّا حَيَاتُنَا اَ۬لدُّنۡيۭا نَمُوتُ وَنَحۡيَا وَمَا يُهۡلِكُنَآ إِلَّا اَ۬لدَّهۡرُۚ وَمَا لَهُم بِذَٰلِكَ مِنۡ عِلۡمٍۖ إِنۡ هُمۡ إِلَّا يَظُنُّونَ
45:24.susi_ar_text: وَقَالُواْ مَا هِيَ إِلَّا حَيَاتُنَا اَ۬لدُّنۡيۭا نَمُوتُ وَنَحۡيَا وَمَا يُهۡلِكُنَا  إِلَّا اَ۬لدَّهۡرُۚ وَمَا لَهُم بِذَٰلِكَ مِنۡ عِلۡمٍۖ إِنۡ هُمۡ إِلَّا يَظُنُّونَ

46:15.base_text: And We have enjoined upon man excelling in showing kindness to his parents; his mother carried him with difficulty and delivered him with difficulty; his carriage and weaning are thirty months. Until, when he has attained his full strength and has reached forty years, he says, “Lord, enable me to appreciate the blessings with which You have blessed me and my parents, and to do righteousness that well pleases You, and grant me righteousness in my offspring. Indeed, I have repented to You, and indeed I am of the Muslims.”
46:15.duri_abu_amr_text: And We have enjoined upon man kindness to his parents; his mother carried him with difficulty and delivered him with difficulty; his carriage and weaning are thirty months. Until, when he has attained his full strength and has reached forty years, he says, “Lord, enable me to appreciate the blessings with which You have blessed me and my parents, and to do righteousness that well pleases You, and grant me righteousness in my offspring. Indeed, I have repented to You, and indeed I am of the Muslims.”
46:15.susi_text: And We have enjoined upon man kindness to his parents; his mother carried him with difficulty and delivered him with difficulty; his carriage and weaning are thirty months. Until, when he has attained his full strength and has reached forty years, he says, “Lord, enable me to appreciate the blessings with which You have blessed me and my parents, and to do righteousness that well pleases You, and grant me righteousness in my offspring. Indeed, I have repented to You, and indeed I am of the Muslims.”

46:16.base_text: Those are the ones from whom We accept the best of what they have done and whose misdeeds We overlook ; (they are) among the fellows of the Garden (of Paradise) —the promise of truth which they had been promised.
46:16.duri_abu_amr_text: Those are the ones from whom the best of what they have done is bound to be accepted and whose misdeeds are bound to be overlooked ; (they are) among the fellows of the Garden (of Paradise) —the promise of truth which they had been promised.
46:16.susi_text: Those are the ones from whom the best of what they have done is bound to be accepted and whose misdeeds are bound to be overlooked ; (they are) among the fellows of the Garden (of Paradise) —the promise of truth which they had been promised.
46:16.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: أُوْلَٰٓئِكَ اَ۬لَّذِينَ يُتَقَبَّلُ عَنۡهُمۡ أَحۡسَنُ مَا عَمِلُواْ وَيُتَجَاوَزُ عَن سَيِّـَٔاتِهِمۡ فِيٓ أَصۡحَٰبِ اِ۬لۡجَنَّةِۖ وَعۡدَ اَ۬لصِّدۡقِ اِ۬لَّذِي كَانُواْ يُوعَدُونَ
46:16.susi_ar_text: أُوْلَٰٓئِكَ اَ۬لَّذِينَ يُتَقَبَّلُ  عَنۡهُمۡ أَحۡسَنُ مَا عَمِلُواْ وَيُتَجَاوَزُ عَن سَيِّـَٔاتِهِمۡ فِي أَصۡحَٰبِ  اِ۬لۡجَنَّةِۖ وَعۡدَ اَ۬لصِّدۡقِ اِ۬لَّذِي كَانُواْ يُوعَدُونَ

46:23.base_text: He said, “Indeed, all knowledge is only with Allah, and I proclaim to you what I have been sent with, but I see you are an ignorant people.”
46:23.duri_abu_amr_text: He said, “Indeed, all knowledge is only with Allah, and I compile and proclaim to you what I have been sent with, but I see you are an ignorant people.”
46:23.susi_text: He said, “Indeed, all knowledge is only with Allah, and I compile and proclaim to you what I have been sent with, but I see you are an ignorant people.”
46:23.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: قَالَ إِنَّمَا اَ۬لۡعِلۡمُ عِندَ اَ۬للَّهِ وَأُبۡلِغُكُم مَّآ أُرۡسِلۡتُ بِهِۦ وَلَٰكِنِّيَ أَر۪ىٰكُمۡ قَوۡمٗا تَجۡهَلُونَ
46:23.susi_ar_text: قَالَ إِنَّمَا اَ۬لۡعِلۡمُ عِندَ اَ۬للَّهِ  وَأُبۡلِغُكُم مَّا أُرۡسِلۡتُ بِهِۦ وَلَٰكِنِّيَ أَر۪ىٰكُمۡ قَوۡمٗا تَجۡهَلُونَ

46:25.base_text: “destroying everything by the command of its Lord.” And when the morning came upon them, nothing could be seen except their residences. Thus We repay the criminal people.
46:25.duri_abu_amr_text: “destroying everything by the command of its Lord.” And when the morning came upon them, yousg could see nothing except their residences. Thus We repay the criminal people.
46:25.susi_text: “destroying everything by the command of its Lord.” And when the morning came upon them, yousg could see nothing except their residences. Thus We repay the criminal people.
46:25.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: تُدَمِّرُ كُلَّ شَيۡءِۢ بِأَمۡرِ رَبِّهَا فَأَصۡبَحُواْ لَا تَر۪يٰٓ إِلَّا مَسَٰكِنَهُمۡۚ كَذَٰلِكَ نَجۡزِي اِ۬لۡقَوۡمَ اَ۬لۡمُجۡرِمِينَ
46:25.susi_ar_text: تُدَمِّرُ كُلَّ  شَيۡءِۢ بِأَمۡر رَّبِّهَا فَأَصۡبَحُواْ لَا تَر۪يٰ إِلَّا مَسَٰكِنَهُمۡۚ كَذَٰلِكَ نَجۡزِي  اِ۬لۡقَوۡمَ اَ۬لۡمُجۡرِمِينَ

47:26.base_text: Indeed, those who turned on their heels after guidance became evident to them—Satan has enticed them and has filled them with false hopes.
47:26.duri_abu_amr_text: Indeed, those who turned on their heels after guidance became evident to them—Satan has enticed them. Thus they were filled with false hopes.
47:26.susi_text: Indeed, those who turned on their heels after guidance became evident to them—Satan has enticed them. Thus they were filled with false hopes.
47:26.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: ذَٰلِكَ بِأَنَّهُمۡ قَالُواْ لِلَّذِينَ كَرِهُواْ مَا نَزَّلَ اَ۬للَّهُ سَنُطِيعُكُمۡ فِي بَعۡضِ اِ۬لۡأَمۡرِۖ وَاَللَّهُ يَعۡلَمُ أَسۡرَارَهُمۡ
47:26.susi_ar_text: ذَٰلِكَ بِأَنَّهُمۡ قَالُواْ لِلَّذِينَ كَرِهُواْ مَا نَزَّلَ اَ۬للَّهُ  سَنُطِيعُكُمۡ فِي بَعۡضِ اِ۬لۡأَمۡرِۖ وَاَللَّهُ يَعۡلَمُ أَسۡرَارَهُمۡ

47:30.base_text: That is because they said to those who hated what Allah had bestowed from on high, “We will obey you in certain matters.” But Allah knows their secret exchanges.
47:30.duri_abu_amr_text: That is because they said to those who hated what Allah had bestowed from on high, “We will obey you in certain matters.” But Allah knows their secrets.
47:30.susi_text: That is because they said to those who hated what Allah had bestowed from on high, “We will obey you in certain matters.” But Allah knows their secrets.
47:30.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: وَلَوۡ نَشَآءُ لَأَرَيۡنَٰكَهُمۡ فَلَعَرَفۡتَهُم بِسِيمٰۭهُمۡۚ وَلَتَعۡرِفَنَّهُمۡ فِي لَحۡنِ اِ۬لۡقَوۡلِۚ وَاَللَّهُ يَعۡلَمُ أَعۡمَٰلَكُمۡ
47:30.susi_ar_text: وَلَوۡ نَشَآءُ لَأَرَيۡنَٰكَهُمۡ فَلَعَرَفۡتَهُم بِسِيمٰۭهُمۡۚ وَلَتَعۡرِفَنَّهُمۡ فِي  لَحۡنِ اِ۬لۡقَوۡلِۚ وَاَللَّهُ يَعۡلَمُ أَعۡمَٰلَكُمۡ

48:9.base_text: that youpl may believe in Allah and His Messenger, and rally to Him and honor Him and highly exalt Him morning and evening.
48:9.duri_abu_amr_text: that they may believe in Allah and His Messenger, and rally to Him and honor Him and highly exalt Him morning and evening.
48:9.susi_text: that they may believe in Allah and His Messenger, and rally to Him and honor Him and highly exalt Him morning and evening.
48:9.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: لِّيُؤۡمِنُواْ بِاللَّهِ وَرَسُولِهِۦ وَيُعَزِّرُوهُ وَيُوَقِّرُوهُۚ وَيُسَبِّحُوهُ بُكۡرَةٗ وَأَصِيلًا
48:9.susi_ar_text: لِّيُومِنُواْ بِاللَّهِ وَرَسُولِهِۦ  وَيُعَزِّرُوهُ وَيُوَقِّرُوهُۚ وَيُسَبِّحُوهُ بُكۡرَةٗ وَأَصِيلًا

48:24.base_text: And it is He who withheld their hands from youpl and your hands from them in the valley of Makkah after giving you advantage over them, for Allah has always been All-Seeing of what you do.
48:24.duri_abu_amr_text: And it is He who withheld their hands from youpl and your hands from them in the valley of Makkah after giving you advantage over them, for Allah has always been All-Seeing of what they do.
48:24.susi_text: And it is He who withheld their hands from youpl and your hands from them in the valley of Makkah after giving you advantage over them, for Allah has always been All-Seeing of what they do.
48:24.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: وَهۡوَ اَ۬لَّذِي كَفَّ أَيۡدِيَهُمۡ عَنكُمۡ وَأَيۡدِيَكُمۡ عَنۡهُم بِبَطۡنِ مَكَّةَ مِنۢ بَعۡدِ أَنۡ أَظۡفَرَكُمۡ عَلَيۡهِمۡۚ وَكَانَ اَ۬للَّهُ بِمَا يَعۡمَلُونَ بَصِيرًا
48:24.susi_ar_text: وَهۡوَ اَ۬لَّذِي كَفَّ أَيۡدِيَهُمۡ عَنكُمۡ وَأَيۡدِيَكُمۡ عَنۡهُم بِبَطۡنِ مَكَّةَ مِنۢ  بَعۡدِ أَنۡ أَظۡفَرَكُمۡ عَلَيۡهِمۡۚ وَكَانَ اَ۬للَّهُ بِمَا يَعۡمَلُونَ بَصِيرًا

51:46.base_text: And (recall) before that, the people of Noah—indeed, they were a defiantly disobedient people.
51:46.duri_abu_amr_text: And (likewise) before that, (in) the people of Noah—indeed, they were a defiantly disobedient people.
51:46.susi_text: And (likewise) before that, (in) the people of Noah—indeed, they were a defiantly disobedient people.
51:46.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: وَقَوۡمِ نُوحٖ مِّن قَبۡلُۖ إِنَّهُمۡ كَانُواْ قَوۡمٗا فَٰسِقِينَ
51:46.susi_ar_text: وَقَوۡمِ نُوحٖ مِّن قَبۡلُۖ إِنَّهُمۡ كَانُواْ قَوۡمٗا  فَٰسِقِينَ

51:49.base_text: And We created all things in pairs, that you may remind yourselves.
51:49.duri_abu_amr_text: And We created all things in pairs, that youpl may constantly remember.
51:49.susi_text: And We created all things in pairs, that youpl may constantly remember.
51:49.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: وَمِن كُلِّ شَيۡءٍ خَلَقۡنَا زَوۡجَيۡنِ لَعَلَّكُمۡ تَذَّكَّرُونَ
51:49.susi_ar_text: وَمِن كُلِّ شَيۡءٍ خَلَقۡنَا زَوۡجَيۡنِ  لَعَلَّكُمۡ تَذَّكَّرُونَ

52:21.base_text: And those who attained faith and whose offspring followed them in faith—We have united them with their offspring, and We have not deprived them of anything of their work; every person is in pledge for what (deeds) he has earned.
52:21.duri_abu_amr_text: And those who attained faith and whom We followed (with) their offspring(s) in faith—We have united them with their offspring(s), and We have not deprived them of anything of their work; every person is in pledge for what (deeds) he has earned.
52:21.susi_text: And those who attained faith and whom We followed (with) their offspring(s) in faith—We have united them with their offspring(s), and We have not deprived them of anything of their work; every person is in pledge for what (deeds) he has earned.
52:21.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: وَاَلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَأَتۡبَعۡنَٰهُمۡ ذُرِّيَّٰتِهِم بِإِيمَٰنٍ أَلۡحَقۡنَا بِهِمۡ ذُرِّيَّٰتِهِمۡ وَمَآ أَلَتۡنَٰهُم مِّنۡ عَمَلِهِم مِّن شَيۡءٖۚ كُلُّ اُ۪مۡرِيِٕۢ بِمَا كَسَبَ رَهِينٞ
52:21.susi_ar_text: وَاَلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَأَتۡبَعۡنَٰهُمۡ ذُرِّيَّٰتِهِم بِإِيمَٰنٍ أَلۡحَقۡنَا  بِهِمۡ ذُرِّيَّٰتِهِمۡ وَمَا أَلَتۡنَٰهُم مِّنۡ عَمَلِهِم مِّن شَيۡءٖۚ كُلُّ اُ۪مۡرِيِٕۢ بِمَا  كَسَبَ رَهِينٞ

55:22.base_text: From them come out pearls and corals.
55:22.duri_abu_amr_text: From them are brought out pearls and corals.
55:22.susi_text: From them are brought out pearls and corals.

55:35.base_text: Flares of fire, and brass, will be sent upon youdl, and you will not find help.
55:35.duri_abu_amr_text: Flares of fire and (of) brass, will be sent upon youdl, and you will not find help.
55:35.susi_text: Flares of fire and (of) brass, will be sent upon youdl, and you will not find help.

56:19.base_text: causing them neither headache nor intoxication,
56:19.duri_abu_amr_text: causing them no headache, and they are not intoxicated,
56:19.susi_text: causing them no headache, and they are not intoxicated,

56:62.base_text: and youpl have certainly known the first formation; if only you would remind yourselves!
56:62.duri_abu_amr_text: and youpl have certainly known the first formation; if only you would constantly remember!
56:62.susi_text: and youpl have certainly known the first formation; if only you would constantly remember!
56:62.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: وَلَقَدۡ عَلِمۡتُمُ اُ۬لنَّشَآءَةَ اَ۬لۡأُولۭيٰ فَلَوۡلَا تَذَّكَّرُونَ
56:62.susi_ar_text: وَلَقَدۡ  عَلِمۡتُمُ اُ۬لنَّشَآءَةَ اَ۬لۡأُولۭيٰ فَلَوۡلَا تَذَّكَّرُونَ

57:8.base_text: And what is the matter with youpl that you do not believe in Allah when the Messenger calls you to believe in your Lord—when He has taken your pledge— if you are believers?
57:8.duri_abu_amr_text: And what is the matter with youpl that you do not believe in Allah when the Messenger calls you to believe in your Lord—when your pledge has been taken— if you are believers?
57:8.susi_text: And what is the matter with youpl that you do not believe in Allah when the Messenger calls you to believe in your Lord—when your pledge has been taken— if you are believers?
57:8.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: ۞ وَمَا لَكُمۡ لَا تُؤۡمِنُونَ بِاللَّهِ وَاَلرَّسُولُ يَدۡعُوكُمۡ لِتُؤۡمِنُواْ بِرَبِّكُمۡ وَقَدۡ أُخِذَ مِيثَٰقُكُمۡ إِن كُنتُم مُّؤۡمِنِينَ
57:8.susi_ar_text: ۞ وَمَا لَكُمۡ لَا تُومِنُونَ بِاللَّهِ وَاَلرَّسُولُ يَدۡعُوكُمۡ لِتُومِنُواْ بِرَبِّكُمۡ وَقَدۡ  أُخِذَ مِيثَٰقُكُمۡ إِن كُنتُم مُّومِنِينَ

57:9.base_text: It is He who bestows upon His servant evident signs from on high to bring youpl out of darkness(es) into light. And towards you Allah is truly Compassionate, Bestowing of mercy.
57:9.duri_abu_amr_text: It is He who sends down upon His servant evident signs to bring youpl out of darkness(es) into light. And towards you Allah is truly Compassionate, Bestowing of mercy.
57:9.susi_text: It is He who sends down upon His servant evident signs to bring youpl out of darkness(es) into light. And towards you Allah is truly Compassionate, Bestowing of mercy.
57:9.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: هُوَ اَ۬لَّذِي يُنزِلُ عَلَىٰ عَبۡدِهِۦٓ ءَايَٰتِۢ بَيِّنَٰتٖ لِّيُخۡرِجَكُم مِّنَ اَ۬لظُّلُمَٰتِ إِلَى اَ۬لنُّورِۚ وَإِنَّ اَ۬للَّهَ بِكُمۡ لَرَؤُفٞ رَّحِيمٞ
57:9.susi_ar_text: هُوَ اَ۬لَّذِي يُنزِلُ عَلَىٰ عَبۡدِهِۦ  ءَايَٰتِۢ بَيِّنَٰتٖ لِّيُخۡرِجَكُم مِّنَ اَ۬لظُّلُمَٰتِ إِلَى اَ۬لنُّورِۚ وَإِنَّ اَ۬للَّهَ بِكُمۡ  لَرَؤُفٞ رَّحِيمٞ

57:16.base_text: Is it not time for those who have attained faith: that their hearts should become reverent towards Allah’s Reminder and to that which came down of the truth, and not be like those who were given the Scripture previously, but for whom time became prolonged so that their hearts hardened, and many of them are defiantly disobedient?
57:16.duri_abu_amr_text: Is it not time for those who have attained faith: that their hearts should become reverent towards Allah’s Reminder and to that which He bestowed from on high of the truth, and not be like those who were given the Scripture previously, but for whom time became prolonged so that their hearts hardened, and many of them are defiantly disobedient?
57:16.susi_text: Is it not time for those who have attained faith: that their hearts should become reverent towards Allah’s Reminder and to that which He bestowed from on high of the truth, and not be like those who were given the Scripture previously, but for whom time became prolonged so that their hearts hardened, and many of them are defiantly disobedient?
57:16.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: ۞ أَلَمۡ يَأۡنِ لِلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓاْ أَن تَخۡشَعَ قُلُوبُهُمۡ لِذِكۡرِ اِ۬للَّهِ وَمَا نَزَّلَ مِنَ اَ۬لۡحَقِّ وَلَا يَكُونُواْ كَاَلَّذِينَ أُوتُواْ اُ۬لۡكِتَٰبَ مِن قَبۡلُ فَطَالَ عَلَيۡهِمِ اِ۬لۡأَمَدُ فَقَسَتۡ قُلُوبُهُمۡۖ وَكَثِيرٞ مِّنۡهُمۡ فَٰسِقُونَ
57:16.susi_ar_text: ۞ أَلَمۡ يَانِ لِلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ أَن تَخۡشَعَ  قُلُوبُهُمۡ لِذِكۡرِ اِ۬للَّهِ وَمَا نَزَّلَ مِنَ اَ۬لۡحَقِّ وَلَا يَكُونُواْ كَاَلَّذِينَ  أُوتُواْ اُ۬لۡكِتَٰبَ مِن قَبۡلُ فَطَالَ عَلَيۡهِمِ اِ۬لۡأَمَدُ فَقَسَتۡ قُلُوبُهُمۡۖ وَكَثِيرٞ  مِّنۡهُمۡ فَٰسِقُونَ

57:23.base_text: so that youpl do not grieve over what you have missed nor exult over what He has given you. And Allah does not love every self-admiring boaster—
57:23.duri_abu_amr_text: so that youpl do not grieve over what you have missed nor exult over what has come to you. And Allah does not love every self-admiring boaster—
57:23.susi_text: so that youpl do not grieve over what you have missed nor exult over what has come to you. And Allah does not love every self-admiring boaster—
57:23.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: لِّكَيۡلَا تَأۡسَوۡاْ عَلَىٰ مَا فَاتَكُمۡ وَلَا تَفۡرَحُواْ بِمَآ أَتَىٰكُمۡۗ وَاَللَّهُ لَا يُحِبُّ كُلَّ مُخۡتَالٖ فَخُورٍ
57:23.susi_ar_text: لِّكَيۡلَا  تَاسَوۡاْ عَلَىٰ مَا فَاتَكُمۡ وَلَا تَفۡرَحُواْ بِمَا أَتَىٰكُمۡۗ وَاَللَّهُ  لَا يُحِبُّ كُلَّ مُخۡتَالٖ فَخُورٍ

58:11.base_text: O you who have attained faith, when you are told, “Make room for one another in assemblies,” then make room so that Allah makes room for you. And when you are told, “Arise,” then arise. Allah elevates by degrees those of you who have attained faith and those given knowledge. And Allah is All-Aware of what you do.
58:11.duri_abu_amr_text: O you who have attained faith, when you are told, “Make room for one another in the assembly,” then make room so that Allah makes room for you. And when you are told, “Arise,” then arise. Allah elevates by degrees those of you who have attained faith and those given knowledge. And Allah is All-Aware of what you do.
58:11.susi_text: O you who have attained faith, when you are told, “Make room for one another in the assembly,” then make room so that Allah makes room for you. And when you are told, “Arise,” then arise. Allah elevates by degrees those of you who have attained faith and those given knowledge. And Allah is All-Aware of what you do.
58:11.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: يَٰٓأَيُّهَا اَ۬لَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓاْ إِذَا قِيلَ لَكُمۡ تَفَسَّحُواْ فِي اِ۬لۡمَجۡلِسِ فَاَفۡسَحُواْ يَفۡسَحِ اِ۬للَّهُ لَكُمۡۖ وَإِذَا قِيلَ اَ۪نشِزُواْ فَاَنشِزُواْ يَرۡفَعِ اِ۬للَّهُ اُ۬لَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ مِنكُمۡ وَاَلَّذِينَ أُوتُواْ اُ۬لۡعِلۡمَ دَرَجَٰتٖۚ وَاَللَّهُ بِمَا تَعۡمَلُونَ خَبِيرٞ
58:11.susi_ar_text: يَٰأَيُّهَا  اَ۬لَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ إِذَا قِيل لَّكُمۡ تَفَسَّحُواْ فِي اِ۬لۡمَجۡلِسِ فَاَفۡسَحُواْ يَفۡسَحِ  اِ۬للَّهُ لَكُمۡۖ وَإِذَا قِيلَ اَ۪نشِزُواْ فَاَنشِزُواْ يَرۡفَعِ اِ۬للَّهُ اُ۬لَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ مِنكُمۡ  وَاَلَّذِينَ أُوتُواْ اُ۬لۡعِلۡمَ دَرَجَٰتٖۚ وَاَللَّهُ بِمَا تَعۡمَلُونَ خَبِيرٞ

59:2.base_text: It is He who evicted those who denied among the People of the Scripture from their homes at the first exodus. Youpl did not think they would depart, and they thought their fortresses would protect them from Allah, but Allah came at them from where they never expected and threw terror into their hearts. They wreck their houses with their own hands and by the hands of the believers. So take a lesson, O you who are endowed with sight(s).
59:2.duri_abu_amr_text: It is He who evicted those who denied among the People of the Scripture from their homes at the first exodus. Youpl did not think they would depart, and they thought their fortresses would protect them from Allah, but Allah came at them from where they never expected and threw terror into their hearts. They vigorously wreck their houses with their own hands and by the hands of the believers. So take a lesson, O you who are endowed with sight(s).
59:2.susi_text: It is He who evicted those who denied among the People of the Scripture from their homes at the first exodus. Youpl did not think they would depart, and they thought their fortresses would protect them from Allah, but Allah came at them from where they never expected and threw terror into their hearts. They vigorously wreck their houses with their own hands and by the hands of the believers. So take a lesson, O you who are endowed with sight(s).

59:14.base_text: They do not combat youpl all together except from fortified strongholds or from behind walls. Their hostility towards each other is severe. Yousg would think them united, but their hearts are diverse; that is because they are people who do not reason.
59:14.duri_abu_amr_text: They do not combat youpl all together except from fortified strongholds or from behind a wall. Their hostility towards each other is severe. Yousg would think them united, but their hearts are diverse; that is because they are people who do not reason.
59:14.susi_text: They do not combat youpl all together except from fortified strongholds or from behind a wall. Their hostility towards each other is severe. Yousg would think them united, but their hearts are diverse; that is because they are people who do not reason.
59:14.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: لَا يُقَٰتِلُونَكُمۡ جَمِيعًا إِلَّا فِي قُرٗى مُّحَصَّنَةٍ أَوۡ مِن وَرَآءِ جِدٰ۪رِۢۚ بَأۡسُهُم بَيۡنَهُمۡ شَدِيدٞۚ تَحۡسِبُهُمۡ جَمِيعٗا وَقُلُوبُهُمۡ شَتّۭيٰۚ ذَٰلِكَ بِأَنَّهُمۡ قَوۡمٞ لَّا يَعۡقِلُونَ
59:14.susi_ar_text: لَا يُقَٰتِلُونَكُمۡ جَمِيعًا إِلَّا فِي قُرٗى مُّحَصَّنَةٍ  أَوۡ مِن وَرَآءِ جِدٰ۪رِۢۚ بَاسُهُم بَيۡنَهُمۡ شَدِيدٞۚ تَحۡسِبُهُمۡ جَمِيعٗا  وَقُلُوبُهُمۡ شَتّۭيٰۚ ذَٰلِكَ بِأَنَّهُمۡ قَوۡمٞ لَّا يَعۡقِلُونَ

60:3.base_text: Day of Resurrection He will decide between you, for Allah is All-Seeing of what you do.
60:3.duri_abu_amr_text: . . . on the Day of Resurrection a decision will be made between you . . .
60:3.susi_text: . . . on the Day of Resurrection a decision will be made between you . . .
60:3.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: لَن تَنفَعَكُمۡ أَرۡحَامُكُمۡ وَلَآ أَوۡلَٰدُكُمۡۚ يَوۡمَ اَ۬لۡقِيَٰمَةِ يُفۡصَلُ بَيۡنَكُمۡۚ وَاَللَّهُ بِمَا تَعۡمَلُونَ بَصِيرٞ
60:3.susi_ar_text: لَن تَنفَعَكُمۡ أَرۡحَامُكُمۡ وَلَا أَوۡلَٰدُكُمۡۚ يَوۡمَ اَ۬لۡقِيَٰمَةِ يُفۡصَلُ بَيۡنَكُمۡۚ وَاَللَّهُ  بِمَا تَعۡمَلُونَ بَصِيرٞ

61:14.base_text: O you who have attained faith, be the supporters of Allah as Jesus, son of Mary, said to the disciples, “Who are my supporters towards Allah?” The disciples said, “We are the supporters of Allah.” Then a faction of the Children of Israel attained faith while another faction denied it, and We aided those who had attained faith against their enemy, so they came to prevail.
61:14.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: يَٰٓأَيُّهَا اَ۬لَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ كُونُوٓاْ أَنصَارٗا لِّلَّهِ كَمَا قَالَ عِيسَى اَ۪بۡنُ مَرۡيَمَ لِلۡحَوَارِيِّـۧنَ مَنۡ أَنصَارِيٓ إِلَى اَ۬للَّهِۖ قَالَ اَ۬لۡحَوَارِيُّونَ نَحۡنُ أَنصَارُ اُ۬للَّهِۚ فَـَٔامَنَت طَّآئِفَةٞ مِّنۢ بَنِيٓ إِسۡرَٰٓءِيلَ وَكَفَرَت طَّآئِفَةٞۖ فَأَيَّدۡنَا اَ۬لَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ عَلَىٰ عَدُوِّهِمۡ فَأَصۡبَحُواْ ظَٰهِرِينَ
61:14.susi_ar_text: يَٰأَيُّهَا اَ۬لَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ كُونُواْ  أَنصَارٗا لِّلَّهِ كَمَا قَالَ عِيسَى اَ۪بۡنُ مَرۡيَمَ لِلۡحَوَارِيِّـۧنَ مَنۡ أَنصَارِي إِلَى اَ۬للَّهِۖ  قَالَ اَ۬لۡحَوَارِيُّون نَّحۡنُ أَنصَارُ اُ۬للَّهِۖ فَـَٔامَنَت طَّآئِفَةٞ مِّنۢ بَنِي إِسۡرَٰٓءِيلَ  وَكَفَرَت طَّآئِفَةٞۖ فَأَيَّدۡنَا اَ۬لَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ عَلَىٰ عَدُوِّهِمۡ فَأَصۡبَحُواْ ظَٰهِرِينَ

65:11.base_text: a messenger who reads to you Allah’s signs, (which are) clarifying, in order to bring out those who have attained faith and have done righteous deeds from darkness into light. And whoever believes in Allah and acts righteously— He will enter him into Gardens beneath which rivers flow, abiding therein forever; Allah has surely given him an excellent provision.
65:11.duri_abu_amr_text: a messenger who reads to you Allah’s signs, clarified, in order to bring out those who have attained faith and have done righteous deeds from darkness into light. And whoever believes in Allah and acts righteously— He will enter him into Gardens beneath which rivers flow, abiding therein forever; Allah has surely given him an excellent provision.
65:11.susi_text: a messenger who reads to you Allah’s signs, clarified, in order to bring out those who have attained faith and have done righteous deeds from darkness into light. And whoever believes in Allah and acts righteously— He will enter him into Gardens beneath which rivers flow, abiding therein forever; Allah has surely given him an excellent provision.
65:11.duri_abu_amr_ar_text: رَّسُولٗا يَتۡلُواْ عَلَيۡكُمۡ ءَايَٰتِ اِ۬للَّهِ مُبَيَّنَٰتٖ لِّيُخۡرِجَ اَ۬لَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَعَمِلُواْ اُ۬لصَّٰلِحَٰتِ مِنَ اَ۬لظُّلُمَٰتِ إِلَى اَ۬لنُّورِۚ وَمَن يُؤۡمِنۢ بِاللَّهِ وَيَعۡمَلۡ صَٰلِحٗا يُدۡخِلۡهُ جَنَّٰتٖ تَجۡرِي مِن تَحۡتِهَا اَ۬لۡأَنۡهَٰرُ خَٰلِدِينَ فِيهَآ أَبَدٗاۖ قَدۡ أَحۡسَنَ اَ۬للَّهُ لَهُۥ رِزۡقًا
65:11.susi_ar_text: رَّسُولٗا يَتۡلُواْ عَلَيۡكُمۡ ءَايَٰتِ اِ۬للَّهِ مُبَيَّنَٰتٖ لِّيُخۡرِجَ  اَ۬لَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَعَمِلُواْ اُ۬لصَّٰلِحَٰتِ مِنَ اَ۬لظُّلُمَٰتِ إِلَى اَ۬لنُّورِۚ وَمَن يُومِنۢ  بِاللَّهِ وَيَعۡمَلۡ صَٰلِحٗا يُدۡخِلۡهُ جَنَّٰتٖ تَجۡرِي مِن تَحۡتِهَا اَ۬لۡأَنۡهَٰرُ خَٰلِدِينَ  فِيهَا أَبَدٗاۖ قَدۡ أَحۡسَنَ اَ۬للَّهُ لَهُۥ رِزۡقًا

69:9.base_text: Then Pharaoh and whoever was before him and the Overturned Cities came up with grave offenses
69:9.duri_abu_amr_text: Then Pharaoh and whoever was on his side and the Overturned Cities came up with grave offenses
69:9.susi_text: Then Pharaoh and whoever was on his side and the Overturned Cities came up with grave offenses

72:5.duri_abu_amr_text: And indeed, we thought that humans

72:7.duri_abu_amr_text: And indeed, they thought, as youpl thought,
72:7.susi_text: And indeed, they thought, as youpl thought,

72:9.duri_abu_amr_text: And indeed, we used to take up positions
72:9.susi_text: And indeed, we used to take up positions
